<body lang="uz-Latn-UZ" link="#000080" vlink="#800000" dir="ltr"><p><font face="Noto Sans Devanagari"><span lang="hi-IN">ď»ż</span></font></p>
<div id="divCont" dir="ltr" style="background: #ffffff"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
	<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
	Respublikasining MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi kodeksi</span></p>
	<div id="-197270" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">BIRINCHI
		BOĘ»LIM<br/>
UMUMIY QOIDALAR</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197314" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">I
		bob. ASOSIY QOIDALAR</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450213" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450430" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik ushbu Kodeks, OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi qonunlari, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy Majlisining
		qarorlari, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Prezidentining farmonlari,
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasining qarorlari,
		QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi qonunlari, QoraqalpogĘ»iston
		Respublikasi JoĘ»qorgĘ»i Kengesining va Vazirlar Kengashining
		qarorlari, xalq deputatlari viloyatlar va Toshkent shahar
		Kengashlarining, viloyatlar va Toshkent shahar hokimlarining
		qarorlaridan iboratdir.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5453098" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeks qoidalari mazkur Kodeksga kiritilmagan qonunchilik
		hujjatlarida sodir etganlik uchun javobgarlik nazarda tutilgan
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarga ham taalluqlidir.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450443" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikning vazifalari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450470" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik inson va jamiyat
		farovonligi yoĘ»lida fuqarolarning huquq va erkinliklarini, mulkni,
		davlat va jamoat tartibini, tabiiy muhitni muhofaza qilishni,
		ijtimoiy adolat va qonuniylikni taĘĽminlashni, maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarning oĘ»z vaqtida va
		obyektiv koĘ»rib chiqilishini, shuningdek bunday
		huquqbuzarliklarning oldini olishni, fuqarolarni OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-6445145"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Konstitutsiyasi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va
		qonunlariga rioya etish ruhida tarbiyalashni oĘ»z oldiga vazifa
		qilib qoĘ»yadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197330" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bu
		vazifalarni amalga oshirish uchun ushbu Kodeks qanday harakat yoki
		harakatsizlik maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik hisoblanishini, maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlikni sodir etgan shaxsga nisbatan qaysi organ (mansabdor
		shaxs) tomonidan qay tartibda qanaqa maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilishi
		va ijro etilishini belgilaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450628" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikning prinsiplari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450629" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik qonuniylik, fuqarolarning
		qonun oldida tengligi, demokratizm, insonparvarlik, odillik va ayb
		uchun javobgarlikning muqarrarligi prinsiplariga asoslanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450664" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik sohasida
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining vakolatlari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450901" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik sohasida quyidagilar
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi ixtiyoriga beriladi:</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450907" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikning prinsiplarini aniqlash
		va umumiy qoidalarini belgilab berish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197338" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikka sabab boĘ»ladigan harakat yoki harakatsizlikni,
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish
		vakolatiga ega boĘ»lgan organlar tizimini (mansabdor shaxslarni),
		mazkur ishlarni yuritish va chiqarilgan qarorlarning ijrosi
		tartibini belgilash;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450912" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik sohasida QoraqalpogĘ»iston
		Respublikasining vakolatlarini belgilash;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197340" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">viloyatlar
		va Toshkent shahar hokimiyat vakillik organlari hamda hokimlari
		maĘĽmuriy javobgarlik nazarda tutiladigan qaror qabul qilishlari
		mumkin boĘ»lgan masalalar doirasini belgilash.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450921" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik sohasida
		QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasining vakolatlari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450928" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik sohasida quyidagilar
		QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi ixtiyoriga beriladi:</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197352" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">jamoat
		tartibini saqlash masalalari boĘ»yicha, basharti bu masalalar ushbu
		Kodeks bilan tartibga solinmagan boĘ»lsa, shuningdek tabiiy ofatlar
		va epidemiyalarga qarshi kurash masalalari boĘ»yicha maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik belgilash;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5155708" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-334813"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">90</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199793"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">109</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199797"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">110</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200150"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">161-moddalariga</span></span></font></a>,
		164-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-336033"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
		qismiga</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200201"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">168-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>binoan
		buzilishi maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka sabab boĘ»ladigan qoidalarni
		belgilash.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197366" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarning oldini olish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197367" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
		organlari, fuqarolarning oĘ»zini oĘ»zi boshqarish organlari, jamoat
		birlashmalari maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarning oldini olish, ularning
		sodir etilishiga olib keluvchi sabablar va sharoitlarni aniqlash
		hamda bartaraf etishga, fuqarolarni ongli, intizomli boĘ»lish,
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-6445145"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Konstitutsiyasi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va
		qonunlariga rioya qilish ruhida tarbiyalashga yoĘ»naltirilgan
		tadbirlar ishlab chiqadilar va ularni amalga oshiradilar.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7984562" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mahalliy
		ijro etuvchi hokimiyat organlari OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-6445145"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Konstitutsiyasiga</span></span></font></a>,
		QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi hududida esa QoraqalpogĘ»iston
		Respublikasi Konstitutsiyasiga ham muvofiq qonuniylik,
		huquq-tartibot va fuqarolar xavfsizligini taĘĽmin eta borib, oĘ»z
		hududlarida barcha davlat organlari va jamoat birlashmalarining
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarning oldini olish borasidagi ishlarini
		muvofiqlashtirib turadilar, ichki ishlar organlari, bolalar
		masalalari boĘ»yicha komissiyalar hamda ularga hisobdor maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik bilan kurash olib boruvchi boshqa organlar
		faoliyatiga rahbarlik qiladilar.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197371" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">8-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish choralarini
		qoĘ»llanish vaqtida qonuniylikni taĘĽminlash</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450981" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik uchun hech kim qonunchilikda belgilangan asoslar va
		tartibdan boshqacha tarzda taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish chorasiga tortilishi
		mumkin emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197380" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish qonuniylikka rioya
		qilish asosida olib boriladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197383" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tegishli
		vakolat berilgan organlar va mansabdor shaxslar maĘĽmuriy taĘĽsir
		koĘ»rsatish choralarini oĘ»z vakolatlari doirasida qoĘ»llaydilar.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450984" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik uchun taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish choralarini qoĘ»llanish
		chogĘ»ida qonunchilik talablariga rioya etilishi vakolatli yuqori
		turuvchi organlar va mansabdor shaxslar tomonidan muntazam ravishda
		nazorat qilib turilishi bilan, prokuror nazorati bilan, shikoyat
		berish huquqi bilan taĘĽminlanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5450988" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">9-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikning amal qilishi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6414043" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs bu huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan vaqt
		va joyda amal qilayotgan qonunchilikka asosan javobgarlikka
		tortiladi, bundan ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6414055"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan hollar
		mustasno.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-1337520" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasining bayrogĘ»i ostidagi yoki OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasining portida roĘ»yxatga olingan va OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi hududidan tashqarida ochiq havo yoki suv boĘ»shligĘ»ida
		boĘ»lgan kemada maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs, agar
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining xalqaro shartnomasida boshqacha
		tartib nazarda tutilmagan boĘ»lsa, ushbu Kodeksga muvofiq maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikka tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6414056" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi fuqarolari, shuningdek OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasida
		doimiy yashovchi fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslar, agar ular chet
		davlat hududida huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan va ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6414078"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">47</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
		tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etganligi uchun oĘ»sha
		davlatning qonunchiligiga muvofiq javobgarlikka tortilmagan boĘ»lsa,
		ushbu Kodeksga muvofiq maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197391" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik uchun javobgarlikni yengillashtiruvchi yoki bekor
		qiluvchi hujjatlar orqaga qaytish kuchiga egadir, yaĘĽni ushbu
		hujjatlar chiqqunga qadar sodir etilgan huquqbuzarlik hollariga ham
		taalluqlidir. MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun javobgarlikni
		belgilovchi yoki javobgarlikni kuchaytiruvchi hujjatlar esa orqaga
		qaytish kuchiga ega boĘ»lmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451006" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
		ish koĘ»rilayotgan vaqt va joyda amal qilib turgan qonunchilik
		asosida yuritiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197395" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">IKKINCHI
		BOĘ»LIM<br/>
MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK VA MAĘĽMURIY JAVOBGARLIK</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197822" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">UMUMIY
		QISM</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197830" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">II
		bob. MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197833" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">10-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik tushunchasi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451013" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik deganda qonunchilikka binoan maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
		tortish nazarda tutilgan, shaxsga, fuqarolarning huquqlari va
		erkinliklariga, mulkchilikka, davlat va jamoat tartibiga, tabiiy
		muhitga tajovuz qiluvchi gĘ»ayrihuquqiy, aybli (qasddan yoki
		ehtiyotsizlik orqasida) sodir etilgan harakat yoki harakatsizlik
		tushuniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197838" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeksda nazarda tutilgan huquqbuzarlik uchun maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik, basharti bu huquqbuzarlik oĘ»z xususiyatiga koĘ»ra
		jinoiy javobgarlikka tortishga sabab boĘ»lmagan taqdirda, amalga
		oshiriladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197842" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">11-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni qasddan sodir etish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197844" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs oĘ»z harakati yoki
		harakatsizligi gĘ»ayrihuquqiy ekanligini bilgan boĘ»lsa, uning
		zararli oqibatlariga koĘ»zi yetgan, yuz berishini istagan boĘ»lsa
		yoki bu oqibatlarning kelib chiqishiga ongli ravishda yoĘ»l qoĘ»ygan
		boĘ»lsa, bunday maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik qasddan sodir etilgan deb
		hisoblanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197847" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">12-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni ehtiyotsizlik orqasida sodir etish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197848" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs oĘ»z harakati yoki
		harakatsizligi zararli oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkinligini
		oldindan koĘ»ra bilgan boĘ»lsa ham, lekin kaltabinlik bilan
		ularning oldini olish mumkin deb oĘ»ylagan boĘ»lsa, yoxud bunday
		oqibatlarning kelib chiqishi mumkinligini oldindan koĘ»rishi lozim
		va mumkin boĘ»lgani holda oldindan koĘ»ra bilmagan boĘ»lsa, bunday
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik ehtiyotsizlik orqasida sodir etilgan deb
		hisoblanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197853" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">13-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilish yoshi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4159424" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan paytda oĘ»n olti yoshga toĘ»lgan
		shaxslar, agar ushbu Kodeksda boshqacha qoida nazarda tutilmagan
		boĘ»lsa, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197856" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">14-modda.
		Voyaga yetmaganlarning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun javobgarligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436566" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan oĘ»n olti yoshdan oĘ»n sakkiz yoshgacha
		boĘ»lgan shaxslarga nisbatan Bolalar masalalari boĘ»yicha
		komissiyalar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi nizomda nazarda tutilgan choralar
		qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7224902" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ana
		shu shaxslar mazkur
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198117"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2971195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">116</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3263052"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">116</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3696966"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">116</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background:
