transparent">134</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781411"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">135</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5451227"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">135</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781427"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">136</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781443"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">138</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200538"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">183</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6051882"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">185</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7088942"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">185</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5086974"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">185</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5086981"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">185</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4356553"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4575495"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6447552"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">196</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5032574"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">206</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3493784"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">209</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200810"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">218</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052020"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">220</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052270"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">221-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
		tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarni sodir etgan taqdirda, ular
		umumiy asoslarda maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortiladi. Sodir etilgan
		huquqbuzarlikning xususiyatini va huquqbuzarning shaxsini hisobga
		olgan holda mazkur shaxslarga nisbatan (bundan ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4356553"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4575495"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6447552"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">196</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
		tutilgan huquqbuzarliklarni sodir etgan shaxslar mustasno) ishlar
		bolalar masalalari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) komissiyalari
		ixtiyoriga berilishi mumkin, ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198117"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">206</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
		tutilgan huquqbuzarliklarni sodir etgan shaxslarning ishlari esa
		shu komissiyalarga berilishi lozim.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197865" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">15-modda.
		Mansabdor shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy javobgarligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197866" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mansabdor
		shaxslar boshqaruv tartibini, davlat va jamoat tartibini saqlash,
		tabiiy muhitni, aholi sogĘ»ligĘ»ini muhofaza qilish sohasida
		belgilangan qoidalarga va bajarilishini taĘĽminlash oĘ»z xizmat
		vazifalariga kiradigan boshqa qoidalarga rioya etmaganlik bilan
		bogĘ»liq maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etganliklari uchun maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikka tortilishlari lozim.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2735395" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Doimiy,
		vaqtincha yoki maxsus vakolat boĘ»yicha tayinlanadigan yoki
		saylanadigan, hokimiyat vakili vazifalarini bajaradigan yoxud
		davlat organlarida, fuqarolarning oĘ»zini oĘ»zi boshqarish
		organlarida, mulk shaklidan qatĘĽi nazar, korxonalarda,
		muassasalarda, tashkilotlarda tashkiliy-boshqaruv,
		maĘĽmuriy-xoĘ»jalik vazifalarini amalga oshiradigan va yuridik
		ahamiyatga ega harakatlarni sodir etishga vakolat berilgan shaxs,
		xuddi shuningdek xalqaro tashkilotda yoxud chet davlatning qonun
		chiqaruvchi, ijro etuvchi, maĘĽmuriy yoki sud organida mazkur
		vazifalarni amalga oshiruvchi shaxs mansabdor shaxs deb eĘĽtirof
		etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2735399" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlatning
		biron-bir hokimiyat organi nomidan ish koĘ»rib, muayyan vazifalarni
		doimiy yoki vaqtincha amalga oshiruvchi va oĘ»z vakolatlari
		doirasida koĘ»pchilik yoxud barcha fuqaro yoki mansabdor shaxslar
		uchun majburiy boĘ»lgan harakatlarni sodir etish yoki farmoyishlar
		berish huquqiga ega boĘ»lgan shaxs hokimiyat vakili deb eĘĽtirof
		etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197869" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">16-modda.
		Harbiy xizmatchilar va intizom ustavlari tatbiq etiladigan boshqa
		shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy javobgarligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7885962" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Harbiy
		xizmatchilar va yigĘ»inga chaqirilgan harbiy xizmatga majburlar,
		shuningdek ichki ishlar organlarining hamda OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasining oddiy askarlar va boshliqlar
		tarkibiga mansub shaxslar maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun intizom
		ustavlariga muvofiq javobgar boĘ»ladilar. Mazkur shaxslar ijro
		hujjatini ijro etmaganligi, sud hujjatlari va boshqa organlar
		hujjatlarini ijro etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni, davlat
		xizmatlari koĘ»rsatish sohasidagi qonunchilikni, yoĘ»l harakati, ov
		qilish, baliq tutish va baliq zaxiralarini saqlash, bojxona
		qoidalarini buzganligi uchun umumiy asoslarda maĘĽmuriy javobgar
		boĘ»ladi. Yuqorida koĘ»rsatilgan shaxslarga nisbatan maĘĽmuriy
		qamoqqa olish choralari qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin emas. Muddatli harbiy
		xizmat harbiy xizmatchilariga jarima solinishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197872" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1562875"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan shaxslar
		jumlasiga kirmaydigan, intizom ustavlari yoki intizom toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
		maxsus qoidalar tatbiq etiladigan boshqa shaxslar, ana shu ustav
		yoki qoidalarda toĘ»gĘ»ridan-toĘ»gĘ»ri nazarda tutilgan hollarda,
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etganliklari uchun intizomiy javobgar
		boĘ»ladilar, boshqa hollarda esa umumiy asoslarda maĘĽmuriy
		javobgar boĘ»ladilar.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7634531" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">17-modda.
		Chet el fuqarolari va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7634534" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi hududida boĘ»lgan chet el fuqarolari va fuqaroligi
		boĘ»lmagan shaxslar umumiy asoslarda maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
		tortilishlari lozim.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197880" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Immunitetga
		ega boĘ»lgan shaxslarga nisbatan ushbu Kodeksning OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi qatnashchi boĘ»lgan xalqaro shartnomalar va bitimlarga
		zid boĘ»lmagan qismi qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2727360" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">17<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video qayd etish texnika
		vositalari orqali qayd etilgan yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzganlik
		uchun shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy javobgarligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042785" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Maxsus
		avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video qayd etish texnika vositalari
		orqali ushbu Kodeks 125-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034050"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(xavfsizlik
		kamaridan foydalanish qoidalariga rioya etmaslikka oid
		qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1294644"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400097"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">oltinchi
		qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7480970"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(bundan
		ushbu moddaning yoĘ»lning qatnov qismidagi chiziqlar bilan
		belgilangan talablarga rioya etmaslikka, tashqi yoritish
		asboblaridan foydalanish qoidalarini buzishga, yoĘ»lovchilarga yoki
		piyodalarga loyqa sachratishga oid qismlari
		mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5754985"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400359"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4356440"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">4</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1780991"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781003"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7480988"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">7</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400534"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">9</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400539"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">10</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781377"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">129&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199952"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">130-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
		135-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199988"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(transport
		vositalarini boshqarish huquqiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxslarga
		taalluqli qismida) va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199988"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
		qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarliklar qayd etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7395873" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Maxsus
		avtomatlashtirilgan foto- va video qayd etish texnika vositalari
		orqali yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilganligi qayd etilgan taqdirda,
		maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka transport vositasining mulkdori yoki mazkur
		transport vositasidan fuqarolik-huquqiy munosabatlar asosida
		belgilangan tartibda foydalangan shaxs tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7395884" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuridik
		shaxsga qonunchilikka muvofiq tegishli transport vositasidan
		foydalanib sodir etilgan yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilganligi
		maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto- va video qayd etish texnika
		vositalari orqali qayd etilgan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
		yuridik shaxsning transport vositasidan foydalanish uchun masĘĽul
		boĘ»lgan shaxsi yoki mazkur transport vositasidan fuqarolik-huquqiy
		munosabatlar asosida belgilangan tartibda foydalangan shaxs
		tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2727366" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Maxsus
		avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video qayd etish texnika vositalari
		orqali yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilganligi qayd etilgan taqdirda,
		huquqbuzarlikning takroriyligi hisobga olinmaydi, ushbu Kodeks
		321-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2727743"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan hol bundan
		mustasno.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2727368" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
		maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ustidan
		berilgan shikoyatni koĘ»rib chiqish jarayonida tegishli transport
		vositasiga huquqbuzarlik qayd etilgan paytda egalik qilgan shaxs
		aniqlansa yoxud mazkur transport vositasi boshqa shaxslarning
		gĘ»ayrihuquqiy xatti-harakatlari natijasida transport vositasi
		mulkdorining egaligidan chiqib ketganligi aniqlansa, transport
		vositasining mulkdori oĘ»ziga tegishli transport vositasidan
		foydalanib sodir etilgan, maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video
		qayd etish texnika vositalari orqali qayd etilgan yoĘ»l harakati
		qoidabuzarliklari uchun maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan ozod etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7180892" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tezkor
		va maxsus xizmatlarning transport vositalari, shuningdek ular
		kuzatib kelayotgan transport vositalari tomonidan yoĘ»l harakati
		qoidalariga muvofiq imtiyozdan foydalanilgan holda sodir etilgan
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto- va
		video qayd etish texnika vositalari orqali qayd etilgan taqdirda
		hamda ular kechiktirib boĘ»lmaydigan xizmat vazifalarini
		bajarganligini tasdiqlovchi hujjatlar taqdim etilganda
		haydovchilarning maĘĽmuriy qoidabuzarligi oxirgi zarurat holatida
		sodir etilgan deb topiladi va maĘĽmuriy ish ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">271-moddasiga</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;muvofiq
		tugatiladi. Bunda tez tibbiy yordam va yongĘ»in-qutqaruv
		boĘ»linmalarining transport vositalari tomonidan kechiktirib
		boĘ»lmaydigan xizmat vazifalarini bajarganlikni tasdiqlovchi
		hujjatlar taqdim etilishi talab qilinmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7180906" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l
		harakati qoidalari buzilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumot jarima
		solish haqida qaror chiqarishga vakolatli boĘ»lgan shaxsga yoĘ»l
		harakati qoidalari buzilganligi maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto- va
		video qayd etish texnika vositalari orqali qayd etilgan paytdan
		eĘĽtiboran qirq sakkiz soat ichida yuborilmagan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">271-moddasiga</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;muvofiq
		tugatiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4914176" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tezkor
		va maxsus xizmatlarning koĘ»k yoki qizil yoxud koĘ»k va qizil
		rangli yaltiroq mayoqchani yoqqan holda hamda maxsus tovushli
		signallar bilan yaqinlashib kelayotgan transport vositalariga
		ularning toĘ»siqsiz oĘ»tib ketishi uchun yoĘ»l bergan transport
		vositalari haydovchilari tomonidan sodir etilgan maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarliklar foto- va videoqayd etishning maxsus
		avtomatlashtirilgan texnik vositalari orqali qayd etilgan taqdirda,
		haydovchilarning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarligi oxirgi zarurat holatlarda
		sodir etilgan deb topiladi va maĘĽmuriy ish ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">271-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
		tugatiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5802973" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">17<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat bojxona qoĘ»mitasining Yagona
		avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali qayd etilgan
		huquqbuzarliklar uchun shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy javobgarligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5802982" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeks 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">10</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081685"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">13</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081787"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan taqdirda, deklarant yoxud uning
		ishonchli vakili maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5802985" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeks 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">16</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081821"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan taqdirda, bojxona organi oldidagi
		majburiyatni oĘ»z zimmasiga olgan shaxs maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
		tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5802990" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeks 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">22</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081896"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan taqdirda, deklaratsiyalovchi shaxs
		maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortiladi, bunda, agar mazkur huquqbuzarlik
		bojxona rasmiylashtiruvi uchun taqdim etilgan hujjatlarda notoĘ»gĘ»ri
		axborot koĘ»rsatilganligi oqibatida sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, tegishli
		hujjatlarni va axborotni taqdim etgan deklarant yoxud uning
		ishonchli vakili maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5802994" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi Davlat bojxona qoĘ»mitasining Yagona
		avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali qayd etilgan bojxona
		toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik buzilganligiga doir maĘĽmuriy ishlarni
		koĘ»rib chiqishda huquqbuzarlik takroriy sodir etilganligi
		eĘĽtiborga olinmaydi, bundan ushbu Kodeks 321-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2727743"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan hol
		mustasno.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6054867" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">17<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
		Soliq organlarining Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi
		orqali qayd etilgan huquqbuzarliklar uchun shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7984618" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Soliq
		organlarining Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali qayd
		etilgan, ushbu Kodeks
		175-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7984627"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7984641"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6056129"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">oltinchi
		qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarliklarni sodir etganlik uchun yuridik shaxsning rahbari
		yoki yakka tartibdagi tadbirkor maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197883" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">18-modda.
		Zaruriy mudofaa</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197885" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeksda yoki maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun maĘĽmuriy javobgarlik
		belgilovchi boshqa normativ hujjatlarda nazarda tutilgan, lekin
		zaruriy mudofaa holatida, yaĘĽni shaxsni yoki mudofaalanuvchining
		yoxud boshqa shaxsning huquqlarini, jamiyat yoki davlat
		manfaatlarini gĘ»ayrihuquqiy tajovuzlardan shunday tajovuz
		qilayotgan shaxsga zarar yetkazish yoĘ»li bilan himoya qilish
		vaqtida, basharti bunda zaruriy mudofaa chegarasidan chiqib
		ketilishiga yoĘ»l qoĘ»yilmagan boĘ»lsa, sodir etilgan harakatlar
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik deb hisoblanmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197887" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">19-modda.
		Oxirgi zarurat</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197890" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeksda yoki boshqa normativ hujjatlarda nazarda tutilgan,
		huquqlarga hamda qonun bilan himoya etiladigan manfaatlarga zarar
		yetkazgan, oxirgi zarurat holatida, yaĘĽni shaxsga yoki mazkur
		shaxsning yoxud boshqa shaxsning huquqlariga, jamiyat yoki davlat
		manfaatlariga tahdid etayotgan xavfni, basharti bu xavfni oĘ»sha
		holatda boshqacha choralar bilan bartaraf etib boĘ»lmasa hamda
		yetkazilgan zarar oldi olingan zararga qaraganda kamroq boĘ»lsa,
		bartaraf etish uchun sodir etilgan harakatlar maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik deb hisoblanmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197891" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">20-modda.
		Aqli norasolik</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4512897" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">GĘ»ayrihuquqiy
		harakat yoki harakatsizlik sodir etgan vaqtida aqli norasolik
		holatida boĘ»lgan shaxs, yaĘĽni ruhiy holatining surunkali yoki
		vaqtincha buzilganligi, aqli zaifligi yoxud boshqa xil kasallik
		oqibatida oĘ»z harakatining (harakatsizligining) ahamiyatini idrok
		eta olmagan yoki boshqara olmagan shaxs maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
		tortilishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-1780137" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">21-modda.
		Huquqbuzarlikning kam ahamiyatliligi sababli maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikdan ozod qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-1780140" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sodir
		etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik kam ahamiyatli boĘ»lgan taqdirda,
		sud huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan ozod etib, uni
		ogohlantirish bilan kifoyalanishi mumkin. Agar maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi boshqa organ
		(mansabdor shaxs) sodir etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikning kam
		ahamiyatliligi haqida xulosaga kelsa, ish huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikdan ozod qilish haqidagi masalani hal etish uchun ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781536"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">308</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
		tartibda sudga yuboriladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500185" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">21<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Jismoniy yoki ruhiy majburlash yoxud qoĘ»rqitish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500189" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jismoniy
		yoki ruhiy majburlash yoxud shunday majburlashni qoĘ»llash bilan
		qoĘ»rqitish natijasida ushbu Kodeks bilan qoĘ»riqlanadigan huquq va
		manfaatlarga zarar yetkazgan shaxs, agar bunday majburlash yoki
		qoĘ»rqitish natijasida shaxs oĘ»z harakatlarini (harakatsizligini)
		boshqara olmagan boĘ»lsa, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500199" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeks bilan qoĘ»riqlanadigan huquq va manfaatlarga jismoniy yoki
		ruhiy majburlash yoxud shunday majburlashni qoĘ»llash bilan
		qoĘ»rqitish natijasida zarar yetkazganlik uchun maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masala, agar bunday majburlash yoki
		qoĘ»rqitish oqibatida shaxs oĘ»z harakatlarini (harakatsizligini)
		boshqarish imkoniyatini saqlab qolgan boĘ»lsa, ushbu
		Kodeks&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197887"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">19-moddasining&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>qoidalari
		inobatga olingan holda hal etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5670116" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">21<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
		Yarashilganligi munosabati bilan maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan ozod
		qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7144666" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197982"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">40-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(tuhmat),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197986"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">41-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(haqorat
		qilish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198002"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">45-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(fuqarolarning
		turar joyi daxlsizligini buzish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198006"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">46-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(fuqaroga
		maĘĽnaviy yoki moddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin boĘ»lgan
		maĘĽlumotlarni oshkor etish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034018"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">46</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(shaxsiy
		hayot daxlsizligini buzish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198031"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">52-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(yengil
		tan jarohati yetkazish), 61-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-334336"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-334346"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
		qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(oz miqdorda talon-taroj
		qilish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3493547"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(mulkni
		qasddan nobud qilish yoki unga zarar
		yetkazish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198148"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">62-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(topib
		olingan mol-mulkni yashirish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199764"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">104-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(ekinzorlarni
		payhon qilish, qishloq xoĘ»jalik ekinlarining dalada toĘ»plab
		qoĘ»yilgan hosiliga zarar yetkazish yoki uni yoĘ»q qilib yuborish,
		koĘ»chatlarga shikast yetkazish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199884"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">121-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(transport
		vositalarining ichki jihozlariga shikast
		yetkazish),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199971"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">133-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(transport
		vositalari haydovchilarining yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzishi
		jabrlanuvchiga yengil tan jarohati yoki ancha miqdorda moddiy zarar
		yetkazilishiga olib kelishi),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199976"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">134-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(haydovchilarning
		yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzishi transport vositalarining yoki
		boshqa mol-mulkning shikastlanishiga olib
		kelishi),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200538"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">183-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(mayda
		bezorilik),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200677"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">200-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(oĘ»zboshimchalik)
		nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarni sodir etgan shaxs,
		agar u oĘ»z aybiga iqror boĘ»lsa, jabrlanuvchi bilan yarashsa va
		yetkazilgan zararni bartaraf etsa, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan ozod
		etilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5670128" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi organ
		(mansabdor shaxs) taraflarning yarashuvi munosabati bilan ishni
		sudga yuborish toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqaradi va maĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikdan ozod qilish haqidagi masalani hal etish uchun ish
		materiallarini ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5670376"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">313</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
		tartibda sudga yuboradi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5670129" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		moddaning<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5670127"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarlikni bir yil ichida takroran sodir etgan shaxs
		tomonlarning yarashuvi munosabati bilan maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan
		ozod qilinmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in"><span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">III
	BOB. MAĘĽMURIY JAZO VA MAJBURLOV CHORASI</span></p>
	<div id="-197901" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">22-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy jazoning maqsadi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197903" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		jazo javobgarlikka tortish chorasi boĘ»lib, u maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxsni qonunlarga rioya etish va ularni
		hurmat qilish ruhida tarbiyalash, shuningdek ana shu huquqbuzarning
		oĘ»zi tomonidan ham, boshqa shaxslar tomonidan ham yangi
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etilishining oldini olish maqsadida
		qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197904" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">23-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy jazoning turlari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042794" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etganlik uchun kuyidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo
		choralari qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin:</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042795" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
		maĘĽmuriy ogohlantirish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042796" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
		jarima;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042797" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli hisoblangan yoki
		bevosita shunday narsa boĘ»lgan ashyoni haqini toĘ»lash sharti
		bilan olib qoĘ»yish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042798" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli hisoblangan yoki
		bevosita shunday narsa boĘ»lgan ashyoni musodara qilish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042799" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
		muayyan shaxsni unga berilgan maxsus huquqdan (transport vositasini
		boshqarish huquqidan, ov qilish huquqidan) mahrum etish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042800" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
		haq toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlariga majburiy ravishda jalb etish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042801" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
		maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042802" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">8)
		chet el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib
		yuborish.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042805" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		modda birinchi qismining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-8042795"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">1,
		3 â€” 8-bandlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>sanab oĘ»tilgan
		maĘĽmuriy jazo choralari faqat OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi qonunlari
		bilan belgilanishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197914" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">24-modda.
		Asosiy va qoĘ»shimcha maĘĽmuriy jazo choralari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4024612" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ashyolarni
		ularning haqini toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yish, musodara
		qilish va maxsus huquqdan (transport vositasini boshqarish
		huquqidan) mahrum etish ham asosiy, ham qoĘ»shimcha maĘĽmuriy jazo
		tariqasida, ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197904"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">23-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
		tutilgan boshqa maĘĽmuriy jazo choralari esa faqat asosiy jazo
		tariqasida qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197916" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bitta
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun yo asosiy yoki ham asosiy, ham
		qoĘ»shimcha jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042862" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">24<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy ogohlantirish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042863" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		ogohlantirish maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llashga vakolatli organ
		(mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan
		shaxsni qonunga xilof xatti-harakatlarga yoĘ»l qoĘ»ymaslik
		toĘ»gĘ»risida ogohlantirgan holda unga rasmiy tanbeh berishdan
		iboratdir.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042864" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		ogohlantirish yozma (elektron) ravishda qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042865" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		ogohlantirish ushbu Kodeks 125-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034050"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5451220"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
		qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5754985"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5755039"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781003"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5451227"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">135</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>xamda
		138-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7180936"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200006"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
		qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarlikni sodir etgan shaxs oĘ»z qilmishidan chin koĘ»ngildan
		pushaymon boĘ»lganda, shuningdek ushbu Kodeksda nazarda tutilgan
		boshqa huquqbuzarliklar alomatlari mavjud boĘ»lmagan taqdirda,
		maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini koĘ»llashga vakolatli organ (mansabdor
		shaxs) tomonidan qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042866" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		ogohlantirish jazo chorasi ayni bir shaxsga nisbatan bir yil
		davomida bir martadan ortiq qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197917" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">25-modda.
		Jarima</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197918" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etishda aybdor shaxsdan davlat
		hisobiga pul undirishdir.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4653282" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarimaning
		miqdori maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan vaqtdagi, davom
		etayotgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun esa bu huquqbuzarlik
		aniqlangan vaqtdagi belgilab qoĘ»yilgan bazaviy hisoblash
		miqdoridan kelib chiqqan holda belgilanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4653289" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqarolarga
		solinadigan jarimaning eng kam miqdori bazaviy hisoblash
		miqdorining ellikdan bir qismidan, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
		oĘ»ndan bir qismidan kam boĘ»lmasligi kerak.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5190577" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqaro
		va xizmatchilarga solinadigan jarimaning eng koĘ»p miqdori bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
		oĘ»n baravaridan oshmasligi kerak. BaĘĽzi huquqbuzarliklar uchun
		bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining toĘ»rt yuz ellik baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solinishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197923" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">26-modda.
		Haqini toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197924" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli hisoblangan yoki bevosita
		shunday narsa boĘ»lgan ashyoni haqini toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib
		qoĘ»yish shu ashyoni majburiy tarzda tortib olib, uni keyinchalik
		sotib yuborish hamda sotishdan tushgan pulni ashyoning sobiq
		egasiga tortib olingan ashyoni sotish xarajatlarini chegirib
		tashlagan holda topshirishdan iboratdir.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6051400" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»qotar
		ov qurolini, pnevmatik ov qurolini hamda uning oĘ»q-dorilarini
		haqini toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yish asosiy tirikchilik
		manbai ovchilik boĘ»lgan shaxslarga nisbatan qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin
		emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5453101" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ashyoni
		haqini toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yish chorasini qoĘ»llanish
		tartibi va tortib olinadigan ashyolarning turlari ushbu Kodeks va
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining boshqa qonunchilik hujjatlari bilan
		belgilab qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197927" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">27-modda.
		Musodara qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5219770" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli boĘ»lgan ashyoni yoki maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlikning bevosita ashyosini musodara qilish mazkur ashyoni
		haq toĘ»lamasdan majburiy tarzda davlat mulkiga oĘ»tkazishdan
		iborat boĘ»lib, ushbu chora jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman
		(shahar) sudi tomonidan qoĘ»llaniladi. Huquqbuzarning shaxsiy mulki
		boĘ»lmagan ashyo musodara qilinishi mumkin emas, muomaladan
		chiqarilgan ashyolar bundan mustasno.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6051426" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»qotar
		ov qurolini, pnevmatik ov qurolini hamda uning oĘ»q-dorilarini,
		boshqa ov qurollarini musodara qilish asosiy tirikchilik manbai
		ovchilik boĘ»lgan shaxslarga nisbatan qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5453104" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Musodara
		qilish chorasini qoĘ»llanish tartibi ushbu Kodeks va OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasining boshqa qonunchilik hujjatlari bilan belgilab
		qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197931" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">28-modda.
		Maxsus huquqdan mahrum qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7395897" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
		shaxsni unga berilgan maxsus huquqdan (transport vositalarini
		boshqarish huquqidan, ov qilish huquqidan) mahrum qilish chorasi
		jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudi tomonidan uch
		yilgacha muddatga qoĘ»llaniladi. Bunday huquqdan mahrum qilish
		muddati oĘ»n besh kundan kam boĘ»lmasligi kerak, bundan ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400033"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">34</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
		tutilgan hollar mustasno.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7395903" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nogironligi
		sababli transport vositalaridan foydalanadigan shaxslarga nisbatan
		transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqidan mahrum qilish chorasi
		qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin emas, ushbu Kodeks 131-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1782173"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>, 136-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781428"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan hollar bundan mustasno.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197934" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Asosiy
		tirikchilik manbai ovchilik boĘ»lgan shaxslarga nisbatan ov qilish
		huquqidan mahrum etish chorasi qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6438035" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">28<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Haq toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlariga majburiy ravishda jalb etish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436630" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haq
		toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlariga majburiy ravishda jalb etish
		huquqbuzarni ijtimoiy foydali jamoat ishlarini bajarishga majburiy
		ravishda jalb etishdan iborat boĘ»lib, u sudlar tomonidan sakkiz
		soatdan ikki yuz qirq soatgacha boĘ»lgan muddatga tayinlanadi. Agar
		huquqbuzar oĘ»qiyotgan boĘ»lsa, jamoat ishlari oĘ»qishdan boĘ»sh
		vaqtda bajariladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436632" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzarlar
		haq toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlarini oĘ»tashi mumkin boĘ»lgan joylar
		(obyektlar) va haq toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlarining turlari mazkur
		jazoning ijrosini nazorat qiluvchi organlar â€” ichki ishlar
		organlarining probatsiya boĘ»linmalari tomonidan belgilanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436634" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haq
		toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlari pensiya yoshiga yetgan shaxslarga, oĘ»n
		sakkiz yoshga toĘ»lmagan shaxslarga, homilador ayollarga, uch
		yoshga toĘ»lmagan bolalari bor ayollarga, birinchi va ikkinchi
		guruh nogironligi boĘ»lgan shaxslarga, doimiy ishga ega shaxslarga,
		harbiy xizmatchilarga nisbatan qoĘ»llanilmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436636" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haq
		toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlariga jalb etiladigan shaxslar ish
		haqining ellik foizi aliment majburiyatlari boĘ»yicha qarzni
		toĘ»lashga yoĘ»naltiriladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436638" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzar
		jazoni oĘ»tashdan boĘ»yin tovlagan taqdirda, sud haq toĘ»lanadigan
		jamoat ishlarining oĘ»talmagan muddatini haq toĘ»lanadigan jamoat
		ishlarining toĘ»rt soati uchun maĘĽmuriy qamoqning bir kuniga teng
		jazo bilan yoxud haq toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlarining sakkiz soati
		uchun bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravariga teng jarima
		bilan almashtiradi. Bunda maĘĽmuriy qamoqning muddati oĘ»n besh
		sutkadan, jarimaning miqdori esa bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
		yigirma baravaridan oshmasligi kerak.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436640" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jazoni
		oĘ»tashdan boĘ»yin tovlanilgan vaqt jazoning oĘ»talgan muddatiga
		qoĘ»shib hisoblanmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197935" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">29-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5219875" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		qamoqqa olish uch sutkadan oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga,
		favqulodda holat tartibi sharoitida esa, jamoat tartibiga tajovuz
		qilganligi uchun â€” oĘ»ttiz sutkagacha muddatga qoĘ»llaniladi.
		MaĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar)
		sudi tomonidan, favqulodda holat tartibi sharoitida esa, shuningdek
		harbiy komendant yoki ichki ishlar organi boshligĘ»i tomonidan
		belgilanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6032270" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		qamoqqa olish chorasi homilador ayollarga, uch yoshgacha bolasi
		boĘ»lgan ayollarga, oĘ»n toĘ»rt yoshgacha boĘ»lgan bolasini yakka
		oĘ»zi tarbiyalayotgan shaxslarga, oĘ»n sakkiz yoshga toĘ»lmagan
		shaxslarga, birinchi va ikkinchi guruh nogironligi boĘ»lgan
		shaxslarga nisbatan qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2971184" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">29<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Chet el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib
		yuborish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5219903" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Chet
		el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib yuborish ularning
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasiga kirish huquqi keyinchalik bir yildan
		uch yilgacha muddatga cheklangan holda, majburiy yoki nazorat
		ostida mustaqil ravishda chiqib ketishidan iborat. MaĘĽmuriy tarzda
		chiqarib yuborish jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudi
		tomonidan qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5865880" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Chet
		el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib yuborish ushbu
		Kodeksning<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462486"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462581"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">8</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462587"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">9</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198068"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">56</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1630183"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">57</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1630195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">58-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
		61<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2735416"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199382"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">94</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1518167"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1066990"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">184</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">189</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2000610"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">189</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200683"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">201</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-947315"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">202</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
		224<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5865889"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5865904"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
		qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,
		225-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4585726"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">yettinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4585694"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">sakkizinchi
		qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2973620"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;239</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-339572"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">240</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-339594"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">241-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
		tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan taqdirda qoĘ»llanilishi
		mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436662" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tartibda chiqarib yuborish
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi fuqarosiga aliment toĘ»lash boĘ»yicha
		majburiyatlarga ega boĘ»lgan chet el fuqarolariga va fuqaroligi
		boĘ»lmagan shaxslarga nisbatan qoĘ»llanilmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4775721" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">29<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
		Karantinli va inson uchun xavfli boĘ»lgan boshqa yuqumli
		kasalliklar paydo boĘ»lishi hamda tarqalishi sharoitida tibbiy
		yoĘ»sindagi majburlov chorasini qoĘ»llash</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4775722" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Karantinli
		va inson uchun xavfli boĘ»lgan boshqa yuqumli kasalliklar paydo
		boĘ»lishi hamda tarqalishi sharoitida epidemiyalarga qarshi kurash
		qoidalarini buzishga oid huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxsga nisbatan
		tegishli tibbiy asoslar mavjud boĘ»lgan taqdirda davlat sanitariya
		nazorati organlari tomonidan karantinda saqlash yoki davolanish
		tarzidagi tibbiy yoĘ»sindagi majburlov chorasi qoĘ»llanilishi
		mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4775723" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tibbiy
		yoĘ»sindagi majburlov chorasi oĘ»ttiz sutkagacha boĘ»lgan muddatda
		maĘĽmuriy jazo tayinlash bilan birga qoĘ»llaniladi hamda davlat
		sanitariya nazorati organlari tomonidan belgilangan joylarda ijro
		etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4775724" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tibbiy
		yoĘ»sindagi majburlov chorasining ijrosi davlat sanitariya
		nazorati, ichki ishlar va OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Milliy
		gvardiyasi organlari tomonidan taĘĽminlanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197938" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">IV
		bob. MAĘĽMURIY JAZONING QOĘ»LLANILISHI</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197939" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">30-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilishining umumiy qoidalari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197940" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik uchun jazo ushbu Kodeks va boshqa normativ
		hujjatlarda belgilab qoĘ»yilgan doirada va tartibda qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197941" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jazoni
		qoĘ»llanish chogĘ»ida sodir etilgan huquqbuzarlik xususiyati,
		huquqbuzarning shaxsi, uning aybdorlik darajasi, mulkiy ahvoli,
		javobgarlikni yengillashtiruvchi va ogĘ»irlashtiruvchi holatlar
		hisobga olinadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197942" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">31-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlikni yengillashtiruvchi holatlar</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197943" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikni yengillashtiruvchi holatlar jumlasiga quyidagilar
		kiradi:</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197944" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
		aybdorning oĘ»z qilmishidan chin koĘ»ngildan pushaymon boĘ»lishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197945" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
		aybdorning huquqbuzarlikning zararli oqibatlari oldini olishi,
		yetkazilgan ziyonni ixtiyoriy ravishda toĘ»lashi yoki keltirilgan
		zararni bartaraf qilishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197946" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
		huquqbuzarlikning kuchli ruhiy hayajon taĘĽsiri ostida yoki ogĘ»ir
		shaxsiy, oilaviy yoxud boshqa sharoitlar yuzaga kelganligi
		oqibatida sodir etilishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197947" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
		huquqbuzarlikning tahdid yoki majburlov taĘĽsirida yoxud xizmat
		yuzasidan, moddiy yoki boshqa jihatdan qaramligi taĘĽsiri ostida
		sodir etilishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197948" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
		huquqbuzarlikning voyaga yetmagan shaxs tomonidan sodir etilishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197949" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
		huquqbuzarlikning homilador ayol yoki oĘ»n toĘ»rt yoshgacha boĘ»lgan
		bolasini yakka oĘ»zi tarbiyalayotgan shaxs tomonidan sodir
		etilishi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197950" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi organ
		(mansabdor shaxs) boshqa holatlarni ham javobgarlikni
		yengillashtiruvchi holat deb topishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197951" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">32-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlikni ogĘ»irlashtiruvchi holatlar</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197952" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		javobgarlikni ogĘ»irlashtiruvchi holatlar jumlasiga quyidagilar
		kiradi:</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197953" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
		gĘ»ayrihuquqiy harakatlarni toĘ»xtatish vakolati bor shaxslar
		tomonidan qoĘ»yilgan talabga qaramay, bunday harakatlarni davom
		ettirish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197954" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
		maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasiga tortilgan shaxsning bir yil mobaynida yana
		oĘ»sha xildagi huquqbuzarlikni sodir etishi, xuddi shuningdek
		huquqbuzarlikning ilgari sudlangan shaxs tomonidan sodir etilishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197955" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
		voyaga yetmagan shaxsni huquqbuzarlikka tortish;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197956" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
		huquqbuzarlikning bir guruh shaxslar tomonidan sodir etilishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197957" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
		huquqbuzarlikning tabiiy ofat sharoitida yoki boshqa favqulodda
		holatlarda sodir etilishi;</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7395906" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
		huquqbuzarlikning mastlik holatida yoki giyohvandlik vositalari,
		ularning analoglari, psixotrop yoki shaxsning aql-idrokiga taĘĽsir
		koĘ»rsatuvchi boshqa moddalar taĘĽsiri ostida sodir etilishi.
		MaĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llanuvchi organ (mansabdor shaxs)
		sodir etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikning xususiyatiga qarab mazkur
		holatni aybni ogĘ»irlashtiruvchi holat deb topmasligi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197959" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">33-modda.
		Yengilroq maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasining qoĘ»llanilishi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3540461" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
		maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llayotganda javobgarlikni
		yengillashtiruvchi holatlarni va huquqbuzarning moddiy ahvolini
		inobatga olgan holda sabablar va asoslarni albatta koĘ»rsatib,
		ushbu Kodeksning Maxsus&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">qismidagi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;moddalarning
		sanksiyasida nazarda tutilgan eng kam jazodan ham kamroq jazo yoki
		ushbu moddada nazarda tutilmagan boshqa yanada yengil jazo
		chorasini qoĘ»llashi mumkin. MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
		ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi boshqa organ (mansabdor shaxs)
		javobgarlikni yengillashtiruvchi holatlarni va huquqbuzarning
		moddiy ahvolini inobatga olgan holda, yengilroq maĘĽmuriy jazo
		chorasini qoĘ»llash toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masalani hal etish uchun ishni
		ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781536"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">308</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
		tartibda sudga yuboradi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197961" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">34-modda.
		Bir necha huquqbuzarlikni sodir etganlik uchun maĘĽmuriy jazo
		qoĘ»llanish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197962" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bitta
		shaxs ikki yoki undan ortiq maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan
		taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy jazo har bir huquqbuzarlik uchun
		alohida-alohida qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197963" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
