		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
		shaxs bir necha maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan boĘ»lib, shu
		haqdagi ishlar bir vaqtning oĘ»zida ayni bir organ (mansabdor
		shaxs) tomonidan koĘ»rib chiqilayotgan boĘ»lsa, bu shaxsga nisbatan
		qoĘ»llaniladigan uzil-kesil jazo ogĘ»irroq maĘĽmuriy jazoni nazarda
		tutuvchi sanksiya doirasida qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197964" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
		shaxs ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Maxsus
		qismidagi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>bir necha modda bilan
		maĘĽmuriy javobgarlik belgilangan va ular toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni
		har xil organ (mansabdor shaxs) koĘ»radigan harakat (harakatsizlik)
		sodir etgan boĘ»lsa, unga nisbatan jazo ogĘ»irroq maĘĽmuriy jazoni
		nazarda tutuvchi sanksiya doirasida qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-1345190" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
		shaxs ushbu Kodeksning Maxsus qismidagi tegishli modda bilan
		maĘĽmuriy javobgarlik nazarda tutilgan harakatni (harakatsizlikni)
		voyaga yetmagan shaxsni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etishga jalb
		qilgan holda (ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1345359"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">188</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasi</span></span></font></a>)
		sodir etgan boĘ»lsa, ish materiallari koĘ»rib chiqish uchun sudga
		topshiriladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-1345195" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197963"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197964"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1345190"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;qismlarida
		nazarda tutilgan hollarda asosiy jazoga sodir etilgan
		huquqbuzarliklardan istalgan bittasi uchun javobgarlik
		toĘ»gĘ»risidagi moddalarda nazarda tutilgan qoĘ»shimcha jazo
		choralaridan biri qoĘ»shilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7400033" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">34</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">1</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
		YoĘ»l harakati qoidabuzarliklari boĘ»yicha hisoblanadigan jarima
		ballari belgilangan miqdordan oshganligi uchun maĘĽmuriy jazo
		qoĘ»llanilishi</span></font></strong></span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7400036" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		Kodeksning 125-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1780243"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1294644"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi
		qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4356344"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">126-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
		127-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199929"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400359"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
		128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4356450"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1780991"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781003"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400488"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">8</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">,
		128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">9</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781377"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">129</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199952"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">130-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
		137-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5454909"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganligi uchun transport vositasining
		haydovchisiga nisbatan mazkur moddalarda nazarda tutilgan asosiy
		jazo bilan birga jarima ballari hisoblanadi. Bunda sodir etilgan
		har bir huquqbuzarlik uchun hisoblanadigan jarima balining eng
		yuqori miqdori ikki balldan oshmasligi kerak.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7400038" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
		ballari ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400036"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarliklardan biri birinchi marta sodir etilgan kundan
		eĘĽtiboran bir yil davomida hisoblab boriladi. Ushbu
		moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400036"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarliklar uchun hisoblangan jarima ballari bir yil oĘ»tgach
		transport vositasining haydovchisidan avtomatlashtirilgan tarzda
		yechiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7400039" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Hisoblangan
		jarima ballari bir yil davomida oĘ»n ikki balldan oshgan hollarda,
		oxirgi sodir etilgan huquqbuzarlik uchun ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197914"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">24&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197931"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">28-moddalariga</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;muvofiq
		qoĘ»shimcha jazo tariqasida haydovchi transport vositalarini
		boshqarish huquqidan mahrum qilinadi. Bunday huquqdan mahrum qilish
		muddati olti oydan kam boĘ»lmasligi kerak.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7400041" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l
		harakati qoidabuzarliklari boĘ»yicha hisoblanadigan jarima ballari
		belgilangan miqdordan oshganligi uchun maĘĽmuriy jazo jinoyat
		ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudi tomonidan qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7400043" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
		vositasining haydovchisiga nisbatan yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini
		buzganlik uchun jarima ballarini hisoblash tartibi OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi tomonidan belgilanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197966" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">35-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy qamoq va maxsus huquqdan mahrum etish muddatlarini
		hisoblash</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197967" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		qamoq muddati sutkalar bilan, maxsus huquqdan mahrum etish muddati
		esa â€” kunlar, oylar, yillar bilan hisoblanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197968" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">36-modda.
		MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish muddatlari</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2727390" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		jazo huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan kundan boshlab, davom etayotgan
		huquqbuzarliklar uchun esa, huquqbuzarlik aniqlangan kundan boshlab
		bir yildan kechiktirmay qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3540472" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jinoyat
		ishini qoĘ»zgĘ»atish rad etilgan yoki jinoyat ishi tugatilgan
		boĘ»lsa-yu, lekin huquqbuzarning harakatlarida maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik alomatlari mavjud boĘ»lsa, maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi
		jinoyat ishi qoĘ»zgĘ»atishni rad etish yoki jinoyat ishini tugatish
		toĘ»gĘ»risida, agar ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2727390"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan muddatlar
		oĘ»tmagan boĘ»lsa, qaror qabul qilingan kundan eĘĽtiboran bir oydan
		kechiktirmay qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8042873" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l
		harakati qoidalari buzilganligi maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto va
		video qayd etish texnika vositalari orqali qayd etilgan hollarda
		maĘĽmuriy jazo huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran bir
		oydan kechiktirmay, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
		qaror ustidan shikoyat qilinganda esa huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan
		kundan eĘĽtiboran bir yildan kechiktirmay qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451017" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		moddada nazarda tutilgan muddatlar ashyolarni bojxona
		munosabatlarini tartibga soladigan qonunchilik asosida musodara
		qilish hollariga nisbatan tatbiq etilmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197972" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">37-modda.
		Tugaganidan soĘ»ng shaxs maĘĽmuriy jazoga tortilmagan deb
		hisoblanadigan muddat</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197973" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
		maĘĽmuriy jazoga tortilgan shaxs shu jazoni oĘ»tash muddati tugagan
		kundan boshlab bir yil mobaynida yangi maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
		sodir etmagan boĘ»lsa, mazkur shaxs maĘĽmuriy jazoga tortilmagan
		deb hisoblanadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197974" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">38-modda.
		Yetkazilgan zararni qoplash majburiyatini yuklash</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197975" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik oqibatida
		keltirilgan zararni qoplashi shart.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5219927" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
		maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etish oqibatida jismoniy shaxsga,
		korxona, muassasa, tashkilotga, fuqarolarning oĘ»zini oĘ»zi
		boshqarish organi yoki davlatga yetkazilgan mulkiy zarar belgilab
		qoĘ»yilgan bazaviy hisoblash miqdoridan koĘ»p boĘ»lmasa, organ
		(mansabdor shaxs) jazo qoĘ»llanish paytida aybdor bu zararni
		qoplashi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masalani ham hal etishga haqlidir, jinoyat
		ishlari boĘ»yicha sud esa â€” bu masalani yetkazilgan zarar
		miqdoridan qatĘĽi nazar hal qilaveradi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197977" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Boshqa
		hollarda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik natijasida yetkazilgan mulkiy
		zararni qoplash fuqarolik-huquqiy tartibida hal qilinadi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197978" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">39-modda.
		Bajarilmaganligi uchun maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilgan vazifani ijro
		etish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197979" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
		jazoni qoĘ»llanish maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxsni
		bajarilmaganligi uchun maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilgan vazifani
		bajarishdan ozod etmaydi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197980" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MAXSUS
		QISM</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197981" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">V
		bob. FUQAROLARNING HUQUQ VA ERKINLIKLARIGA TAJOVUZ QILADIGAN
		HUQUQBUZARLIKLAR UCHUN MAĘĽMURIY JAVOBGARLIK</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197982" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">40-modda.
		Tuhmat</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197984" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tuhmat,
		yaĘĽni bila turib yolgĘ»on, boshqa bir shaxsni sharmanda qiluvchi
		uydirmalarni tarqatish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma
		baravaridan oltmish baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
		boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197986" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">41-modda.
		Haqorat qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197988" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haqorat
		qilish, yaĘĽni shaxsning shaĘĽni va qadr-qimmatini qasddan
		kamsitish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravaridan qirq
		baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436681" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">41<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Shahvoniy shilqimlik qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436688" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shahvoniy
		shilqimlik qilish, yaĘĽni shaxsga nisbatan uning uchun nomaqbul
		boĘ»lgan hamda uning shaĘĽni va qadr-qimmatini tahqirlaydigan,
		shaxsning tashqi qiyofasini yoki qaddi-qomatini tavsiflashda,
		imo-ishora qilishda, teginishda, chaqirishda ifodalangan, shahvoniy
		xususiyatga ega boĘ»lgan harakatlarni bir marta qoĘ»pol ravishda
		yoki bir necha marta sodir etish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
		ikki baravaridan besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoki
		besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6436695" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
		shunday huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
		keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan yetti baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy
		qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451025" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">42-modda.
		Davlat tili toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197992" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqarolarning
		tarbiya va taĘĽlim berishda tilni erkin tanlashdan iborat
		huquqlarini buzish, tildan foydalanishda toĘ»sqinlik qilish va
		cheklash, davlat tilini, shuningdek OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasida
		yashovchi boshqa millatlar va elatlarning tillarini mensimaslik
		â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan ikki baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451032" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">43-modda.
		Jismoniy va yuridik shaxslarning murojaatlari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
		qonunchilikni buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451035" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jismoniy
		va yuridik shaxslarning murojaatlarini qabul qilish va koĘ»rib
		chiqishni qonunga xilof ravishda rad etish, ularni koĘ»rib chiqish
		muddatlarini uzrli sabablarsiz buzish, yozma yoxud elektron shaklda
		javob yubormaslik, jismoniy va yuridik shaxslarning murojaatlari
		toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikka zid qaror qabul qilish, jismoniy va
		yuridik shaxslarning buzilgan huquqlari tiklanishini, murojaat
		munosabati bilan qabul qilingan qarorning bajarilishini
		taĘĽminlamaganlik â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash
		miqdorining bir baravaridan uch baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
		solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-197998" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">44-modda.
		Hujjatlar bilan tanishib chiqishni asossiz ravishda rad etish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198000" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqaroga
		uning huquq va manfaatlariga daxldor boĘ»lgan hujjatlar, qarorlar
		va boshqa materiallar bilan tanishib chiqish imkoniyatini berishni
		asossiz ravishda rad etish â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan ikki baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198002" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">45-modda.
		Fuqarolarning turar joyi daxlsizligini buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198004" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Turar
		joyga unda istiqomat qiluvchilarning xohish-irodasiga xilof
		ravishda noqonuniy tarzda kirish, mansabdor boĘ»lmagan shaxs
		tomonidan sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
		uchdan bir qismidan bir baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga
		sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198006" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">46-modda.
		Fuqaroga maĘĽnaviy yoki moddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin boĘ»lgan
		maĘĽlumotlarni oshkor etish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3034014" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tibbiy
		yoki tijorat sirlarini, yozishma va boshqa xabarlar, notarial
		harakatlar, bank operatsiyalari va jamgĘ»armalar sirlarini, xuddi
		shuningdek fuqaroga, uning huquqlari, erkinliklari va qonuniy
		manfaatlariga maĘĽnaviy yoxud moddiy zarar yetkazishi mumkin
		boĘ»lgan boshqa maĘĽlumotlarni oshkor etish, basharti ushbu
		Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034017"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">46</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
		tutilgan huquqbuzarlik alomatlari mavjud boĘ»lmasa, â€”fuqarolarga
		bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikkidan bir qismidan ikki
		baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” ikki baravaridan besh
		baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3034018" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">46<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Shaxsiy hayot daxlsizligini buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3034020" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shaxsning
		shaxsiy yoki oilaviy sirini tashkil etuvchi shaxsiy hayoti
		toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlarni uning roziligisiz qonunga xilof
		ravishda yigĘ»ish yoki tarqatish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
		oĘ»n baravaridan qirq baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
		boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451055" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">46<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
		Shaxsga doir maĘĽlumotlar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5840926" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shaxsga
		doir maĘĽlumotlarni qonunga xilof ravishda yigĘ»ish,
		tizimlashtirish, saqlash, oĘ»zgartirish, toĘ»ldirish, ulardan
		foydalanish, ularni berish, tarqatish, uzatish, egasizlantirish va
		yoĘ»q qilish, xuddi shuningdek axborot texnologiyalaridan
		foydalangan holda, shu jumladan Internet jahon axborot tarmogĘ»ida
		OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi fuqarolarining shaxsga doir
		maĘĽlumotlariga ishlov berilayotganda jisman OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi hududida joylashgan texnik vositalarda hamda Shaxsga
		doir maĘĽlumotlar bazalarining davlat reyestrida belgilangan
		tartibda roĘ»yxatdan oĘ»tkazilgan shaxsga doir maĘĽlumotlar
		bazalarida shaxsga doir maĘĽlumotlarni yigĘ»ishga,
		tizimlashtirishga va saqlashga oid talablarga rioya etmaslik,
		â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravari,
		mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” ellik baravari miqdorida jarima
		solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-8015899" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">SunĘĽiy
		intellekt texnologiyalaridan foydalangan xolda shaxsga doir
		maĘĽlumotlarga qonunga xilof ravishda ishlov berish, ularni ommaviy
		axborot vositalarida, telekommunikatsiya tarmoqlarida yoki Internet
		jahon axborot tarmogĘ»ida tarqatish, â€”maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni
		sodir etish qurollarini musodara qilib, bazaviy hisoblash
		miqdorining ellik baravaridan yuz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
		solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198010" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47-modda.
		Bolalarni tarbiyalash va ularga taĘĽlim berish borasidagi
		majburiyatlarni bajarmaslik</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198012" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ota-onalar
		yoki ularning oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxslar tomonidan voyaga yetmagan
		bolalarni tarbiyalash va ularga taĘĽlim berish borasidagi
		majburiyatlarni bajarmaslik, shu jumladan voyaga yetmagan
		bolalarning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etishiga olib kelishi
		â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan besh baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500218" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
		shunday huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
		keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7403203" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ota-onalar
		yoki ularning oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxslar tomonidan oĘ»z bolasini
		qonunga xilof ravishda diniy taĘĽlim olishga jalb etish, â€”bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7403208" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7403203"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
		yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
		miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy
		qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2258068" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bolalarning
		majburiy umumiy oĘ»rta taĘĽlim, oĘ»rta maxsus, kasb-hunar taĘĽlimi
		olishiga ota-onalar yoki ularning oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxslar
		tomonidan toĘ»sqinlik qilish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
		baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
		boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-7403221" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2258068"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
		yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
		miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma besh baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga
		maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-1345253" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Ota-ona qaramogĘ»idan mahrum boĘ»lgan bolalar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
		maĘĽlumotlarni vasiylik va homiylik organiga xabar qilmaslik</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-1345258" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ota-ona
		qaramogĘ»idan mahrum boĘ»lgan bolalar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlarni
		shunday bolalar turgan muassasa rahbari yoki fuqarolarning oĘ»zini
		oĘ»zi boshqarish organi mansabdor shaxsi tomonidan vasiylik va
		homiylik organiga xabar qilmaslik, xuddi shuningdek ular tomonidan
		ota-ona qaramogĘ»idan mahrum boĘ»lgan bolalar haqida atayin
		notoĘ»gĘ»ri maĘĽlumotlar berish â€”mansabdor shaxsga bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan yetti baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451062" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
		Ota-ona qaramogĘ»idan mahrum boĘ»lgan bolalarni joylashtirishda
		qonunchilik talablarini buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451066" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ota-ona
		qaramogĘ»idan mahrum boĘ»lgan bolalarni oilaga tarbiyaga
		(patronat), farzandlikka berishda, ularga vasiylik (homiylik)
		belgilashda yoxud ularni yetim bolalar yoki ota-ona qaramogĘ»idan
		mahrum boĘ»lgan bolalar uchun tayinlangan tegishli davlat
		muassasasiga joylashtirishda qonunchilik talablarini buzish
		â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravaridan besh
		baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” uch baravaridan yetti
		baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6651483" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
		Nikoh yoshi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni yoki nikoh tuzish
		tartibini buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2162395" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nikoh
		yoshiga yetmagan shaxs bilan haqiqatda nikoh munosabatlariga
		kirishish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n
		baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-2162397" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ota-ona
		yoki ularning oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxslar tomonidan nikoh yoshiga
		yetmagan shaxsni erga berish yoxud uylantirish, â€”bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6651567" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nikohi
		qonunda belgilangan tartibda qayd etilmagan shaxslar oĘ»rtasida,
		shu jumladan nikoh yoshiga yetmagan shaxs bilan nikoh tuzishga doir
		diniy marosimni amalga oshirish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
		oĘ»n besh baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
		solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500250" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.
		Voyaga yetmagan yoki mehnatga layoqatsiz shaxslarni moddiy
		taĘĽminlashdan boĘ»yin tovlash</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500253" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Moddiy
		yordamga muhtoj boĘ»lgan voyaga yetmagan yoki mehnatga layoqatsiz
		shaxsni moddiy taĘĽminlashdan boĘ»yin tovlash, yaĘĽni ularni moddiy
		jihatdan taĘĽminlash uchun sudning hal qiluv qaroriga yoki sud
		buyrugĘ»iga binoan undirilishi lozim boĘ»lgan mablagĘ»ni jami
		boĘ»lib ikki oydan ortiq muddat mobaynida toĘ»lamaslik, â€”oĘ»n
		besh sutka muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga yoki bir yuz yigirma
		soatgacha haq toĘ»lanadigan jamoat ishlariga majburiy ravishda jalb
		etishga yoxud ushbu Kodeksga muvofiq maĘĽmuriy jazolarning mazkur
		turlari qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin boĘ»lmagan shaxslarga bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
		sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500259" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
		marta huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs, agar u maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rish jarayonida aliment
		majburiyatlari boĘ»yicha qarzdorlikni ixtiyoriy ravishda toĘ»lagan
		boĘ»lsa, javobgarlikdan ozod etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500261" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">5</font>-modda.
		Ota-onani moddiy taĘĽminlashdan boĘ»yin tovlash</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500265" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Voyaga
		yetgan shaxslarning mehnatga layoqatsiz va moddiy yordamga muhtoj
		boĘ»lgan ota-onani yoki ularning oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxslarni
		moddiy taĘĽminlashdan boĘ»yin tovlashi, yaĘĽni ularni moddiy
		jihatdan taĘĽminlash uchun sudning hal qiluv qaroriga binoan
		undirilishi lozim boĘ»lgan mablagĘ»ni jami boĘ»lib ikki oydan ortiq
		muddat mobaynida toĘ»lamaslik, â€”oĘ»n besh sutka muddatga maĘĽmuriy
		qamoqqa olishga yoki bir yuz yigirma soatgacha haq toĘ»lanadigan
		jamoat ishlariga majburiy ravishda jalb etishga yoxud ushbu
		Kodeksga muvofiq maĘĽmuriy jazolarning mazkur turlari qoĘ»llanilishi
		mumkin boĘ»lmagan shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma
		baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-3500273" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
		marta huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs, agar u maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rish jarayonida aliment
		majburiyatlari boĘ»yicha qarzdorlikni ixtiyoriy ravishda toĘ»lagan
		boĘ»lsa, javobgarlikdan ozod etiladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6414079" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">6</font>-modda.
		Bolani chet davlat hududida nazoratsiz qoldirish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6414081" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
		Respublikasi fuqaroligiga ega boĘ»lgan bolani ota, ona yoki
		ularning oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxs yoxud hamrohlik qiluvchi shaxs
		tomonidan chet davlat hududida nazoratsiz qoldirish, â€”</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6414082" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan ellik baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6414083" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bolaning
		chet davlat hududida nazoratsiz qoldirilganligi haqidagi maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqishda koĘ»pi bilan
		oĘ»ttiz kunlik muddat belgilagan holda sud mazkur maĘĽmuriy
		huquqbuzarlikni sodir etgan shaxsning zimmasiga bolani chet davlat
		hududidan OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasiga qaytarish yoxud
		huquqbuzarlikni bartaraf etish boĘ»yicha choralar koĘ»rish
		majburiyatini yuklatadi. Otaning, onaning yoki ular oĘ»rnini
		bosuvchi shaxsning yoxud hamrohlik qiluvchi shaxsning
		iltimosnomasiga koĘ»ra mazkur muddat yana oĘ»ttiz kunga
		uzaytirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6437190" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">7</font>-modda.
		Ota-onaning oĘ»z voyaga yetmagan bolalariga vasiy yoki homiy
		tayinlash boĘ»yicha majburiyatlarini bajarmasligi</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6437196" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ota-ona
		yashash joyida vaqtincha boĘ»lmaganda yoxud ular oĘ»z ota-onalik
		majburiyatlarini bajara olmaydigan davr uchun voyaga yetmagan
		bolalariga vasiy yoki homiy tayinlash boĘ»yicha majburiyatlarini
		bajarmasligi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan besh
		baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6437201" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
		shunday huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
		keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6651576" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">47<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">8</font>-modda.
		Ikki yoki undan ortiq xotin bilan er-xotin boĘ»lib yashashni
		targĘ»ib qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-6651578" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ikki
		yoki undan ortiq xotin bilan er-xotin boĘ»lib yashashni targĘ»ib
		qilish, ushbu mazmundagi qarashlarni, gĘ»oyalarni yoki
		chaqiriqlarni tarqatish, shuningdek bunday xatti-harakatlarni
		ragĘ»batlantirish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh
		baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n
		besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198014" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">48-modda.
		Vasiylik huquqini suiisteĘĽmol qilish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-198016" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Vasiylikka
		olinganning zarariga gĘ»arazli maqsadlarni koĘ»zlab vasiylikdan
		yoki homiylikdan foydalanish yoki uni nazoratsiz va zarur moddiy
		yordamsiz qoldirish â€”</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4656422" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravaridan besh baravarigacha miqdorda
		jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451089" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">49-modda.
		Mehnat va mehnatni muhofaza qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni
		buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451092" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mansabdor
		shaxs tomonidan mehnat va mehnatni muhofaza qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
		qonunchilikni buzish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
		baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
		boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497087" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
		shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
		keyin bir yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, bundan bila
		turib gĘ»ayriqonuniy ishdan boĘ»shatish mustasno, â€”</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4656789" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497093" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
		moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4497083"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
		qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
		huquqbuzarlikni voyaga yetmagan shaxsga nisbatan sodir etish,
		â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma
		baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497126" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">49<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
		Voyaga yetmagan shaxslarning mehnatidan foydalanishga yoĘ»l
		qoĘ»yilmasligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi talablarni buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497130" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Voyaga
		yetmagan shaxs mehnatidan uning sogĘ»ligĘ»iga, xavfsizligiga yoki
		axloq-odobiga ziyon yetkazishi mumkin boĘ»lgan ishlarda
		foydalanish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan
		yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451096" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">49<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
		Ish beruvchining fuqarolik javobgarligini majburiy sugĘ»urta qilish
		toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik talablarini bajarmaslik</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451099" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ish
		beruvchining fuqarolik javobgarligini majburiy sugĘ»urta qilish
		toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik talablarini bajarmaslik, â€”fuqarolarga
		bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha,
		mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
		baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497177" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
		shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
		keyin bir yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
		bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
		baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan
		oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497181" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">49<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
		Vaqtincha mehnatga qobiliyatsizlik, homiladorlik va tugĘ»ish
		nafaqalarini toĘ»lash boĘ»yicha majburiyatdan boĘ»yin tovlash</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451170" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Vaqtincha
		mehnatga qobiliyatsizlik, homiladorlik va tugĘ»ish nafaqalarini
		qonunchilikda belgilangan miqdorlarda toĘ»lash boĘ»yicha
		majburiyatdan boĘ»yin tovlash, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
		baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
		boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497187" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
		shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
		keyin bir yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
		hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497196" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">49<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.
		Xorijiy ishchi kuchini OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasiga jalb qilish va
		undan foydalanish tartibini buzish</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497199" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xorijiy
		ishchi kuchini OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasiga jalb qilish va undan
		foydalanish tartibini buzish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
		miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor
		shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma besh baravarigacha
		miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-4497204" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
		shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
		keyin bir yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
		bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
		baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yigirma besh
		baravaridan ellik baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
		boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
	</div>
	<div id="-5451174" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in"><a name="-5451174"></a>
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">50-modda.
		Aholini ish bilan taĘĽminlash toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzish</span></p>
		<div id="-7984568" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xalq
			deputatlari tuman (shahar) Kengashlarining davlat qoĘ»shimcha
			kafolatlarni taĘĽminlaydigan shaxslarni ishga joylashtirish uchun
			ish oĘ»rinlarining eng kam sonini yaratishga doir qarorlarini
			bajarmaslik, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4497232" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mahalliy
			mehnat organlari tomonidan korxonalar, muassasalar va
			tashkilotlarga ishga yuborilgan shaxslarni ishga qabul qilishni
			boĘ»sh ish oĘ»rinlari (vakant lavozimlar) mavjud boĘ»lgani holda
			asossiz ravishda rad etish, shuningdek ish oĘ»rinlarining
			belgilangan eng kam soni hisobidan ish oĘ»rinlariga ishga
			joylashtirishni asossiz ravishda rad etish, xuddi shuningdek avval
			talabnoma berilgan, kasbga tayyorlashga, qayta tayyorlashga va
			malakasini oshirishga yuborilgan shaxslarni ishga qabul qilishni
			asossiz ravishda rad etish, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4497236" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4497227"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4497232"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklarni maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin
			bir yil davomida takroran sodir etish, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravaridan oĘ»ttiz
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5451178" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">50<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Xususiy bandlik agentliklari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5451181" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mansabdor
			shaxs tomonidan xususiy bandlik agentliklari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qonunchilikni buzish, â€”</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4718572" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7844399" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xususiy
			bandlik agentliklarining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan oĘ»z
			faoliyati haqidagi maĘĽlumotlarni OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Migratsiya agentligiga taqdim
			etmaslik, xuddi shuningdek maĘĽlumotlarni buzib koĘ»rsatish yoki
			maĘĽlumotlarni taqdim etish muddatlarini buzish, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4718582" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4718568"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4718574"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir yil
			davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4718583" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma besh baravaridan oĘ»ttiz
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4718586" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51-modda.
			Mehnatga maĘĽmuriy tarzda majburlash</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4718588" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mehnatga
			biron-bir shaklda maĘĽmuriy tarzda majburlash, bundan qonunda
			nazarda tutilgan hollar mustasno, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			ellik baravaridan yuz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6419411" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik taĘĽlim tashkilotining pedagog xodimiga
			nisbatan sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			yuz baravaridan bir yuz ellik baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6032277" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Nogironligi boĘ»lgan shaxslarning huquqlari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qonunchilikni buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6032284" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nogironligi
			boĘ»lgan shaxslarga binolardan, inshootlardan, transportdan,
			axborotdan va aloqa vositalaridan, shu jumladan
			axborot-kommunikatsiya texnologiyalari va tizimlaridan moneliksiz
			foydalanish uchun shart-sharoitlar yaratish, shuningdek
			mehmonxonalarning mulkdorlari tomonidan umumiy xonalar fondining
			kamida bitta xonasini oĘ»rindiqli aravachadan foydalanadigan
			nogironligi boĘ»lgan shaxslar uchun qulay tarzda jihozlash
			boĘ»yicha talablarni bajarmaganlik, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2259415" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”mansabdor
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan
			oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462484" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">V<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>&nbsp;bob.
			SAYLOV VA REFERENDUMNI TASHKIL ETISH HAMDA OĘ»TKAZISH SOHASIDAGI
			HUQUQBUZARLIKLAR UCHUN MAĘĽMURIY JAVOBGARLIK</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462486" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Markaziy saylov komissiyasining, saylov
			komissiyalarining, referendum oĘ»tkazuvchi komissiyalarning
			faoliyatiga aralashish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462489" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Markaziy saylov komissiyasining, saylov
			komissiyalarining, referendum oĘ»tkazuvchi komissiyalarning
			faoliyatiga aralashish, xuddi shuningdek ularning ishiga
			toĘ»siqlarni yuzaga keltirish, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462493" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Markaziy saylov komissiyasining, saylov
			komissiyalarining, referendum oĘ»tkazuvchi komissiyalarning
			qarorlarini ijro etmaslik</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462497" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Markaziy saylov komissiyasining, saylov
			komissiyalarining, referendum oĘ»tkazuvchi komissiyalarning
			qarorlarini ijro etmaslik, xuddi shuningdek ularning
			murojaatlarini koĘ»rib chiqishni gĘ»ayrihuquqiy ravishda rad
			etish, ularni koĘ»rib chiqish muddatlarini uzrli sabablarsiz
			buzish, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch
			baravaridan yetti baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462503" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.
			Nomzodning, ishonchli vakilning, kuzatuvchining yoki siyosiy
			partiya vakolatli vakilining huquqlarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462508" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nomzodning,
			ishonchli vakilning, kuzatuvchining yoki siyosiy partiya vakolatli
			vakilining huquqlarini buzish, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462511" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">5</font>-modda.
			Saylovoldi tashviqotini, referendumga qoĘ»yilgan masalalar
			yuzasidan tashviqot olib borish shartlari va tartibini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462513" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Saylovoldi
			tashviqotini, referendumga qoĘ»yilgan masalalar yuzasidan
			tashviqot olib borish shartlari va tartibini nomzod, ishonchli
			vakil, siyosiy partiya vakili, mansabdor shaxs tomonidan buzish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462519" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">6</font>-modda.
			Nomzodlar, siyosiy partiyalar toĘ»gĘ»risida yolgĘ»on maĘĽlumotlarni
			tarqatish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462521" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Saylov
			natijalariga taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish maqsadida nomzod, siyosiy partiya
			toĘ»gĘ»risida ataylab yolgĘ»on maĘĽlumotlarni eĘĽlon qilish yoki
			boshqa usullar orqali tarqatish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining uch baravaridan besh baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462576" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">7</font>-modda.
			Saylovga yoki referendumga tayyorgarlik koĘ»rish va saylov yoki
			referendum oĘ»tkazish jarayonida axborot hamda tashviqot
			materiallarini qasddan yoĘ»q qilib yuborish yoki ularga qasddan
			shikast yetkazish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462579" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Binolarga,
			inshootlarga yoki boshqa joylarga joylashtirilgan axborot,
			tashviqot materiallarini saylovga yoki referendumga tayyorgarlik
			koĘ»rish va saylov yoki referendum oĘ»tkazish jarayonida qasddan
			yoĘ»q qilib yuborish yoki ularga qasddan shikast yetkazish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan yetti
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462581" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">8</font>-modda.
			Saylovni yoki referendumni moliyalashtirish tartibini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462584" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Saylovni
			yoki referendumni moliyalashtirish tartibini buzish, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462587" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">51<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">9</font>-modda.
			Jamoatchilik fikri soĘ»rovlari natijalarini, saylov yoki
			referendum natijalari taxminlarini chop etish (eĘĽlon qilish)
			tartibini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2462592" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jamoatchilik
			fikri soĘ»rovlari natijalarini, saylov yoki referendum natijalari
			taxminlarini, shuningdek saylov yoki referendum bilan bogĘ»liq
			boshqa tadqiqotlarni chop etish (eĘĽlon qilish) tartibini buzish,
			â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh
			baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7092752" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">51</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">10</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Saylov (ovoz berish) byulletenlarini berish tartibini buzish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7092754" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Saylov
			komissiyasi yoki referendum oĘ»tkazuvchi komissiya aĘĽzosi
			tomonidan fuqarolarga bir necha marta yoki boshqa shaxslar nomidan
			ovoz berish uchun saylov (ovoz berish) byulletenlarini berish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7092756" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">51</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">11</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.&nbsp;</span></font></strong>Saylovda
			ishtirok etish uchun ajratilgan davlat mablagĘ»lari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			moliyaviy hisobotlarni taqdim etish tartibini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7092758" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Saylovda
			ishtirok etish uchun ajratilgan davlat mablagĘ»lari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			oraliq yoki yakuniy hisobotni siyosiy partiya tomonidan
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Markaziy saylov komissiyasiga taqdim
			etmaslik yoki oĘ»z vaqtida taqdim etmaslik yoxud hisobotda bila
			turib notoĘ»gĘ»ri maĘĽlumotlarni taqdim etish, â€”mansabdor
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198030" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">VI
			bob. AHOLI SOGĘ»LIGĘ»INI SAQLASH SOHASIDAGI HUQUQBUZARLIKLAR UCHUN
			MAĘĽMURIY JAVOBGARLIK</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198031" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">52-modda.
			Yengil tan jarohati yetkazish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198033" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ehtiyotsizlik
			orqasida yengil tan jarohati yetkazish â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining bir baravaridan ikki baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437216" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qasddan
			yengil tan jarohati yetkazish, bu harakat sogĘ»liqning qisqa
			muddat yomonlashuviga yoki mehnat qobiliyatini uncha koĘ»p davom
			etmaydigan turgĘ»un tarzda yoĘ»qotishga olib kelmagan boĘ»lsa,
			basharti ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6437241"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">59</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarlik alomatlari mavjud boĘ»lmasa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravaridan toĘ»rt baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144681" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6437216"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining besh baravaridan yigirma besh baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5451189" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">53-modda.
			Sanitariya qonunchiligini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5451193" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sanitariya
			qonunchilikni, sanitariya normalarini, qoidalarini va gigiyena
			normativlarini buzish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4775812" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">54-modda.
			Epidemiyalarga qarshi kurash qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4775814" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Karantinli
			va inson uchun xavfli boĘ»lgan boshqa yuqumli kasalliklar paydo
			boĘ»lishi hamda tarqalishi sharoitida vakolatli organning maxsus
			talablariga zid ravishda jamoat joylarida niqobsiz boĘ»lish
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4775816" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Karantinli
			va inson uchun xavfli boĘ»lgan boshqa yuqumli kasalliklar paydo
			boĘ»lishining yoki tarqalishining oldini olish maqsadida
			belgilangan majburiy qoidalarni buzish, shu jumladan karantinli va
			inson uchun xavfli boĘ»lgan boshqa yuqumli kasalliklar paydo
			boĘ»lishi hamda tarqalishi sharoitida shifoxonadagi ichki tartibga
			rioya etmaslik, davlat sanitariya nazorati organlarining tibbiy
			tekshiruvdan oĘ»tish va davolanish, karantinni oĘ»tash uchun
			belgilangan joylarga yetib borish va ushbu joylarni belgilangan
			muddat davomida tark etmaslik, kasallik yuqish xavfi mavjud
			boĘ»lgan davrda muloqotda boĘ»lingan shaxslar va borilgan joylar
			haqidagi maĘĽlumotlarni oshkor qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi yoki boshqa
			qonuniy talablarini uzrli sabablarsiz bajarmaslik, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravari, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»ttiz baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198063" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">55-modda.
			Radiatsion xavfsizlikka doir qoidalar, normalar, yoĘ»riqnomalar va
			boshqa talablarni buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198066" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Radiatsion
			xavfsizlikka doir qoidalar, normalar, yoĘ»riqnomalar va boshqa
			talablarni buzish â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining uch baravaridan besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4024706" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">56-modda.
			Giyohvandlik vositalarini, ularning analoglarini yoki psixotrop
			moddalarni oz miqdorda gĘ»ayriqonuniy ravishda tayyorlash, olish,
			saqlash, tashish yoki joĘ»natish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4024712" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Giyohvandlik
			vositalarini, ularning analoglarini yoki psixotrop moddalarni
			oĘ»tkazish maqsadini koĘ»zlamay oz miqdorda gĘ»ayriqonuniy
			ravishda tayyorlash, olish, saqlash, tashish yoki joĘ»natish
			â€”giyohvandlik vositalarini, ularning analoglarini yoki psixotrop
			moddalarni musodara qilib, bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir
			baravaridan ikki baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoxud
			giyohvandlik vositalarini, ularning analoglarini yoki psixotrop
			moddalarni musodara qilib, oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy
			qamoq jazosiga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2857226" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">56<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Jamoat joylarida tamaki mahsulotini isteĘĽmol qilish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7632862" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ish
			joylarida, sogĘ»liqni saqlash, taĘĽlim, sport-sogĘ»lomlashtirish
			muassasalarida, yongĘ»in chiqish xavfi boĘ»lgan joylarda,
			avtomobillarga yoqilgĘ»i quyish shoxobchalarida va boshqa jamoat
			joylarida, shu jumladan jamoat transportida tamaki mahsulotini
			isteĘĽmol qilish, bundan tamaki mahsulotini isteĘĽmol qilish uchun
			maxsus ajratilgan joylar va (yoki) xonalar mustasno, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uchdan bir qismi miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7632865" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Havo
			kemalarida tamaki mahsulotini isteĘĽmol qilish, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144554" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">56</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">2</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Giyohvandlik vositalari, ularning analoglari yoki psixotrop
			moddalar hisoblanmaydigan kuchli taĘĽsir qiluvchi moddalarni
			targĘ»ib qiluvchi mahsulotni tayyorlash, tarqatish, reklama
			qilish, namoyish etish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144556" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Giyohvandlik
			vositalari, ularning analoglari yoki psixotrop moddalar
			hisoblanmaydigan kuchli taĘĽsir qiluvchi moddalarni targĘ»ib
			qiluvchi mahsulotni tarqatish, reklama qilish, namoyish etish
			maqsadida tayyorlash, xuddi shuningdek ularni tarqatish, reklama
			qilish, namoyish etish, shu jumladan ommaviy axborot vositalarida,
			telekommunikatsiya tarmoqlarida yoki Internet jahon axborot
			tarmogĘ»ida tarqatish, reklama qilish, namoyish etish,
			â€”huquqbuzarlik ashyolarini musodara qilib, fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yuz baravaridan bir yuz ellik baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” bir yuz ellik baravaridan ikki yuz
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoxud huquqbuzarlik
			ashyolarini musodara qilib, oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144561" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">56</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">3</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Giyohvandlik vositalari, ularning analoglari yoki psixotrop
			moddalar hisoblanmaydigan alohida toifadagi kuchli taĘĽsir
			qiluvchi moddalarni oĘ»tkazish maqsadini koĘ»zlamay qonunga xilof
			ravishda tayyorlash, olish, saqlash, tashish yoki joĘ»natish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144563" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Giyohvandlik
			vositalari, ularning analoglari yoki psixotrop moddalar
			hisoblanmaydigan alohida toifadagi kuchli taĘĽsir qiluvchi
			moddalarni oĘ»tkazish maqsadini koĘ»zlamay qonunga xilof ravishda
			tayyorlash, olish, saqlash, tashish yoki joĘ»natish, â€”giyohvandlik
			vositalari, ularning analoglari yoki psixotrop moddalar
			hisoblanmaydigan alohida toifadagi kuchli taĘĽsir qiluvchi
			moddalarni musodara qilib, bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir
			baravaridan ikki baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoxud
			giyohvandlik vositalari, ularning analoglari yoki psixotrop
			moddalar hisoblanmaydigan alohida toifadagi kuchli taĘĽsir
			qiluvchi moddalarni musodara qilib, oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144565" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			ushbu moddada nazarda tutilgan harakatlarni sodir etgan shaxs oĘ»z
			ixtiyori bilan aybini boĘ»yniga olish toĘ»gĘ»risida hokimiyat
			organlariga arz qilsa va giyohvandlik vositalari, ularning
			analoglari yoki psixotrop moddalar hisoblanmaydigan alohida
			toifadagi kuchli taĘĽsir qiluvchi moddalarni topshirsa,
			javobgarlikdan ozod qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144570" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
