			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">56</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">4</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Giyohvandlik vositalarini, ularning analoglarini yoki psixotrop
			moddalarni targĘ»ib qiluvchi mahsulotni tayyorlash, tarqatish,
			reklama qilish, namoyish etish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7144574" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Giyohvandlik
			vositalarini, ularning analoglarini yoki psixotrop moddalarni
			targĘ»ib qiluvchi mahsulotni tarqatish, reklama qilish, namoyish
			etish maqsadida tayyorlash, xuddi shuningdek ularni tarqatish,
			reklama qilish, namoyish etish, shu jumladan ommaviy axborot
			vositalarida, telekommunikatsiya tarmoqlarida yoki Internet jahon
			axborot tarmogĘ»ida tarqatish, reklama qilish, namoyish etish,
			â€”huquqbuzarlik ashyolarini musodara qilib, fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yuz baravaridan bir yuz ellik baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” bir yuz ellik baravaridan ikki yuz
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoxud huquqbuzarlik
			ashyolarini musodara qilib, oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1630187" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">57-modda.
			Tanosil kasalligi yoki OIV kasalligi/OITS yuqadigan manbani
			yashirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1630191" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tanosil
			kasalligiga yoki OIV kasalligi/OITSga uchragan bemorning kasallik
			yuqtirilgan manbani, shuningdek oĘ»zi bilan aloqa qilib tanosil
			kasalligi va OIV kasalligi/OITS yuqishi xavfini tugĘ»dirgan
			shaxslarni yashirishi â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikki
			baravaridan uch baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1630197" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">58-modda.
			Tanosil kasalligiga yoki OIV kasalligi/OITSga uchragan
			shaxslarning tekshirishdan boĘ»yin tovlashi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1630200" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tanosil
			kasalligiga yoki OIV kasalligi/OITSga uchraganligi haqida yetarli
			maĘĽlumotlar boĘ»lgan shaxslarning sogĘ»liqni saqlash organlari
			tomonidan ogohlantirilganidan keyin ham tekshirishdan boĘ»yin
			tovlashi â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravaridan uch
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1630204" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">59-modda.
			OIV kasalligi/OITS yuqqan-yuqmaganligini aniqlash uchun tibbiy
			koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazishda, shuningdek tibbiy va kosmetik
			muolajalarni oĘ»tkazishda xavfsizlikni yetarli darajada
			taĘĽminlamaganlik</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1630207" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OIV
			kasalligi/OITS yuqqan-yuqmaganligini aniqlash uchun tibbiy
			koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazishda, shuningdek OIV kasalligi/OITSni
			yuqtirishga olib keladigan tibbiy va kosmetik muolaja oĘ»tkazishda
			xavfsizlikni yetarli darajada taĘĽminlamaganlik â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan ikki baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4024745" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">59<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Hayoti yoki sogĘ»ligĘ»i uchun xavfli holatda boĘ»lgan shaxsga
			shoshilinch va (yoki) kechiktirib boĘ»lmaydigan tibbiy yordam
			koĘ»rsatishni asossiz ravishda rad etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4024755" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Hayoti
			yoki sogĘ»ligĘ»i uchun xavfli holatda boĘ»lgan shaxsga tibbiyot
			tashkilotlarida qonunga yoki maxsus qoidalarga muvofiq shoshilinch
			va (yoki) kechiktirib boĘ»lmaydigan tibbiy yordam koĘ»rsatishi
			kerak boĘ»lgan shaxs tomonidan shunday yordam koĘ»rsatishni
			asossiz ravishda rad etish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining uch baravaridan besh baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4024769" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437241" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">59<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Oilaviy (maishiy) zoĘ»ravonlik</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437247" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xotiniga
			(eriga), sobiq xotiniga (sobiq eriga), bir roĘ»zgĘ»or asosida
			birgalikda yashayotgan shaxsga yoki umumiy farzandga ega boĘ»lgan
			shaxsga nisbatan sodir etilgan mulk, taĘĽlim olish, sogĘ»liqni
			saqlash va (yoki) mehnatga oid huquqni amalga oshirishga
			toĘ»sqinlik qilish, mol-mulkiga va shaxsiy ashyolariga qasddan
			shikast yetkazish, xuddi shuningdek ushbu shaxslar sogĘ»ligĘ»ining
			yomonlashuviga olib kelgan tarzda ularning shaĘĽni va
			qadr-qimmatini tahqirlash, ularni qoĘ»rqitish, yaqin
			qarindoshlaridan ajratib qoĘ»yish, basharti jinoyat alomatlari,
			shuningdek ushbu Kodeksda nazarda tutilgan boshqa huquqbuzarliklar
			alomatlari mavjud boĘ»lmasa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
			baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoki
			oĘ»n sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7172432" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xotinini
			(erini), sobiq xotinini (sobiq erini), bir roĘ»zgĘ»or asosida
			birgalikda yashayotgan shaxsni yoki bolani, shuningdek umumiy
			farzandga ega boĘ»lgan shaxsni doĘ»pposlash, ushbu shaxslarga
			sogĘ»liqning qisqa muddatga yomonlashuviga yoki mehnat
			qobiliyatining uncha uzoq boĘ»lmagan muddatga yoĘ»qolishiga olib
			kelmagan qasddan badanga yengil shikast yetkazish, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205374" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">59</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">3</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Psixologik yordam koĘ»rsatish tartibini buzish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205391" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Psixologik
			yordamni bunday huquqqa ega boĘ»lmagan shaxs tomonidan koĘ»rsatish
			yoxud aholiga psixologik yordam koĘ»rsatish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qonunchilikda belgilangan cheklovlarga rioya etmaslik, basharti
			jinoyat alomatlari, shuningdek ushbu Kodeksda nazarda tutilgan
			boshqa huquqbuzarliklar alomatlari mavjud boĘ»lmasa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205498" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan
			yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205585" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">59</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">4</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			MaĘĽrifiy faoliyatni amalga oshirish tartibini buzish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205588" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽrifiy
			faoliyatni bunday faoliyat bilan shugĘ»ullanish huquqiga ega
			boĘ»lmagan shaxs tomonidan amalga oshirish yoxud maĘĽrifiy
			faoliyatni amalga oshirish boĘ»yicha qonunchilikda belgilangan
			cheklovlarga rioya etmaslik, basharti jinoyat alomatlari,
			shuningdek ushbu Kodeksda nazarda tutilgan boshqa huquqbuzarliklar
			alomatlari mavjud boĘ»lmasa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205591" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan
			yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205604" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">59</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">5</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.</span></font></strong><span style="font-weight: normal">&nbsp;</span><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">Xalq
			tabobati toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205606" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xalq
			tabobati sohasida faoliyat olib borish uchun tegishli huquqqa ega
			boĘ»lmagan shaxs tomonidan fuqarolarga tibbiy tashxis qoĘ»yish va
			ularni davolash xizmatlarini koĘ»rsatish hamda mazkur xizmatlarni
			omma oldida targĘ»ib qilish, basharti jinoyat alomatlari mavjud
			boĘ»lmasa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh
			baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			yigirma baravaridan yigirma besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205613" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xalq
			tabobati yoĘ»nalishida ruxsat etilmagan usullarni qoĘ»llagan holda
			fuqarolarga tibbiy tashxis qoĘ»yish va ularni davolash
			xizmatlarini moddiy qimmatliklar olish yoki mulkiy manfaatdor
			boĘ»lish evaziga koĘ»rsatish, shuningdek mazkur xizmatlarni omma
			oldida targĘ»ib qilish, basharti jinoyat alomatlari mavjud
			boĘ»lmasa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan
			yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7205618" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7205606"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>yoki&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7205613"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin
			bir yil davomida takroran sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div id="-198097" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in"><a name="-198097"></a>
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">VII
		bob. MULKKA TAJOVUZ QILUVCHI HUQUQBUZARLIKLAR UCHUN MAĘĽMURIY
		JAVOBGARLIK</span></p>
		<div id="-334269" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">60-modda.
			Tabiiy resurslarga egalik huquqini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4718695" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yerdan,
			suvdan, oĘ»simlik yoki hayvonot dunyosidan oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan
			foydalanish yoxud yerga va boshqa tabiiy resurslarga (bundan yer
			osti boyliklari va yer osti suvlari mustasno) egalik huquqini
			bevosita yoki yashirin shaklda buzuvchi bitimlar tuzish yoki
			boshqa harakatlar sodir etish, tabiatdan maxsus foydalanish
			huquqini boshqalarga berish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladiâ€ť</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5612720" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yer
			uchastkalarini oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan egallab olish, shu jumladan
			ushbu yer uchastkalariga nisbatan qonuniy huquqlari mavjud
			boĘ»lmagan holda ulardan foydalanish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			yetmish baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5612738" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zboshimchalik
			bilan egallab olingan, ajratilgan yer uchastkasiga tutash boĘ»lgan
			va tutash boĘ»lmagan yer uchastkalarida qurilish ishlarini amalga
			oshirish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikki yuz
			baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” toĘ»rt yuz baravari
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5612747" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5612717"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlikni birinchi marta sodir etgan shaxs, agar u
			oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan egallangan yer uchastkasining
			qaytarilishini taĘĽminlasa va oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan egallab
			olishning oqibatlarini bartaraf etsa, javobgarlikdan ozod etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4228684" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">60<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			SugĘ»oriladigan yerlarni oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan egallab olishga
			yoĘ»l qoĘ»ymaslik boĘ»yicha choralar koĘ»rmaslik</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5612839" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">SugĘ»oriladigan
			yerlarni oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan egallab olishga yoĘ»l qoĘ»ymaslik
			boĘ»yicha yer egasi, yerdan foydalanuvchi yoki ijarachi tomonidan
			choralar koĘ»rilmaganligi, shu jumladan yer uchastkasi
			oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan egallab olinganligi fakti toĘ»gĘ»risida
			vakolatli organlar xabardor etilmaganligi, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			ellik baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198117" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">61-modda.
			Oz miqdorda talon-toroj qilish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-334336" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mulkchilik
			shaklidan qatĘĽi nazar korxona, muassasa, tashkilotlarning
			mol-mulkini oĘ»gĘ»irlash, oĘ»zlashtirish, rastrata qilish, mansab
			lavozimini suiisteĘĽmol qilish yoki firibgarlik yoĘ»li bilan oz
			miqdorda talon-toroj qilish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir
			baravaridan besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-334346" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7674407" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Umumiy
			foydalanishdagi elektr, issiqlik, gaz yoki vodoprovod tarmoqlariga
			tijorat maqsadlarida oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan ulanish yoxud elektr
			energiyasini, tabiiy gazni, sovuq yoki issiq suvni hisobga olish
			asboblariga, shu jumladan ularning plombalariga qasddan shikast
			yetkazish yoxud hisobga olish asboblarining koĘ»rsatkichlarini
			oĘ»zgartirish maqsadida ularga tashqaridan aralashish yoĘ»li bilan
			elektr energiyasini, tabiiy gazni, sovuq yoki issiq suvni
			oĘ»gĘ»irlash tarzida sodir etilgan oz miqdorda talon-toroj qilish,
			shuningdek mulkchilik shaklidan qatĘĽi nazar korxona, muassasa,
			tashkilotlarning koĘ»mir yoqilgĘ»isini oĘ»gĘ»irlash,
			oĘ»zlashtirish, rastrata qilish, mansab lavozimini suiisteĘĽmol
			qilish yoki firibgarlik yoĘ»li bilan oz miqdorda talon-toroj
			qilish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan
			yigirma besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh
			sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4658503" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			talon-toroj qilingan mulkning qiymati bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravaridan oshmasa, bunday talon-toroj oz
			miqdordagi talon-toroj qilish deb hisoblanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6412550" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tijorat
			maqsadi deganda jismoniy yoki yuridik shaxslar tomonidan muayyan
			faoliyatda foyda yoki daromad olishga qaratilgan maqsad
			tushuniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2735415" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">61<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Nodavlat tijorat tashkilotining yoki boshqa nodavlat
			tashkilotining xizmatchisini pora evaziga ogĘ»dirib olish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2735419" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nodavlat
			tijorat tashkilotining yoki boshqa nodavlat tashkilotining
			xizmatchisiga mazkur xizmatchining oĘ»z vakolatlaridan foydalangan
			holda sodir etishi lozim yoki mumkin boĘ»lgan muayyan harakatni
			uni pora evaziga oĘ»ziga ogĘ»dirib olayotgan shaxs manfaatlarini
			koĘ»zlab bajarishi yoki bajarmasligi evaziga qonunga xilof
			ekanligini bila turib, moddiy qimmatliklar berish yoki uni mulkiy
			manfaatdor etish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2735427" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nodavlat
			tijorat tashkiloti yoki boshqa nodavlat tashkiloti xizmatchisining
			oĘ»z vakolatlaridan foydalangan holda sodir etishi lozim yoki
			mumkin boĘ»lgan muayyan harakatni uni pora evaziga oĘ»ziga
			ogĘ»dirib olayotgan shaxs manfaatlarini koĘ»zlab bajarishi yoki
			bajarmasligi evaziga qonunga xilof ekanligini bila turib, moddiy
			qimmatliklar olishi yoki mulkiy manfaatdor boĘ»lishi, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2735432" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Nodavlat
			tijorat tashkilotining yoki boshqa nodavlat tashkilotining
			xizmatchisi deganda mehnat shartnomasi yoki fuqarolik-huquqiy
			shartnoma asosida mehnat faoliyatini amalga oshiruvchi, mansabdor
			shaxs alomatlariga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxs tushuniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3493547" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">61<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Mulkni qasddan nobud qilish yoki unga zarar yetkazish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3493561" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zganing
			mulkini qasddan nobud qilish yoki unga zarar yetkazish, oz
			miqdorni tashkil etsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3493573" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zganing
			mulkini qasddan nobud qilish yoki unga zarar yetkazish koĘ»p
			boĘ»lmagan miqdorni tashkil etsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoki
			oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4658645" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Oz
			miqdor deganda bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha
			boĘ»lgan doiradagi, koĘ»p boĘ»lmagan miqdor deganda esa, bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravaridan yuz baravarigacha
			boĘ»lgan doiradagi miqdor tushuniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198148" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">62-modda.
			Topib olingan mol-mulkni yashirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4661562" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Topib
			olingan yoki tasodifan qoĘ»liga tushib qolgan qiymati bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan ortiq boĘ»lgan oĘ»zganing
			mol-mulkini yashirish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch
			baravaridan besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4359300" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">63-modda.
			GĘ»ayriqonuniy ov, baliq ovlash mahsulotini, yovvoyi holda
			oĘ»suvchi oĘ»simliklarni yigĘ»ish va tayyorlash mahsulotini qabul
			qilib olish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4359306" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">GĘ»ayriqonuniy
			ov, baliq ovlash mahsulotini, yovvoyi holda oĘ»suvchi
			oĘ»simliklarni yigĘ»ish va tayyorlash mahsulotini tayyorlash yoki
			qayta ishlash tashkilotining, savdo yoxud umumiy ovqatlanish
			tashkilotining mansabdor shaxsi tomonidan qabul qilib olish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4359594" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696797" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">64-modda.
			Moddiy madaniy meros obyektlarini muhofaza qilish va ulardan
			foydalanish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4497527" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Moddiy
			madaniy meros obyektlarini muhofaza qilish va ulardan foydalanish
			qoidalarini buzish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			oĘ»ttiz baravaridan ellik baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa
			â€” ellik baravaridan yuz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4497530" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			muhofazasiga olingan moddiy madaniy meros koĘ»chmas mulk
			obyektlarining qoĘ»riqlanadigan tegralarida, alohida muhofaza
			qilinadigan tarixiy-madaniy hududlarda, shu jumladan oĘ»zining
			tarixiy-madaniy qimmatiga koĘ»ra Umumjahon merosi roĘ»yxatiga
			kiritilgan hududlarda va ularning qoĘ»riqlanadigan tegralarida
			moddiy madaniy meros obyektlari hisoblanmagan binolar, inshootlar
			hamda boshqa obyektlarni belgilangan tartibda ruxsatnoma olmasdan
			qurish yoki buzish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			ellik baravaridan yuz baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			yuz baravaridan yuz ellik baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga
			yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6248480" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">64<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Moddiy madaniy meros obyektlariga nisbatan hurmatsizlik bilan
			munosabatda boĘ»lish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6248482" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Moddiy
			madaniy meros obyektlariga nisbatan hurmatsizlik bilan munosabatda
			boĘ»lish, yaĘĽni yozuvlar yozish, rasmlar chizish yoĘ»li bilan
			ularni tahqirlash yoki ularga shikast yetkazish, moddiy madaniy
			meros obyektlarini, shu jumladan ularning tarixiy, ilmiy, badiiy
			yoxud oĘ»zgacha madaniy qimmatiga dogĘ» tushiruvchi yoki ularni
			masxara qiluvchi harakatlarni sodir etish, xuddi shuningdek moddiy
			madaniy meros obyektlariga nisbatan jamoat tartibini buzuvchi
			harakatlarni sodir etish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6248484" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6248482"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan oz miqdorda
			zarar yetkazgan huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6248486" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6248482"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan, koĘ»p
			boĘ»lmagan miqdorda zarar yetkazgan huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6248489" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6248482"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6248484"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;yoki&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6248486"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlikni maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takror sodir etish, â€”oĘ»n besh sutka muddatga
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga yoki ushbu Kodeksga muvofiq oĘ»ziga
			nisbatan maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin boĘ»lmagan
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravaridan
			oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6248494" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Oz
			miqdordagi zarar deganda bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz
			baravarigacha boĘ»lgan doiradagi, koĘ»p boĘ»lmagan miqdordagi
			zarar deganda bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravaridan
			yuz baravarigacha boĘ»lgan doiradagi miqdor tushuniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3262976" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">VIII
			BOB. EKOLOGIYA, ATROF-MUHITNI MUHOFAZA QILISH VA TABIATDAN
			FOYDALANISH SOHASIDAGI HUQUQBUZARLIKLAR UCHUN MAĘĽMURIY
			JAVOBGARLIK</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198186" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">65-modda.
			Yerlardan xoĘ»jasizlarcha foydalanish yoki ularni yaroqsiz holga
			tushirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7519986" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yerlardan
			xoĘ»jasizlarcha foydalanish, obyektlar qurish paytida unumdor
			qatlamni olmaslik, yer uchastkalaridan ruxsat etilgan
			foydalanishning asosiy turiga nomuvofiq foydalanish, yerlarni
			foydalanishdan chiqarishga, hosildorlik pasayishiga, tuproqning
			buzilishi yoki yoĘ»q boĘ»lib ketishiga olib keladigan boshqa
			harakatlarni sodir etish, shuningdek tanazzulga yuz tutgan qishloq
			xoĘ»jaligi yerlarini konservatsiyalashning belgilangan tartibini
			buzish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n
			besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520005" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yerga
			egalik qiluvchilar, yerdan foydalanuvchilar va ijarachilar
			tomonidan bir gektargacha maydonga ega yer uchastkasida
			sugĘ»oriladigan yerlarni yaxshilash hamda muhofaza qilish, shu
			jumladan yer uchastkasidan ruxsat etilgan foydalanishning asosiy
			turiga muvofiq oqilona foydalanilishini, tuproqning qayta
			tiklanishini va hosildorligi oshirilishini taĘĽminlash boĘ»yicha
			majburiyatlarning bajarilmasligi, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining yetti baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7540541" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yerga
			egalik qiluvchilar, yerdan foydalanuvchilar va ijarachilar
			tomonidan bir gektardan ortiq maydonga ega yer uchastkasida
			sugĘ»oriladigan yerlarni yaxshilash hamda muhofaza qilish, shu
			jumladan yer uchastkasidan ruxsat etilgan foydalanishning asosiy
			turiga muvofiq oqilona foydalanilishini, tuproqning qayta
			tiklanishini va hosildorligi oshirilishini taĘĽminlash boĘ»yicha
			majburiyatlarning bajarilmasligi, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198203" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qishloq
			xoĘ»jaligi va boshqa yerlarni yaroqsiz holga tushirish, ularni
			ishlab chiqarish chiqitlari va boshqa chiqindilar, kimyoviy va
			radioaktiv moddalar hamda oqova suvlar bilan ifloslantirish
			â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n
			besh baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh
			baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198219" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">66-modda.
			Yer berish tartibini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-334464" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yer
			berish tartibini buzish, xuddi shuningdek fermer yoki dehqon
			xoĘ»jaligi yuritish uchun, yakka tartibda uy-joy qurish va
			turar-joy binosiga xizmat koĘ»rsatish, jamoa bogĘ»dorchiligi va
			polizchiligi uchun fuqarolarga yer berilishiga toĘ»sqinlik qilish,
			â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch
			baravaridan yetti baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520064" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">67-modda.
			Vaqtincha egallab turilgan yer uchastkalarini oĘ»z vaqtida
			qaytarib bermaslik yoki ularni ruxsat etilgan foydalanishning
			asosiy turiga muvofiq foydalanish uchun yaroqli holga keltirmaslik</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520068" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Vaqtincha
			egallab turilgan yer uchastkalarini oĘ»z vaqtida qaytarib
			bermaslik yoki ularni ruxsat etilgan foydalanishning asosiy turiga
			muvofiq foydalanish uchun yaroqli holga keltirish yuzasidan
			majburiyatlarni bajarmaslik, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520074" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">68-modda.
			Yer tuzish loyihalaridan oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan chetga chiqish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520078" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tasdiqlangan
			yer tuzish loyiha hujjatlaridan tegishli ruxsat boĘ»lmay turib
			chetga chiqish, xuddi shuningdek tegishli organlar bilan kelishmay
			turib obyektlarni joylashtirish, loyihalashtirish, qurish va
			ularni foydalanishga topshirish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining uch baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198273" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga
			esa â€” oĘ»n baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5613529" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">68<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			KoĘ»chmas mulkka boĘ»lgan huquqni davlat roĘ»yxatidan oĘ»tkazish
			uchun oĘ»z vaqtida murojaat etmaslik</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520083" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">KoĘ»chmas
			mulkka boĘ»lgan huquqlarni davlat roĘ»yxatidan oĘ»tkazishni amalga
			oshiruvchi organga yer uchastkasiga, bino va inshootga boĘ»lgan
			huquqni davlat roĘ»yxatidan oĘ»tkazish uchun oĘ»z vaqtida murojaat
			etmaslik, bundan ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7520088"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan hol
			mustasno, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
			baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520088" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqarolar
			tomonidan koĘ»chmas mulkka boĘ»lgan huquqlarni davlat roĘ»yxatidan
			oĘ»tkazishni amalga oshiruvchi organga turar joyga boĘ»lgan
			huquqni davlat roĘ»yxatidan oĘ»tkazish uchun oĘ»z vaqtida murojaat
			etmaslik, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari miqdorida
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520095" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">68<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Davlat kadastrlarini yuritish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520097" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			kadastrlarini yuritish boĘ»yicha vakolatli organlarning mansabdor
			shaxslari tomonidan tegishli davlat kadastrlarini yuritish
			qoidalarini buzish, shuningdek Davlat kadastrlari yagona tizimiga
			kiritish uchun davlat kadastrlarining axborotini taqdim etishdan
			boĘ»yin tovlash yoki notoĘ»gĘ»ri axborotni taqdim etish â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520100" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5613595" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">69-modda.
			Chegara belgilarini, geodezik punktlarni va cheklov belgilarini
			yoĘ»q qilish yoki shikastlantirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5613610" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Egalikdagi,
			foydalanishdagi yerlarning chegara belgilarini, geodezik
			punktlarni va oĘ»rmonlardagi cheklov belgilarini yoĘ»q qilish yoki
			shikastlantirish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch
			baravaridan besh baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198287" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">70-modda.
			Yer osti boyliklarini muhofaza qilish va ulardan foydalanish
			talablarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4718712" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Foydali
			qazilmalar joylashgan maydonlarga oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan imoratlar
			qurish, foydali qazilma konlarini ekologiya va atrof-muhitni
			muhofaza qilish hamda kon nazorati organlari bilan kelishmay turib
			ishga solish, yer osti boyliklaridan foydalanish talablari va
			tartibini buzish (bundan foydali qazilmalarni litsenziyasiz qazib
			olish mustasno), yer qaĘĽridan foydalanishda ishlarni olib borish
			xavfsizligi talablarini buzish, yer osti boyliklarini muhofaza
			qilish qoidalarini va tabiiy muhitni, binolar va inshootlarni yer
			osti boyliklaridan foydalanish bilan bogĘ»liq boĘ»lgan ishlarning
			zararli taĘĽsiridan muhofaza qilish talablarini bajarmaslik, yer
			osti suvlari rejimini kuzatish uchun qazilgan quduqlarni,
			marksheyderlik va geologik belgilarni yoĘ»q qilish yoki
			shikastlantirish, xuddi shuningdek umumtarqalgan foydali
			qazilmalardan foydalanish qoidalarini yerga egalik qiluvchilar va
			yerdan foydalanuvchilar tomonidan buzish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»ttiz baravaridan ellik
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198304" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Konlarning
			boy uchastkalarini tanlab ishlatish, mineral xom ashyoni qazib
			olayotganda va qayta ishlashda foydali qazilmalarni normativdan
			ortiq nobud qilish, foydali qazilma konlarini yaroqsiz holga
			keltirish va foydali qazilma zaxiralaridan oqilona foydalanish
			talablarini boshqacha tarzda buzish â€”mansabdor shaxslarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»ttiz
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198314" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Marksheyderlik
			hujjatlarini yoĘ»qotish, tugatilayotgan yoki konservatsiya
			qilinayotgan konlarni va burgĘ»ilangan quduqlarni aholining
			xavfsizligini taĘĽminlovchi holatga keltirib qoĘ»yish talablarini,
			shuningdek konservatsiya vaqtida konlarni, qazilayotgan joylarni
			va burgĘ»ilangan quduqlarni muhofaza etish talablarini bajarmaslik
			â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
			baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198323" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198290"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198299"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;yoki&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198310"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravaridan ellik baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” ellik baravaridan yuz baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696875" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">70<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Daryolarning oĘ»zanlarini tozalashga va qirgĘ»oqlarini
			mustahkamlashga doir ishlarni amalga oshirish tartibini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696879" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Daryolarning
			oĘ»zanlarini tozalashga va qirgĘ»oqlarini mustahkamlashga doir
			ishlarni amalga oshirish tartibini buzish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravaridan ellik baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” ellik baravaridan yuz baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696884" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli boĘ»lgan ashyoni yoki maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlikning bevosita ashyosini musodara qilib, fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravaridan yetmish
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yuz baravaridan yuz
			ellik baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180789" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">70<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Foydali qazilmalarni ruxsatnomasiz qazib olish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180792" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Foydali
			qazilmalarni ruxsatnomasiz qazib olish, bundan yer osti suvlari va
			daryolar oĘ»zanlarida joylashgan foydali qazilmalar mustasno,
			â€”maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli boĘ»lgan ashyoni
			yoki maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikning bevosita ashyosini musodara
			qilib, fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravaridan
			yetmish baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yuz
			baravaridan bir yuz ellik baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198331" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">71-modda.
			Yer osti boyliklarini geologik jihatdan oĘ»rganish ishlarini olib
			borish qoidalari va talablarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198336" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yer
			osti boyliklarini geologik jihatdan oĘ»rganish ishlarini olib
			borish qoidalari va talablarini topilgan foydali qazilmalar
			zaxiralariga yoki foydali qazilmalar qazib olish korxonalari,
			shuningdek foydali qazilmalar qazib olish bilan bogĘ»liq boĘ»lmagan
			yer osti inshootlari qurish va ulardan foydalanish sharoitlariga
			notoĘ»gĘ»ri baho berilishiga olib kelishi mumkin boĘ»lgan yoki
			olib kelgan tarzda buzish, yer osti boyliklarini keyingi geologik
			jihatdan oĘ»rganishda va konlarni ishga solishda zarur boĘ»lgan
			geologik hujjatlarni, foydali qazilma namunalari dublikatlarini va
			kernlarini yoĘ»qotib qoĘ»yish â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan uch baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198346" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan yetti baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5615195" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">72-modda.
			Suv resurslarini muhofaza qilish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5615207" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suvlarni
			ifloslantirish yoki bulgĘ»atish, suvtoĘ»plagich inshootlarida
			suvni muhofaza qilish rejimini buzish, shuningdek suv obyektlariga
			oqindi suvlarni oqizishga yoĘ»l qoĘ»yish shartlari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			talablarni buzish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch
			baravaridan besh baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198360" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Korxonalar,
			kommunal va boshqa obyektlarni suvlarning ifloslanishi va
			bulgĘ»anishi yoki ularning zararli oqibatlari oldini oluvchi
			inshootlar va qurilmalarsiz foydalanishga topshirish, shuningdek
			suv obyektlarining tabiiy holatini buzuvchi boshqa harakatlar
			qilish â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3836393" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suv
			quduqlarini qazishning belgilangan qoidalarini va texnologiyasini
			buzish (bundan jismoniy shaxslarning oĘ»z ehtiyojlari uchun, shu
			jumladan tomorqa yer uchastkalarini sugĘ»orish uchun yer osti
			suvlarini yakka tartibda olishga moĘ»ljallangan quduqlarni qazish
			hollari mustasno), ishlatilayotgan va kuzatuv quduqlarini yoĘ»q
			qilib yuborish yoki shikastlantirish, suv oĘ»zi chiqadigan
			quduqlarni ularni tartibga soladigan qurilmalar bilan jihozlashga,
			shuningdek ishlatishga yaroqsiz quduqlarni konservatsiyalashga
			yoki yoĘ»q qilishga doir choralarni koĘ»rmaslik, sifatli yer osti
			suvlari hosil boĘ»ladigan tegrada yer osti suvlari
			ifloslanishining yoki sifati yomonlashishining manbai boĘ»lib
			qolishi mumkin boĘ»lgan sanoat, qishloq xoĘ»jaligi inshootlarini
			va boshqa obyektlarni joylashtirish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravaridan besh baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh baravaridan yetti baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198406" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198353"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198357"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;yoki&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198365"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin
			bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan
			yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1569046" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">74-modda.
			Suvdan foydalanish va suv isteĘĽmoli qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5615253" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tabiiy
			suv oqimlari (jilgĘ»alar, soylar, daryolar va boshqalar), suv
			havzalari (koĘ»llar, dengizlar) va boshqa tabiiy suv obyektlaridan
			olinadigan suvdan foydalanish va suv isteĘĽmoli qoidalarini, suv
			olish limitlarini buzish, suvlarning hamda suv obyektlarining
			holatiga taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatuvchi gidrotexnika ishlarini va boshqa
			ishlarni oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan bajarish, shuningdek loyihada
			nazarda tutilgan baliqlarni muhofaza qilish inshootlari va
			qurilmalari boĘ»lmagan holda ulardan suv olishni amalga oshirish
			â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1569051" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">SunĘĽiy
			suv oqimlari (ochiq va yopiq kanallar, kollektor-drenaj
			tarmoqlari), suv havzalari (suv omborlari, sel suvlari
			toĘ»planadigan joylar, hovuzlar va boshqalar) hamda boshqa sunĘĽiy
			suv obyektlaridan olinadigan suvdan foydalanish va suv isteĘĽmoli
			qoidalarini buzish, yaĘĽni suvdan xoĘ»jasizlarcha foydalanish,
			suvlarning va suv obyektlarining holatiga taĘĽsir etuvchi
			gidrotexnika ishlarini va boshqa ishlarni oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan
			bajarish, suv obyektlaridan belgilangan suv olish limitlari,
			suvdan foydalanish va suv isteĘĽmoli rejalarini buzish
			â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan uch
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1569055" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1569047"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1569050"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>qismlarida
			nazarda tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi
			qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan
			boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravaridan yetti baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n
			baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520235" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yer
			osti suvli qatlamlaridan olinadigan suvdan foydalanish va suv
			isteĘĽmoli qoidalarini, yer osti suvli qatlamlaridan suv olish
			limitlarini buzish, yer osti suvlaridan oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan suv
			olish, yer osti suvlariga quduqni qonunga xilof ravishda
			burgĘ»ilash, bundan jismoniy shaxslarning oĘ»z ehtiyojlari, shu
			jumladan tomorqa yer uchastkalarini sugĘ»orish uchun suvdan umumiy
			foydalanishi mustasno, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining olti baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma bir baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3836417" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3836393"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma bir
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yigirma bir
			baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198519" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">75-modda.
			Suvlarning davlat hisobini yuritish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198523" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suv
			obyektlaridan olinadigan va ularga quyiladigan suv miqdorining
			dastlabki hisobini yuritish va oqib kelib qoĘ»shilayotgan suvlar
			sifatini aniqlash qoidalarini buzish, shuningdek davlat suv
			kadastri yuritishning belgilangan tartibini buzish â€”mansabdor
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198532" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”mansabdor
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6596080" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">76-modda.
			Suv xoĘ»jaligi obyektlari va qurilmalarini shikastlantirish,
			ulardan foydalanish qoidalarini buzish, shuningdek gidrotexnika
			inshootlarining xavfsizligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198540" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suv
			xoĘ»jaligi inshoootlari va qurilmalarini shikastlantirish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6596419" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suv
			xoĘ»jaligi obyektlari va qurilmalaridan foydalanish qoidalarini
			buzish, shuningdek gidrotexnika inshootlarining xavfsizligi
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzish, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198551" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">77-modda.
			OĘ»rmon fondi yerlaridan foydalanish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6830464" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»rmon
			fondi yerlarida pichanzorlar va yaylovlarni shikastlantirish,
			oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan pichan oĘ»rish, drenaj tizimlarini va
			yoĘ»llarni yoĘ»q qilish yoki shikastlantirish â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uchdan bir qismidan bir
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” bir baravaridan uch
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-198996" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarliklar maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan uch baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” uch baravaridan yetti baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3500305" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»rmon
			fondi yerlarida chorva mollarini oĘ»tlatish qoidalarini buzish,
			â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3500314" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3500303"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199002" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">78-modda.
			Kesiladigan oĘ»rmon fondidan foydalanish tartibini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199005" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kesiladigan
			oĘ»rmon fondidan foydalanish, yogĘ»och tayyorlash va tashib olib
			ketish tartibini, shuningdek oĘ»rmon kesish chiptasi (orderi)da
			yoki oĘ»rmon chiptasida belgilangan boshqa talablarni buzish
			â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uchdan bir qismidan
			bir baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” bir baravaridan
			uch baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5155740" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">79-modda.
			Daraxtlarni, butalarni, boshqa oĘ»simliklarni va nihollarni
			qonunga xilof ravishda kesish, kundakov qilish, shikastlantirish,
			yoĘ»q qilish yoki boshqa joyga koĘ»chirib oĘ»tkazish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5155741" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Daraxtlarni,
			butalarni, boshqa oĘ»simliklarni va nihollarni qonunga xilof
			ravishda kesish, kundakov qilish, shikastlantirish, yoĘ»q qilish
			yoki boshqa joyga koĘ»chirib oĘ»tkazish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma besh baravaridan ellik
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” ellik baravaridan
			yetmish besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7235816" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»z
			hududida binolarni, inshootlarni yoki boshqa obyektlarni qurish,
			rekonstruksiya qilish chogĘ»ida belgilangan talablarni buzib,
			kimyoviy, biologik vositalarni qoĘ»llagan holda daraxtlarni,
			butalarni yoki boshqa oĘ»simliklarni qasddan shikastlantirish,
			payhon qilish yoki yoĘ»q qilish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»ttiz besh baravaridan ellik baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oltmish baravaridan yetmish besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7235860" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5155741"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7235816"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklarni maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin
			bir yil davomida takror sodir etish, â€”maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklarni sodir etish quroli boĘ»lgan ashyoni yoki
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikning bevosita ashyosini musodara qilib,
			fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravaridan
			yetmish besh baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yetmish
			besh baravaridan yuz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoki
			oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5155749" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuridik
			shaxslarga tegishli boĘ»lgan yoki oĘ»zlariga biriktirilgan
			hududlarda daraxtlarni muhofaza qilish va saqlashga doir
			qonunchilikda belgilangan choralarni koĘ»rmaganlik, â€”mansabdor
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan yigirma
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6830476" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Daraxtlar
			va butalarning qimmatbaho navlarini kesishga, kundakov qilishga,
			shikastlantirishga yoki yoĘ»q qilishga olib keladigan loyiha
			hujjatlarini ishlab chiqish, â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravaridan yetmish besh baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5615268" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">79<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			OĘ»simlik dunyosi obyektlarini yigĘ»ish, tayyorlash va ulardan
			foydalanish tartibi hamda shartlarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5615287" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yovvoyi
			holda oĘ»suvchi oĘ»simliklarning texnik va dorivor xomashyosini,
			yovvoyi holda oĘ»suvchi oĘ»simliklarni oziq-ovqat maqsadlari uchun
			yigĘ»ish hamda tayyorlashning, shuningdek oĘ»simlik dunyosi
			obyektlaridan madaniy-maĘĽrifiy, oĘ»quv-tarbiyaviy,
			sogĘ»lomlashtirish, rekreatsiya va estetik maqsadlarda
			foydalanishning belgilangan tartibini hamda shartlarini buzish,
			â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div id="-199029" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in"><a name="-199029"></a>
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">80-modda.
		OĘ»rmonlarni tiklash qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		<div id="-199030" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<br/>

			</p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199032" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»rmonlarni
			tiklash, ularning holatini va turi tarkibini yaxshilashga,
			ularning mahsuldorligini oshirishga, shuningdek yetilgan yogĘ»och
			zaxiralaridan foydalanishga oid qoidalar va yoĘ»riqnomalarni
			buzish â€”</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4660102" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<br/>

			</p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4660104" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">mansabdor
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n
			besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199121" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">81-modda.
			Qizil kitobga kiritilgan oĘ»simliklarni yigĘ»ish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696896" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasining Qizil kitobiga kiritilgan oĘ»simliklarni yoki
			ularning yashash faoliyati natijasida hosil boĘ»lgan ildizlari,
			piyozboshlari, tanalari, poyalari, novdalari, poĘ»stlogĘ»i,
			barglari, gĘ»unchalari, gullari, urugĘ»lari, mevalari, sharbatini
			(yelimini) va boshqa mahsulotlarini oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan
			yigĘ»ish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n
			baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199133" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan
			yigirma besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1737330" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">82-modda.
			Muhofaza etiladigan tabiiy hududlarning rejimini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1737334" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			qoĘ»riqxonasi rejimini buzish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3984432" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Majmua
			(landshaft) buyurtma qoĘ»riqxonalari, tabiat bogĘ»lari, davlat
			tabiat yodgorliklari, ayrim tabiiy obyektlar hamda majmualarni
			saqlab qolish, takror koĘ»paytirish va tiklash uchun moĘ»ljallangan
			hududlar, muhofaza etiladigan landshaftlar shu jumladan suvni
			muhofaza qilish zonalari, sohil boĘ»yi mintaqalari, ayrim tabiiy
			resurslarni boshqarish uchun moĘ»ljallangan hududlar, davlat
			biosfera rezervatlari hamda davlatlararo muhofaza etiladigan
			tabiiy hududlar rejimini buzish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199162" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199143"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;yoki&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199152"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»ttiz baravaridan qirq
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199168" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">83-modda.
			OĘ»rmon uchun foydali faunani yoĘ»q qilib yuborish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199172" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»rmon
			uchun foydali faunani yoĘ»q qilib yuborish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199179" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">84-modda.
			OĘ»rmonlarda yongĘ»in xavfsizligi talablarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199183" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»rmonlarda
			yongĘ»in xavfsizligi talablarini buzish â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199189" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravaridan yigirma
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6840583" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199183"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish, agar yongĘ»in chiqishiga olib kelgan
			boĘ»lsa, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
			baravaridan oĘ»n besh baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			yigirma baravaridan yigirma besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-334544" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">85-modda.
			Ifloslantiruvchi moddalar va biologik organizmlarni atmosfera
			havosiga chiqarib tashlash, unga zararli fizikaviy taĘĽsir
