			zinapoyalarida va tomlarida ketish â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining ikkidan bir qismidan ikki baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199836" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">115-modda.
			Metropolitendan foydalanish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199838" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Metropolitendan
			foydalanishning belgilangan qoidalarini buzish â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ndan bir qismidan ikkidan bir
			qismigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” ikkidan bir qismidan bir
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696909" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">116-modda.
			Uchish xavfsizligi qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696918" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Aerodrom
			hududida aerodromlarni tanib olish uchun qabul qilingan markirovka
			belgilariga va qurilmalarga oĘ»xshash biror-bir belgi va qurilma
			oĘ»rnatish yoki aerodrom hududida parvozlar xavfsizligiga tahdid
			solishi mumkin boĘ»lgan faoliyatni belgilangan tartibda
			kelishilmagan holda amalga oshirish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696926" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Binolar
			va inshootlarda tungi va kunduzgi markirovka belgilarini yoki
			qurilmalarini oĘ»rnatish qoidalarini bajarmaganlik, â€”mansabdor
			shaxslarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696930" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Aerodrom
			uskunalarini, aerodrom belgilarini, havo kemalarini va ularning
			uskunalarini shikastlantirish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			uch baravaridan besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696939" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tegishli
			ruxsati boĘ»lmay turib aeroportlar (aerovokzallardan tashqari),
			aerodromlar, uchishni radio va yorugĘ»lik bilan taĘĽminlab
			turuvchi obyektlar hududida piyoda yoki transportda yurish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan uch baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696945" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Alkogolli
			ichimlik, giyohvandlik moddasi taĘĽsirida yoki oĘ»zgacha tarzda
			mastlik holatida boĘ»lgan shaxs tomonidan havo kemasini
			boshqarish, xuddi shuningdek bunday holatda boĘ»lgan ekipaj
			aĘĽzolarining havo kemasini boshqarishiga ijozat berish yoxud havo
			kemasini boshqaruvchi shaxsning alkogolli ichimlik, giyohvandlik
			moddasi taĘĽsiridagi yoki oĘ»zgacha tarzdagi mastlik holatini
			aniqlash uchun belgilangan tartibga muvofiq tekshiruvdan oĘ»tishdan
			boĘ»yin tovlashi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
			baravaridan oĘ»ttiz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696957" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Baxtsiz
			aviatsiya hodisasi deb topilgan hodisani, u haqidagi maĘĽlumotlarni
			qasddan yashirish, xuddi shuningdek ushbu hodisa toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			axborotni qasddan buzib koĘ»rsatish, bortdagi va yerdagi obyektiv
			nazorat vositalarining maĘĽlumotlariga hamda baxtsiz aviatsiya
			hodisasi bilan bogĘ»liq boshqa daliliy materiallarga qasddan
			shikast yetkazish yoki ularni qasddan yoĘ»q qilib yuborish,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravaridan yuz
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2971195" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">116<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Havo kemasidan foydalanish vaqtida lazer nurini yoĘ»naltirish
			orqali xalaqit berish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2971198" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Havo
			kemasidan foydalanish vaqtida havo kemasiga lazer nurini
			yoĘ»naltirish orqali xalaqit berish â€”huquqbuzarlik ashyolarini
			musodara qilib, bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yuz baravaridan ikki
			yuz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh
			sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3263052" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">116<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining samoviy hududidan qonunga xilof
			ravishda (ruxsatsiz) foydalanish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4324681" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasining samoviy hududidan qonunga xilof ravishda
			(ruxsatsiz) foydalanish, (bundan samoviy hududda uchuvchisiz
			uchadigan apparatlardan foydalanish hollari mustasno),
			â€”huquqbuzarlik ashyolarini musodara qilib, bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining yigirma baravaridan yuz baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa
			olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696966" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">116<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			Aviatsiya xavfsizligini taĘĽminlashga doir talablarni buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696970" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Aviatsiya
			xavfsizligi boĘ»yicha tekshiruvdan oĘ»tmagan shaxslarni, qoĘ»l
			yukini yoki bagajni, yukni, pochtani, bort zaxiralarini yoxud havo
			kemalarida tashish taqiqlangan moddalarni yoki predmetlarni havo
			kemasi bortiga yetkazib berish yoki yetkazib berishga
			koĘ»maklashish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n
			baravaridan yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199856" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">117-modda.
			Havo kemasida yurish-turish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3696976" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Havo
			kemasida boĘ»lgan shaxslarning havo kemasi komandirining yoki havo
			kemasi komandiri nomidan ekipaj aĘĽzosining farmoyishlarini
			bajarmasligi â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199861" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Havo
			kemasi bortida turib fotosuratga, kinoga, videoga olish,
			shuningdek radioaloqa vositalaridan foydalanish qoidalarini buzish
			â€”foto-kinoplyonka yoki videokassetalar musodara qilinib, bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravaridan besh baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199863" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">118-modda.
			Suv transportida harakat xavfsizligi qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199865" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suv
			transporti sohasida kemalarning portga kirishi va portdan
			chiqishi, port suvlarida kemalarning harakati va turishi hamda
			shatakka olinishi qoidalarini yoxud signal chiroqlari berish,
			tovush signallar, shuningdek koĘ»rilma va kunduzgi signallar
			almashinishning belgilangan tartibini buzish yoki kema yoĘ»liga
			baliq tutish qurilmalarini oĘ»rnatish â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining beshdan bir qismidan ikkidan bir qismigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199868" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Port
			suvlarida tegishli ruxsati boĘ»lmay turib gĘ»avvoslik ishlarini
			bajarish, shunday ishlarni olib borgan chogĘ»da signallar berish
			qoidalariga rioya qilmaslik â€”mansabdor shaxslarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining beshdan bir qismidan ikkidan bir qismigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199871" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suv
			transportida xavfsizlikni taĘĽminlovchi signal va aloqa
			inshootlari hamda qurilmalarini shikastlantirish â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ndan bir qismigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” beshdan bir qismidan ikkidan bir qismigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044365" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">119-modda.
			Kemalarni yoki kichik hajmli kemalarni roĘ»yxatdan oĘ»tkazish,
			shuningdek bunday kemalardan va ular turadigan bazalardan
			(inshootlardan) foydalanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik
			hujjatlarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044367" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kemalarni
			yoki kichik hajmli kemalarni roĘ»yxatdan oĘ»tkazish qoidalarini
			buzish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” ikki baravari miqdorida jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044370" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YongĘ»inga
			qarshi va avariya qutqaruv vositalari bilan taĘĽminlanmagan yoki
			qonunchilik talablariga zid ravishda qayta jihozlangan kemalardan
			yoxud kichik hajmli kemalardan foydalanish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			uch baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044373" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kemani
			yoki motorli kichik hajmli kemani kemalarni boshqarish huquqiga
			ega boĘ»lmagan shaxs tomondan boshqarish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining uch baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044376" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kemalardan
			yoki kichik hajmli kemalardan, shuningdek kemalar yoki kichik
			hajmli kemalar turadigan bazalardan (inshootlardan) foydalanish
			qoidalarini buzish, texnik nosozligi boĘ»lgan, foydalanilishi
			taqiqlangan kemani yoki kichik hajmli kemani boshqarish,
			â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravari,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” uch baravari miqdorida jarima
			solishga yoxud kema haydovchilarini kemani yoki kichik hajmli
			kemani boshqarish huquqidan bir yilu olti oy muddatga mahrum
			etishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199880" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">120-modda.
			Portlarda yuklarni ortish, tushirish va taxlash qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199882" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Portlarda
			yuklarni ortish, tushirish va taxlash qoidalarini buzish â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikkidan bir qismidan bir baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199884" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">121-modda.
			Transport vositalarining ichki jihozlariga shikast yetkazish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199886" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Lokomotivlar,
			vagonlar, daryo va havo kemalari, xuddi shuningdek hamma turdagi
			maxsus transportlarning oynalari va ichki jihozlariga shikast
			yetkazish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravaridan oĘ»n
			besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199889" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Avtobuslarning,
			taksilarning, marshrut taksilarining, shahar elektr transportining
			va metropoliten vagonlarining oynalari va ichki jihozlariga
			shikast yetkazish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3984751" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">123-modda.
			Transport vositalaridan axlat yoki boshqa narsalarni tashlab
			yuborish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400078" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Poyezdlarning
			vagonlari, avtotransport vositalari, shahar yoĘ»lovchilar
			transportidan va suv transportidan axlat yoki boshqa narsalarni
			tashlab yuborish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199899" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">124-modda.
			Transportda yongĘ»in xavfsizligi qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199901" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transportda
			belgilangan yongĘ»in xavfsizligi qoidalarini buzish â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikkidan bir qismidan bir
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” bir baravaridan uch
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199903" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">125-modda.
			Transport vositalaridan foydalanish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3034050" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haydovchilarning
			transport vositalarini boshqarish va yoĘ»lovchilar tashishda
			xavfsizlik kamaridan foydalanish qoidalariga, xuddi shuningdek
			mototsikl va mopedlar haydovchilarining motoshlemlardan
			foydalanish qoidalariga rioya etmasligi, â€”maĘĽmuriy
			ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikkidan bir
			qismi miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5451220" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haydovchilarning
			belgilangan tartibda roĘ»yxatdan oĘ»tkazilmagan yoki majburiy
			texnik koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazilmagan yoxud foydalanish man etiladigan
			darajada nosozligi boĘ»lgan yoki qonunchilikda belgilangan
			tartibda favqulodda vaziyatda oynani sindirish uchun
			foydalaniladigan bolgĘ»acha bilan jihozlanmagan, oĘ»t oĘ»chirgich,
			tibbiyot qutichasi, avariya holatida toĘ»xtaganligini bildiruvchi
			belgi va nur qaytargichli kamzul bilan butlanmagan, xuddi
			shuningdek ishlayotganida tashqariga chiqarayotgan
			ifloslantiruvchi moddalarning miqdori, shuningdek shovqin darajasi
			belgilangan normalardan ortiq boĘ»lgan transport vositalarini
			boshqarishi, â€”maĘĽmuriy ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining ikkidan bir qismi miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1780243" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haydovchilarning
			tormoz tizimida, rul boshqaruvida yoki ulovchi qurilmada nosozligi
			boĘ»lgan yoxud tegishli ruxsatnomasiz qayta jihozlangan transport
			vositalarini boshqarishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044380" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xalqaro
			avtomobil tashuvlarini hamda M3 va N3 toifali avtotransport
			vositalarida yoĘ»lovchilarni va yuklarni shaharlararo (400 km va
			undan ortiq masofada) tashishni raqamli nazorat uskunalarisiz
			(taxografsiz, nosoz taxografdan foydalangan holda yoki taxografni
			oĘ»chirib qoĘ»ygan holda, haydovchining taxografda
			foydalaniladigan kartaga ega boĘ»lmagan holatida) amalga oshirish,
			shuningdek xalqaro va shaharlararo avtomobil tashuvlarini amalga
			oshirishda haydovchilarning mehnat va dam olish rejimini buzishi,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravari miqdorida jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1294644" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Foydalanish
			belgilangan tartibda man etilgan transport vositalarini, xuddi
			shuningdek davlat raqam belgisi oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan yechib
			olingan transport vositalarini boshqarish â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400097" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			raqam belgisi ayni shu transport vositasiga tegishli boĘ»lmagan
			transport vositasini boshqarish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			oĘ»n baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199917" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Korxonalar,
			muassasalar va tashkilotlarga qarashli transport vositalarini
			ishdan tashqari vaqtda ulardan foydalanish shartlariga muvofiq
			keladigan tarzda maxsus jihozlanmagan joyda saqlash â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga
			esa â€” ikki baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044385" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuk
			avtotransportida tovar-transport yuk xatlarini, xalqaro yuk
			tashishda yoĘ»l varaqalarini, shuningdek yoĘ»lovchilar
			avtotransportida chipta-hisob va yoĘ»l varaqalarini yuritish
			boĘ»yicha belgilangan talablarni buzish, â€”fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravari, mansabdor shaxslarga esa uch
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7632875" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199903"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">125</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(mopedlardan
			tashqari),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1780585"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">125</span></span></font><font href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199920"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">126</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1780732"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1101359"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">129</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199952"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">130</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199957"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">131</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199971"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">133</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199976"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">134</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">135</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1346568"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">135</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781426"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">136</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200011"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">139</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400878"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">140-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;transport
			vositalari deyilganda barcha turdagi avtomobillar va traktorlar,
			qishloq xoĘ»jalik, melioratsiya, yoĘ»l-qurilish mashinalari va
			boshqa oĘ»ziyurar mashinalar, tramvay va trolleybuslar, shuningdek
			mototsikllar va boshqa mexanik transport vositalarini tushunmoq
			kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1780587" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">125<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Yuk tashish qoidalarini, shatakka olish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400127" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuk
			tashish qoidalarini, xuddi shuningdek shatakka olish qoidalarini
			buzish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravari miqdorida
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400134" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuk
			bilan yoki yuksiz holdagi gabarit oĘ»lchamlari, shuningdek umumiy
			haqiqiy vazni, oĘ»qqa tushuvchi ogĘ»irligi belgilangan normadan
			oĘ»n foizgacha ortiq boĘ»lgan transport vositalarida yoĘ»lga
			chiqish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravari miqdorida
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400138" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuk
			bilan yoki yuksiz holdagi gabarit oĘ»lchamlari, shuningdek umumiy
			haqiqiy vazni, oĘ»qqa tushuvchi ogĘ»irligi belgilangan normadan
			oĘ»n foizdan yigirma foizgacha ortiq boĘ»lgan transport
			vositalarida yoĘ»lga chiqish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
			besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400145" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tegishli
			ruxsatnomasiz ogĘ»ir vaznli, yirik gabaritli, xavfli yuklarni
			tashish, yuk bilan yoki yuksiz holdagi gabarit oĘ»lchamlari,
			shuningdek umumiy haqiqiy vazni, oĘ»qqa tushuvchi ogĘ»irligi
			belgilangan normadan yigirma foizdan ortiq boĘ»lgan transport
			vositalarida yoĘ»lga chiqish, xuddi shuningdek ruxsatnomada
			koĘ»rsatilgan harakat yoĘ»nalishidan chetga chiqish, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400153" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400134"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400138"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400145"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganda avtotransport vositalarining
			gabarit va vazn parametrlarini aniqlashda oĘ»lchash asbobidagi
			yoĘ»l qoĘ»yilishi mumkin boĘ»lgan jami xatolar hisobga olinib,
			oĘ»lchash asbobida qayd etilgan gabarit va vazn parametrlaridan
			ikki foizli farq chegirib tashlangan holda, maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi
			qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5032523" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">125<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Boshqa davlatlarda roĘ»yxatdan oĘ»tkazilgan yuklarni va (yoki)
			yoĘ»lovchilarni tashish uchun moĘ»ljallangan avtotransport
			vositalaridan qonunga xilof ravishda foydalanish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5032527" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xorijiy
			tashuvchilarga tegishli boĘ»lgan, shu jumladan ular tomonidan
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududiga vaqtincha olib kirilgan
			avtotransport vositalarida yoĘ»lovchilar va yuklarni OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi hududida joylashgan punktlar oĘ»rtasida tashish
			(kabotaj), agar OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining xalqaro
			shartnomalarida boshqacha qoida nazarda tutilmagan boĘ»lsa,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yigirma baravari miqdorida jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044391" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Avtomobil
			transportida yuk va yoĘ»lovchilarni xalqaro yoĘ»nalishlarda
			tashish bilan avtotransport vositasining OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			hududi boĘ»ylab oĘ»tishi va tegishli tashish turini amalga
			oshirishi huquqini beruvchi ruxsatnomasiz shugĘ»ullanish,
			ruxsatnoma toĘ»ldirish boĘ»yicha talablarni buzish, shuningdek
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududi boĘ»ylab tranzit harakatlanish
			uchun moĘ»ljallangan yoĘ»nalishlarga rioya etmaslik, agar
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining xalqaro shartnomalarida boshqacha
			qoida nazarda tutilmagan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			yigirma baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400178" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">125</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">3</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Siqilgan tabiiy gazda, suyultirilgan neft gazida yoki dizel va
			gazsimon yoqilgĘ»i aralashmasida ishlaydigan transport
			vositalaridan foydalanishda xavfsizlik qoidalarini buzish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400185" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Siqilgan
			tabiiy gazda, suyultirilgan neft gazida yoki dizel va gazsimon
			yoqilgĘ»i aralashmasida ishlaydigan transport vositalaridan
			foydalanishda xavfsizlik qoidalarini buzish, â€”fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari miqdorida, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa oĘ»n baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044396" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">125<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.
			Avtomobil transportida muntazam yoĘ»nalishlarda yoĘ»lovchilarni
			tashish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044398" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Avtomobil
			transportida yoĘ»lovchilarni muntazam yoĘ»nalishlarda tashish
			huquqini tasdiqlovchi guvohnoma yonida boĘ»lmagan holda yoĘ»lovchi
			tashish, belgilangan yoĘ»l haqi tariflarini oshirish, muntazam
			yoĘ»nalish boĘ»yicha tasdiqlangan qatnov jadvaliga amal qilmaslik,
			tasdiqlangan yoĘ»nalish sxemasidan chetga chiqish, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4356344" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">126-modda.
			KoĘ»zgusimon va (yoki) tusi oĘ»zgartirilgan (qoraytirilgan)
			oynali, shuningdek tevarak-atrofni koĘ»rishni cheklaydigan
			qoplamali transport vositalaridan foydalanish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4356346" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Texnik
			reglamentga muvofiq boĘ»lmagan koĘ»zgusimon va (yoki) tusi
			oĘ»zgartirilgan (qoraytirilgan) oynali transport vositalaridan,
			xuddi shuningdek haydovchining oĘ»rnidan tevarak-atrofni koĘ»rishni
			cheklaydigan qoĘ»shimcha narsalar oĘ»rnatilgan yoki qoplamalar
			surtilgan transport vositalaridan foydalanish, bundan oynalar
			tusini oĘ»zgartirish (qoraytirish) uchun tegishli ruxsatnoma
			berilgan transport vositalari mustasno, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining yigirma besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4356349" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining qirq baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2727408" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">127-modda.
			Transport vositalarining tovush chiqaruvchi, yorituvchi va boshqa
			qurilmalaridan foydalanish, ularni oĘ»rnatish qoidalarini buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199929" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tovush
			signalini sababsiz berish, transport vositalariga uni ishlab
			chiqargan korxona nazarda tutmagan tovush chiqaruvchi va
			yorituvchi qurilmalarni oĘ»rnatish, xuddi shuningdek ularni
			oĘ»zgartirib oĘ»rnatish â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2727419" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tegishli
			ruxsat olmay turib transport vositalariga tovush chiqaruvchi va
			yorituvchi maxsus qurilmalarni oĘ»rnatish, xuddi shuningdek davlat
			raqam belgilarini koĘ»rish imkoniyatini cheklaydigan, ularni
			anglashga toĘ»sqinlik qiladigan turli ashyolar oĘ»rnatish va
			qoplama surtish â€”ana shu qurilmalarni musodara qilib,
			fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan uch
			baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” uch baravaridan besh
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7480970" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128-modda.
			Haydovchilarning transport vositalarini trotuarlardan, piyodalar
			va velosiped yoĘ»lkalaridan, yashil maydonlardan yurgizishi, yoĘ»l
			belgilari va yoĘ»l harakatining boshqa qoidalari talablariga rioya
			etmasligi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7480981" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haydovchilarning
			transport vositalarini trotuarlardan, piyodalar yoĘ»lkalaridan,
			velosiped yoĘ»lkalaridan, piyodalar va velosiped yoĘ»lkalaridan,
			ularga tutash hududlarda barpo etilgan yashil maydonlardan (bundan
			maxsus avtotransport vositalari mustasno) yurgizishi, yoĘ»l
			belgilari yoki yoĘ»lning qatnov qismidagi chiziqlar bilan belgilab
			qoĘ»yilgan talablarga rioya etmasligi (bundan ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1780909"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4356369"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1780990"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781002"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7480988"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">128</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">7</span></font></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199952"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">130-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan hollar mustasno), yuk avtomobillarida yoĘ»lning chetki
			chap qatorida harakatlanishi (bundan ruxsat etilgan hollar
			mustasno), yoĘ»nalishli transport vositalari toĘ»xtaydigan
			bekatlardan yoki piyodalar oĘ»tish joylaridan yurish, tashqi
			yoritish asboblaridan foydalanish qoidalarini buzishi, xuddi
			shuningdek yoĘ»lovchilarga yoki piyodalarga loyqa
			sachratishi-bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari miqdorida
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5754985" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Transport vositasini boshqarish vaqtida haydovchilarning
			telefondan foydalanishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5754994" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositasini boshqarish vaqtida haydovchilarning telefondan
			foydalanishi (bundan telefondan quloqchinlar orqali va qoĘ»llarni
			ishlatmasdan turib soĘ»zlashuvlar olib borish imkoniyatini
			beradigan boshqa uskunalar orqali foydalanish mustasno), â€”maĘĽmuriy
			ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5755039" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Transport vositasini boshqarish vaqtida tele-, videodasturlarni
			tomosha qilish maqsadida monitordan (displeydan) foydalanish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5755041" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositasini boshqarish vaqtida tele-, videodasturlarni tomosha
			qilish maqsadida transport vositasi salonining old qismiga
			oĘ»rnatilgan monitordan (displeydan) foydalanish, â€”maĘĽmuriy
			ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400359" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			Transport vositalari haydovchilarining belgilangan harakat
			tezligini oshirib yuborishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400365" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining belgilangan harakat tezligini soatiga
			20 kilometrdan koĘ»p boĘ»lmagan kattalikda oshirib yuborishi,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari miqdorida jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400374" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining belgilangan harakat tezligini soatiga
			20 kilometrdan ortiq, lekin 40 kilometrdan koĘ»p boĘ»lmagan
			kattalikda oshirib yuborishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400381" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining belgilangan harakat tezligini soatiga
			40 kilometrdan ortiq, lekin 60 kilometrdan koĘ»p boĘ»lmagan
			kattalikda oshirib yuborishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			toĘ»qqiz baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400388" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining belgilangan harakat tezligini soatiga
			60 kilometrdan ortiq kattalikda oshirib yuborishi, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400397" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400365"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			â€” toĘ»rtinchi qismlarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganda tezlikni oĘ»lchaydigan
			maxsus uskunalar va transport vositalari spidometri
			koĘ»rsatkichlaridagi yoĘ»l qoĘ»yilishi mumkin boĘ»lgan jami
			xatolar hisobga olinib, ularda qayd etilgan tezlikdan soatiga 5
			kilometr chegirib tashlangan holda, maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi
			qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4356440" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining svetoforning taqiqlovchi signaliga
			yoki yoĘ»l harakatini tartibga soluvchining taqiqlovchi ishorasiga
			boĘ»ysunmasdan toĘ»xtash chizigĘ»ini bosib kirishi va oĘ»tishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4356445" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Svetoforning
			taqiqlovchi signalida yoki yoĘ»l harakatini tartibga soluvchining
			taqiqlovchi ishorasida yoĘ»lning qatnov qismidagi yoĘ»l chiziqlari
			yoki yoĘ»l belgilari bilan belgilangan toĘ»xtash chizigĘ»ini bosib
			kirish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikkidan bir baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4356450" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining svetoforning taqiqlovchi signaliga
			yoki yoĘ»l harakatini tartibga soluvchining taqiqlovchi ishorasiga
			boĘ»ysunmasdan oĘ»tishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1780991" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">5</font>-modda.
			Transport vositalari haydovchilarining xalaqit berishi yoki
			avariya holatini yuzaga keltirishi, yoĘ»lning qarama-qarshi
			harakatlanish uchun moĘ»ljallangan tomoniga yoki boĘ»lagiga
			chiqishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4914300" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tezkor
			va maxsus xizmatlarning koĘ»k yoki qizil yoxud koĘ»k va qizil
			rangli yaltiroq mayoqchani yoqqan holda hamda maxsus tovushli
			signal bilan yaqinlashib kelayotgan transport vositalari toĘ»siqsiz
			oĘ»tib ketishi uchun transport vositalari haydovchilari tomonidan
			xalaqit berish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1780996" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining yoĘ»lning qarama-qarshi harakatlanish
			uchun moĘ»ljallangan tomoniga yoki boĘ»lagiga yoĘ»l harakati
			qoidalarini buzgan holda chiqishi, xuddi shuningdek avariya holati
			yuzaga kelishiga sabab boĘ»lgan, yaĘĽni yoĘ»l harakatining boshqa
			qatnashchilarini tezlikni, harakat yoĘ»nalishini keskin
			oĘ»zgartirishga yoki oĘ»z xavfsizligini yoxud boshqa fuqarolarning
			xavfsizligini taĘĽminlash uchun oĘ»zga choralarni koĘ»rishga
			majbur qiluvchi huquqbuzarlikni sodir etishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»n baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781003" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">6</font>-modda.
			Transport vositalari haydovchilarining toĘ»xtash yoki toĘ»xtab
			turish qoidalarini buzishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781362" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining toĘ»xtash yoki toĘ»xtab turish
			qoidalarini buzishi, â€”maĘĽmuriy ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7480988" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">7</font>-modda.
			YoĘ»nalishli transport vositalari uchun alohida ajratilgan tasmasi
			bor yoĘ»ldan transport vositalarining harakatlanishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7480991" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»nalishli
			transport vositalari uchun alohida ajratilgan tasmasi bor yoĘ»ldan
			transport vositalarining harakatlanishi (bundan ruxsat etilgan
			hollar mustasno), â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7480995" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7480991"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlikni maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir
			yil davomida takror sodir etish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			uch baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400488" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">128</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">8</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Transport vositasida odam tashish qoidalarini buzish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400491" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Odam
			tashish qoidalarini buzish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ikki
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400520" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Avtobus
			va mikroavtobuslarda ichki ishlar organlarining hamrohligisiz odam
			tashish, agar ularning hamrohligida odam tashish shart boĘ»lsa,
			â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari miqdorida jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400534" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">128</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">9</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			Transport vositalarini quvib oĘ»tish&nbsp;qoidalarini buzish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400536" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini quvib oĘ»tish qoidalarini buzish, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400539" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">128</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">10</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.</span></font></strong><span style="font-weight: normal">&nbsp;</span><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">YoĘ»l
			bezoriligi</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400541" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l
			bezoriligi, yaĘĽni transport vositalari haydovchilarining boshqa
			transport vositalarining harakatiga qasddan toĘ»sqinlik qilishi,
			harakatlanish burchagini va (yoki) tezligini saqlagan holda
			transport vositasini sababsiz sirpantirishi (drift), oĘ»z
			yoĘ»nalishida harakatlanish boĘ»lagini sababsiz keskin ravishda
			uch va undan ortiq marta uzluksiz oĘ»zgartirishi (bundan maxsus
			ajratilgan joylarda sodir etish mustasno) yoki yoĘ»l harakati
			ishtirokchilarining xavfsiz harakatlanishiga tahdid soluvchi yoxud
			transport vositasida yoĘ»l harakatining boshqa ishtirokchilariga
			nisbatan hurmatsizlikda ifodalangan boshqa xatti-harakatlarni
			namoyishkorona sodir etishi, â€”transport vositalarini boshqarish
			huquqidan bir yildan ikki yilgacha muddatga mahrum qilib, bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yigirma besh baravari miqdorida jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400545" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqi
			boĘ»lmagan yoki transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqidan mahrum
			etilgan shaxs tomonidan sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			yoki oĘ»n besh sutka muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781377" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">129-modda.
			Transport vositalari haydovchilarining yoĘ»l harakati
			xavfsizligiga tahdid soluvchi guruh boĘ»lib harakat qilishda
			qatnashishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400563" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining yoĘ»l harakati xavfsizligiga tahdid
			soluvchi yoki avariya holatini keltirib chiqaruvchi guruh boĘ»lib
			harakat qilishda qatnashishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199952" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">130-modda.
			Transport vositalari haydovchilarining temir yoĘ»lning oĘ»tish
			joylaridan oĘ»tish qoidalarini buzishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199954" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining temir yoĘ»lning oĘ»tish joylaridan
			oĘ»tish qoidalarini buzishi â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh
			baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400603" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">131-modda.
			Transport vositalarini mastlik holatida boshqarish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400606" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haydovchilarning
			transport vositalarini alkogolli ichimlikdan mastlik holatida yoki
			giyohvandlik vositalari, ularning analoglari, psixotrop yoki
			shaxsning aql-idrokiga taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatuvchi boshqa moddalar
			taĘĽsiri ostida boshqarishi, â€”transport vositalarini boshqarish
			huquqidan uch yil muddatga mahrum qilib, bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining qirq baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400611" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqi
			boĘ»lmagan shaxs tomonidan sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			yoki oĘ»n besh sutka muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044407" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">132-modda.
			Kema haydovchilarining kemalarni yoki kichik hajmli kemalarni mast
			holda boshqarishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044409" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kema
			haydovchilari tomonidan kemalarni yoki kichik hajmli kemalarni
			mast holda boshqarish, shuningdek kemalarni yoki kichik hajmli
			kemalarni boshqarishni alkogolli ichimlikdan, giyohvand modda
			taĘĽsiridan yoki oĘ»zgacha tarzda mast holdagi shaxslarga
			topshirish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga yoxud kema haydovchilarini kemani yoki
			kichik hajmli kemani boshqarish huquqidan ikki yil muddatga mahrum
			etishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199971" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">133-modda.
			Transport vositalari haydovchilarining yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini
			buzishi jabrlanuvchiga yengil tan jarohati yoki ancha miqdorda
			moddiy zarar yetkazilishiga olib kelishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5616202" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzishi
			jabrlanuvchiga yengil tan jarohati yoki ancha miqdorda moddiy
			zarar yetkazilishiga olib kelsa, bundan jabrlanuvchiga yengil tan
			jarohati yetkazilishiga olib kelmagan yoĘ»l-transport hodisasi
			sodir etilganda yoĘ»l-transport hodisasida ishtirok etgan
			haydovchilar tomonidan yoĘ»l-transport hodisasi toĘ»gĘ»risida
			xabarnoma tuzilgan hollar mustasno â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining besh baravaridan yetti baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga yoki transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqidan bir
			yildan uch yilgacha muddatga mahrum etishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4661567" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ancha
			miqdordagi moddiy zarar deganda, bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			besh baravari miqdoridan oshib ketgan zarar tushuniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044414" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">133<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Kemalar, shuningdek kichik hajmli kemalar haydovchilarining
			kemalar yoki kichik hajmli kemalarning harakat (suzish)
			xavfsizligi qoidalarini buzishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044416" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kemalar,
			shuningdek kichik hajmli kemalar haydovchilarining kemalar yoki
			kichik hajmli kemalarning harakat (suzish) xavfsizligi qoidalarini
			buzishi jabrlanuvchiga yengil tan jarohati yoki ancha miqdorda
			moddiy zarar yetkazilishiga olib kelsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining besh baravaridan oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorida jarima
			solishga yoxud kema haydovchilarini kemani yoki kichik hajmli
			kemani boshqarish huquqidan bir yildan uch yilgacha muddatga
			mahrum etishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199976" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">134-modda.
			Haydovchilarning yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzishi transport
			vositalarining yoki boshqa mol-mulkning shikastlanishiga olib
			kelishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5616228" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzishi
			transport vositalari, yoĘ»l harakatini tartibga soluvchi vositalar
			yoki boshqa mol-mulk shikastlanishiga olib kelsa, lekin ancha
			miqdorda moddiy zarar yetkazmasa, bundan yoĘ»l harakatini tartibga
			soluvchi vositalar yoki boshqa mol-mulk shikastlanishiga olib
			kelmagan yoĘ»l-transport hodisasi sodir etilganda yoĘ»l-transport
			hodisasida ishtirok etgan haydovchilar tomonidan yoĘ»l-transport
			hodisasi toĘ»gĘ»risida xabarnoma tuzilgan hollar mustasno â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravaridan toĘ»rt baravarigacha
			miqdorda jarima solishga yoki transport vositasini boshqarish
			huquqidan olti oydan bir yilgacha muddatga mahrum etishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781411" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">135-modda.
			YoĘ»l harakati qoidalarida nazarda tutilgan hujjatlari boĘ»lmagan
			shaxslarning transport vositalarini boshqarishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400635" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini boshqarish huquqini beruvchi hujjatlari, transport
			vositasi roĘ»yxatdan oĘ»tkazilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi, shuningdek
			transport vositasiga egalik qilish, egasi yoĘ»qligida undan
			foydalanish yoki uni tasarruf etish huquqini tasdiqlovchi
			hujjatlari, transport vositalari egalarining fuqarolik
			javobgarligini majburiy sugĘ»urta qilish boĘ»yicha sugĘ»urta
			polisi, oynalar tusini oĘ»zgartirish (qoraytirish) uchun tegishli
			ruxsatnomasi, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududiga chet eldan olib
			kirilgan transport vositasi uchun bojxona organlari tomonidan
			berilgan hujjatlari, qonunchilikda nazarda tutilgan hollarda esa
			litsenziya kartochkasi yoki yoĘ»l varaqasi, yuridik shaxslarning
			transport vositalari haydovchilar uchun, shu jumladan yoĘ»lovchi
			yoki yuk tashish faoliyatini amalga oshiruvchi haydovchilar uchun
			malaka oshirishdan oĘ»tganligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi sertifikati (bundan
			transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqini beruvchi guvohnomani
			almashtirish yoki yoĘ»qolgan guvohnoma oĘ»rniga boshqasini berish
			hollarini istisno qilgan holda, guvohnoma olingan paytdan
			eĘĽtiboran ikki yillik davr mustasno) yonida boĘ»lmagan holda,
			xuddi shuningdek transport vositalarini olib kirganligini
			tasdiqlovchi bojxona organlari tomonidan berilgan tegishli
			belgilar qoĘ»yilgan hujjatlarining muddati oĘ»tgan
			haydovchilarning transport vositalarini boshqarishi, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400660" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini boshqarish huquqiga ega boĘ»lmagan yoxud aynan shu
			transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqini beruvchi hujjatlari
			mavjud boĘ»lmagan shaxslarning transport vositalarini boshqarishi,
			xuddi shuningdek transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqiga ega
			boĘ»lmagan shaxsga transport vositalarini boshqarishning
			topshirilishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199988" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini boshqarish huquqidan mahrum etilgan shaxslarning
			bunday vositalarni boshqarishi â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			ellik baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400687" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haydovchining
			yonida OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining ichki ishlar organlari yoxud
			konsullik muassasalari tomonidan berilgan biometrik pasport yoki
			identifikatsiyalovchi ID-kartasi mavjud boĘ»lgan taqdirda, uning
			transport vositasini boshqarish huquqini beruvchi hujjatni,
			transport vositasi roĘ»yxatdan oĘ»tkazilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi,
			shuningdek transport vositasiga egalik qilish, egasi yoĘ»qligida
			undan foydalanish yoki uni tasarruf etish huquqini tasdiqlovchi
			hujjatlarni, transport vositalari egalarining fuqarolik
			javobgarligini majburiy sugĘ»urta qilish boĘ»yicha sugĘ»urta
			polisini oynalar tusini oĘ»zgartirish (qoraytirish) uchun tegishli
			ruxsatnomasini oĘ»z yonida olib yurishi talab etilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5451227" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">135<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Transport vositalari egalarining fuqarolik javobgarligini majburiy
			sugĘ»urta qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikning talablarini
			buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1346582" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari egalarining fuqarolik javobgarligini majburiy sugĘ»urta
			qilish boĘ»yicha sugĘ»urta polislarida nazarda tutilmagan
			foydalanish davrida transport vositalarini boshqarish, xuddi
			shuningdek faqat mazkur sugĘ»urta polislarida koĘ»rsatilgan
			haydovchilar ayni shu transport vositalarini boshqarishi
			toĘ»gĘ»risida mazkur sugĘ»urta polislarida nazarda tutilgan
			shartlarni buzgan holda transport vositalarini boshqarish,
			â€”maĘĽmuriy ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			ikkidan bir qismi miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781427" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">136-modda.
			Transport vositalari haydovchilarining va yoĘ»l harakati boshqa
			ishtirokchilarining mastligi yoki mast emasligini aniqlash uchun
			tekshiruvdan oĘ»tishdan boĘ»yin tovlashi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400754" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalari haydovchilarining mastlik holatida yoki giyohvandlik
			vositalari, ularning analoglari, psixotrop yoki shaxsning
			aql-idrokiga taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatuvchi boshqa moddalar taĘĽsiri ostida
			ekanligini belgilangan tartibda aniqlash uchun tekshiruvdan
			oĘ»tishdan boĘ»yin tovlashi, â€”transport vositalarini boshqarish
			huquqidan uch yil muddatga mahrum qilib, bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400781" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqiga
			ega boĘ»lmagan shaxs tomonidan sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			yoki oĘ»n besh sutkagacha maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180921" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781428"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlikning skuterni, mopedni, velosipedni, individual
			harakatlanish vositasini, ulovli aravani boshqarib borayotgan
			shaxs tomonidan sodir etilishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			uch baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-199997" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">137-modda.
			YoĘ»l-transport hodisasi yuz bergan joydan ketib qolish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5454909" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l-transport
			hodisasi qatnashchilarining belgilangan qoidalarni buzgan holda
			hodisa yuz bergan joydan ketib qolishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5454916" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l-transport
			hodisasi qatnashchilarining belgilangan qoidalarni buzgan holda
			hodisa yuz bergan joydan ketib qolishi, agar ushbu yoĘ»l-transport
			hodisasi jabrlanuvchiga yengil tan jarohati yoki ancha miqdorda
			moddiy zarar yetkazilishiga olib kelgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravari miqdorida jarima solishga
			yoki transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqidan uch yil muddatga
			mahrum etishga yoxud oĘ»n besh sutkagacha muddatga maĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781443" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">138-modda.
			Piyodalar va yoĘ»l harakati boshqa ishtirokchilarining yoĘ»l
			harakati qoidalarini buzishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180936" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Piyodalarning
			yoĘ»l harakatini tartibga soluvchi signallarga boĘ»ysunmasligi,
			ularning yoĘ»lning harakat qismini belgilanmagan joylardan kesib
			oĘ»tishi, piyodalar yoĘ»lning qatnov qismida, shu jumladan
			piyodalar oĘ»tish joyida harakatlanayotganda telefondan
			foydalanishi, kitoblarni yoki davriy nashrlarni oĘ»qishi,
			videomateriallarni tomosha qilishi hamda audiomateriallarni
			eshitishi, shuningdek eĘĽtiborni chalgĘ»itadigan boshqa elektron
			vositalardan foydalanishi, shuningdek skuterlar, mopedlar va
			velosipedlarni, individual harakatlanish vositalarini, ulovli
			aravani boshqarib borayotgan shaxslarning hamda yoĘ»ldan
			foydalanuvchi boshqa shaxslarning yoĘ»l harakatini tartibga
			soluvchi signallarga boĘ»ysunmasligi, ustunlik beruvchi,
			taqiqlovchi yoki koĘ»rsatma beruvchi yoĘ»l belgilari talablariga
			rioya etmasligi, â€”maĘĽmuriy ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uchdan bir qismi miqdorida jarima solishga
			sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200006" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haydovchilarga
			har xil xizmat koĘ»rsatish maqsadida yoĘ»lning qatnov qismida
			fuqarolarning turishi, yoĘ»llarga ajratilgan mintaqa tegrasida mol
			boqish â€”maĘĽmuriy ogohlantirishga yoki bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining ikkidan bir qismi miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200009" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034066"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;yoki&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200006"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>qismida
			koĘ»rsatilgan shaxslarning yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzishi
			avariya holatini vujudga keltirsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining bir baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3034089" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositasi harakatlanayotgan vaqtda yoĘ»lovchi tomonidan tana
			qismlarini (qoĘ»ldan tashqari) salondan chiqarish, â€”bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining bir baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180942" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Belgilangan
			tartibda nur qaytargichlar va chiroqlar bilan jihozlanmagan
			individual harakatlanish vositalarini, skuterlar, mopedlar,
			velosipedlarni hamda ulovli aravani boshqarish, shuningdek
			individual harakatlanish vositalarining va skuterlarning
			haydovchilari tomonidan odamlarni tashish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining ikkidan bir qismi miqdorida jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180946" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Skuter,
			moped, velosipedni, individual harakatlanish vositasini, ulovli
			aravani boshqarib borayotgan shaxsning alkogolli ichimlik,
			giyohvandlik moddasi taĘĽsirida yoki oĘ»zgacha tarzda mast boĘ»lgan
			holda yoĘ»l harakati qoidalarini buzishi, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining uch baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400833" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">139-modda.
			Nosoz transport vositalarini yoĘ»lga chiqarish va transport
			vositalaridan foydalanish qoidalarini boshqacha tarzda buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400838" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarining texnik holati va ulardan foydalanish uchun masĘĽul
			boĘ»lgan shaxs tomonidan belgilangan tartibda roĘ»yxatdan
			oĘ»tkazilmagan yoki majburiy texnik koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazilmagan
			transport vositalarini yoĘ»lga chiqarish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining ikki baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400845" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarining texnik holati va ulardan foydalanish uchun masĘĽul
			boĘ»lgan shaxs tomonidan nosozligi boĘ»lgan yoki muayyan shartlar
			tufayli transport vositasidan foydalanish taqiqlangan yoki
			tegishli ruxsatnomasiz qayta jihozlangan transport vositalarini
			yoĘ»lga chiqarish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining besh baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400878" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">140-modda.
			Mastlik holatidagi shaxsning transport vositasini boshqarishiga
			yoĘ»l qoĘ»yish yoki boshqarishni unga topshirish</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400882" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalaridan foydalanish uchun masĘĽul boĘ»lgan shaxs tomonidan
			mastlik holatida yoki giyohvandlik vositalari, ularning
			analoglari, psixotrop yoki shaxsning aql-idrokiga taĘĽsir
			koĘ»rsatuvchi boshqa moddalar taĘĽsiri ostida boĘ»lgan
			haydovchilarning yoki transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqi
			boĘ»lmagan shaxslarning transport vositalarini boshqarishiga yoĘ»l
			qoĘ»yish, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»ttiz baravari
			miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400897" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositasining egasi yoki undan foydalanish huquqiga ega boĘ»lgan
			shaxs tomonidan bila turib mastlik holatidagi yoki giyohvandlik
			vositalari, ularning analoglari, psixotrop yoki shaxsning
			aql-idrokiga taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatuvchi boshqa moddalar taĘĽsiri
			ostidagi shaxsga transport vositasini boshqarishni topshirish,
			â€”transport vositalarini boshqarish huquqidan ikki yildan uch
			yilgacha muddatga mahrum qilib, bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			oĘ»ttiz baravari miqdorida jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7400907" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400897"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;koĘ»rsatilgan huquqbuzarlik
			maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan keyin bir yil davomida
			takror sodir etilgan boĘ»lsa, â€”bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			ellik baravari miqdorida jarima solishga yoki oĘ»n besh sutka
			muddatga maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200023" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">142-modda.
			Xavfli moddalar va ashyolarni transportda tashish qoidalarini
			buzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200025" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Temir
			yoĘ»l, havo va suv transportida qoĘ»l yuki sifatida yonuvchan,
			zaharlovchi, tez alangalanuvchi, portlovchi hamda zaharli moddalar
			va ashyolarni olib yurish qoidalarini buzish â€”bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining bir baravaridan uch baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200028" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuk
			saqlash kamerasiga portlovchi, tez alangalanuvchi, zaharli va
			badboĘ»y moddalar va ashyolarni topshirish â€”ana shu moddalar va
			ashyolarni haqini toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yib yoki olib
			qoĘ»ymay yoxud musodara qilib yoki musodara qilmay, bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining bir baravaridan ikki baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200031" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Trolleybusda,
