			baravaridan oltmish baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga sabab
			boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200962" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">UCHINCHI
			BOĘ»LIM<br/>
MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIKLAR TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI ISHLARNI
			KOĘ»RIB CHIQISHGA VAKOLATI BOĘ»LGAN ORGANLAR (MANSABDOR SHAXSLAR)</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200963" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XVII
			bob. UMUMIY QOIDALAR</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200964" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">242-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga vakolati boĘ»lgan organlar (mansabdor shaxslar)</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200965" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5219967" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudlari, qonunda nazarda
			tutilgan hollarda esa iqtisodiy sudlar va fuqarolik ishlari
			boĘ»yicha sudlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437359" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			bolalar masalalari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) komissiyalari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4356717" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			ichki ishlar organlari (mansabdor shaxslari), davlat inspeksiyasi
			organlari (mansabdor shaxslari) va ushbu Kodeks bilan vakolat
			berilgan boshqa organlar (mansabdor shaxslar) koĘ»rib chiqadilar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437374" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">243-modda.
			Bolalar masalalari boĘ»yicha komissiyalarning vakolatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437395" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bolalar
			masalalari boĘ»yicha komissiyalar oĘ»zlariga taalluqli maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni komissiya tarkibi
			aĘĽzolarining kamida yarmi mavjud boĘ»lganda koĘ»rib chiqishga,
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Maxsus
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			jazolarni oĘ»zlariga berilgan vakolatlar doirasida qoĘ»llashga
			hamda oddiy koĘ»pchilik ovoz bilan qarorlar qabul qilishga
			haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200972" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">244-modda.
			Mansabdor shaxslarning vakolatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5452930" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni ushbu Kodeksning
			242-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200969"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">4-bandida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan
			organlar nomidan koĘ»rib chiquvchi mansabdor shaxslarning roĘ»yxati
			qonunchilik bilan belgilab qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200974" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga
			vakolati boĘ»lgan mansabdor shaxslar ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Maxsus
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			jazo choralarini oĘ»z vakolatlari doirasida va faqat xizmat
			burchini bajarib turgan chogĘ»dagina qoĘ»llanishlari mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-200975" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XVIII
			bob. MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIKLAR TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI ISHLARNING
			TAALLUQLILIGI</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5220001" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">245-modda.
			Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8089805" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlar ushbu

		<div id="-5220120" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			huquqbuzar huquqbuzarlik faktini inkor etsa, jinoyat ishlari
			boĘ»yicha sudlar maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi boshqa
			ishlarni ham, xuddi shuningdek sodir etilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlikning kam ahamiyatliligi sababli huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikdan ozod qilish haqidagi yoki yengilroq maĘĽmuriy jazo
			qoĘ»llash toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masalalarni hal etish uchun oĘ»zlariga
			topshirilgan ishlarni ham bevosita koĘ»rib chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8089811" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">

			ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlar yakka tartibdagi tadbirkorlar va (yoki)

			subyektlarining mansabdor shaxslari va (yoki) boshqa xodimlari
			tomonidan tadbirkorlik faoliyatini amalga oshirish chogĘ»ida sodir

		<div id="-7354460" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddada nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlar jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudining tergov
			sudyasi tomonidan koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3376391" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">245<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Iqtisodiy sudlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7984670" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iqtisodiy
			sudlar iqtisodiy nizolarni hal etish chogĘ»ida maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan hollarda ushbu Kodeks
			175-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-336534"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200437"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">180</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200441"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">181-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni
			koĘ»rib chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769948" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">245<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Adliya organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769951" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Adliya
			organlariga ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5452889"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">215</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir. Adliya organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va jarima tariqasidagi
			maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769953" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi adliya vaziri va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769955" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Adliya vazirligining Davlat xizmatlari departamenti
			boshligĘ»i;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769957" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi adliya vaziri va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari, viloyatlar va
			Toshkent shahar adliya boshqarmalarining boshliqlari hamda
			ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7704345" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7704045"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">197</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">8</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6688088"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">198</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5227520"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">198</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">4</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2973620"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">239</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-947341"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">239</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			239<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7704338"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi

			huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda, adliya organlarining

		<div id="-6524097" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi huzuridagi Majburiy ijro byurosi
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga hamda maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasining Bosh davlat ijrochisi, QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi, viloyatlar va Toshkent shahrining bosh davlat
			ijrochilari, ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari, shuningdek OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi huzuridagi Majburiy ijro
			byurosining tuman (shahar) boĘ»limlari boshliqlari haqlidir.</span></p>

			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston

			qismi),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5613595"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">69-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(qishloq

			va suv xoĘ»jaligiga oid qismi),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">104</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">104</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">112-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			125-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">oltinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">yettinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">135</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">139</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">140-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(qishloq
			xoĘ»jaligi, melioratsiya va yoĘ»l qurilishi texnikasiga oid
			qismi),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">200</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">212</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">213</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">214</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">227</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">14</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(qishloq
			xoĘ»jaligiga oid qismi) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7633690" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Agrosanoat majmui
			ustidan nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi nomidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish va
			maĘĽmuriy jazolarni qoĘ»llashga Inspeksiya boshligĘ»i va uning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari, Inspeksiya hududiy boshqarmalarining hamda
			Inspeksiya tumanlar (Quvasoy shahar) boĘ»limlarining boshliqlari
			va boshliq oĘ»rinbosarlari haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5823708" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">245<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">8</font>-modda.

			subyektlarining huquqlari va qonuniy manfaatlarini himoya qilish
			boĘ»yicha vakil hamda uning devoni xodimlari</span></p>
		</div>

			241</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">4</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2735774"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">241</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2735849"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">241</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">8</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5452924"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">241</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">10</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda

			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">245<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">9</font>-modda.
			Litsenziyalash, ruxsat berish va xabardor qilish tartib-taomillari
			sohasidagi vakolatli organlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5678622" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Litsenziyalash,
			ruxsat berish va xabardor qilish tartib-taomillari sohasidagi
			vakolatli organlar, shuningdek ularning hududiy boĘ»linmalari

			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5678604"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">165-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzadi.</span></p>

			Inspeksiya boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari, Inspeksiyaning
			boĘ»lim boshliqlari, Inspeksiya hududiy boshqarmalarining

			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">247-modda.
			Bolalar masalalari boĘ»yicha komissiyalar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7403227" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bolalar
			masalalari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) komissiyalari voyaga yetmagan
			shaxslar sodir etgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqadi, bundan ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4356544"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194,</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4575495"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,
			va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6447552"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">196</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan ishlar mustasno. Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198117"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a 			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar faqat oĘ»ziga
			mazkur huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish kelib tushgan organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) uni bolalar masalalari boĘ»yicha komissiyalarga
			koĘ»rib chiqish uchun topshirgan hollardagina ushbu komissiyalar
			tomonidan koĘ»rib chiqiladi. Bolalar masalalari boĘ»yicha
			komissiyalar voyaga yetmaganlarning ota-onalariga yoki ular
			oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxslarga taalluqli boĘ»lgan, ushbu Kodeks
			47-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198011"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3500214"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni ham koĘ»rib chiqadi.</span></p>

			qismida, 113-moddasining toĘ»rtinchi qismida, 114, 115,
			128<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">6</font>-moddalarida,
			138-moddasida (piyodalarga nisbatan), 187-moddasining birinchi
			qismida nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar uchun â€”
			jamoat tartibini saqlash xizmati boshligĘ»i, uning oĘ»rinbosarlari,
			patrul-post xizmatini tashkil etish boĘ»limining boshligĘ»i, muhim
			topshiriqlar boĘ»yicha inspektori, katta inspektori, jamoat
			tartibini saqlash boshqarmasi (boĘ»lim, boĘ»linma) boshliqlari,
			uning oĘ»rinbosarlari, patrul-post xizmati saf boĘ»linmalari
			(brigada, batalyon, otryad) komandiri yoki komandirining
			oĘ»rinbosari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8153673" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			modda ikkinchi qismining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=27.10.2020%2000#-5071405"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">2
			â€” 8-bandlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan ichki
			ishlar organlari xodimlari ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4775812"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">54-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni
			koĘ»rib chiqishga hamda maĘĽmuriy jazoni faqat karantinli va inson
			uchun xavfli boĘ»lgan boshqa yuqumli kasalliklar paydo boĘ»lishi
			hamda tarqalishi munosabati bilan tegishli hududlarda yoki
			obyektlarda cheklovchi tadbirlar (karantin) joriy etilgan
			taqdirda, qoĘ»llashga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543601" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ichki
			ishlar organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			bayonnomani tuzishga ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4358425"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan mansabdor
			shaxslardan tashqari quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>

			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3984659"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">91</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200150"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">161-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,

			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200582"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">188</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1626241"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">188</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200601"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">192-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8233697" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasi organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga hamda
			jarima tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga
			quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8233698" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasining Jamoat tartibini saqlashni
			tashkil etish boshqarmasi boshligĘ»i, uning oĘ»rinbosari va boĘ»lim
			boshliqlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8233699" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasining Surishtiruvni muvofiqlashtirish
			boshqarmasi boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8233700" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasining Bolalar bilan ishlash
			boshqarmasi boshligĘ»i, boĘ»lim boshliqlari va katta ofitserlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8233701" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasining QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi,
			viloyatlar va Toshkent shahri boĘ»yicha boshqarmalari boshliqlari,

		</div>

			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasi organlariga taalluqli qismida)
			va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034101"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">210</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarni aniqlagan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy

			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			tartibda uni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga vakolatli boĘ»lgan organga (mansabdor shaxsga) koĘ»rib
			chiqish uchun yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5865929" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">248<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara
			qoĘ»shinlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6448735" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara qoĘ»shinlariga
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200857"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">224-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va
			224<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1256720"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,
			225-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6448592"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200978"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052517"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5865931" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara qoĘ»shinlari
			boĘ»linmalarining boshliqlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara
			qoĘ»shinlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va jarima tarzida maĘĽmuriy jazo
			chorasi qoĘ»llashga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2122892" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">249-modda.
			Davlat yongĘ»in nazorati organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2122893" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			yongĘ»in nazorati organlariga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199179"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">84</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199899"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">124</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200761"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">211-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2122895" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			yongĘ»in nazorati organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va maĘĽmuriy jazo
			qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6840615" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi yongĘ»in nazorati boĘ»yicha bosh davlat inspektori va
			uning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining yetti baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€”
			yigirma baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6840618" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi, viloyatlar, Toshkent shahar, oĘ»ta muhim davlat
			ahamiyatiga molik yoki yongĘ»in va portlash xavfi yuqori boĘ»lgan
			obyektlardagi yongĘ»in nazorati boĘ»yicha bosh davlat
			inspektorlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari, shuningdek OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi yongĘ»in nazorati boĘ»yicha bosh davlat
			inspektorining katta yordamchilari â€” fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining besh baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa
			â€” oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6840621" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi, viloyatlar, Toshkent shahar, oĘ»ta muhim davlat
			ahamiyatiga molik yoki yongĘ»in va portlash xavfi yuqori boĘ»lgan
			obyektlardagi yongĘ»in nazorati boĘ»yicha bosh davlat
			inspektorlarining katta yordamchilari â€” fuqarolarga bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining toĘ»rt baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga
			esa â€” oĘ»n baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6840626" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">tumanlar
			(shaharlar), oĘ»ta muhim davlat ahamiyatiga molik yoki yongĘ»in va
			portlash xavfi yuqori boĘ»lgan obyektlardagi, yongĘ»in nazorati
			boĘ»yicha katta davlat inspektorlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€”
			fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yetti baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6840632" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">tumanlar
			(shaharlar), oĘ»ta muhim davlat ahamiyatiga molik yoki yongĘ»in va
			portlash xavfi yuqori boĘ»lgan obyektlardagi, yongĘ»in nazorati
			boĘ»yicha davlat inspektorlari â€” fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining bir baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” uch
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671635" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">249<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligi
			organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8087985" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning 100-moddasida (yoritish uchun elektr energiyasidan
			xoĘ»jasizlarcha foydalanishga oid qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4671509"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">119</span></span></font></a>,
			132, 133<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>&nbsp;(kichik
			hajmli kemalarga nisbatan) va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1559535"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">204</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda, OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligi organlarining
			mansabdor shaxslari maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671637" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			tartibda sudga yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8087989" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning 100-moddasida (yoritish uchun elektr energiyasidan
			xoĘ»jasizlarcha foydalanishga oid qismida) nazarda tutilgan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligi organlarining profilaktika
			inspektorlari tomonidan tuziladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044497" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4671509"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">119,
			132 va 1331-moddalarida (kichik hajmli kemalarga nisbatan)</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan taqdirda,
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligi Kichik hajmli kemalar
			inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan tuziladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671674" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligi Kichik hajmli kemalar
			inspeksiyasining boshligĘ»i, katta ofitseri va bosh mutaxassisi,
			shuningdek favqulodda vaziyatlar hududiy boshqarmalarining bosh
			inspektorlari Kichik hajmli kemalar inspeksiyasining mansabdor
			shaxslaridir.</span></p>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div id="-201023" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in"><a name="-201023"></a>
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">250-modda.
		Temir yoĘ»l transporti va metropoliten organlari</span></p>
		<div id="-7633842" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Temir
			yoĘ»l transporti organlariga ushbu Kodeks 56<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7632862"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(temir yoĘ»l transportida
			maxsus ajratilmagan joylarda tamaki mahsulotini isteĘĽmol
			qilganlik uchun),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199813"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">113</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199829"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">114-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			shuningdek&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5451189"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">53</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199884"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">121</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3984751"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">123</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199899"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">124-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			142-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200025"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200031"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200037"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">144</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200055"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">145-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			146-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200064"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200067"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(temir yoĘ»l transportida
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etganlik uchun) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201027" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Metropoliten
			organlariga ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199836"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">115-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201028" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Quyidagilar
			temir yoĘ»l transporti va metropoliten organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish va
			maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanishga haqlidirlar:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201029" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">stansiya
			boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosari, vokzal boshligĘ»i va uning
			oĘ»rinbosari, lokomotiv (vagon) deposining boshligĘ»i,
			yoĘ»lovchilar poyezdining boshligĘ»i (yoĘ»lovchilar poyezdining
			mexanik-brigadiri);</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201030" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">yoĘ»lovchilar
			poyezdining nazoratchi-taftishchisi, yoĘ»lovchilar poyezdining
			taftishchi-yoĘ»riqchisi, daromadlarni nazorat qilish boĘ»yicha
			taftishchi, yoĘ»l ustasi, yoĘ»l distansiyasi boshligĘ»i,
			signalizatsiya va aloqa distansiyasi boshligĘ»i;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6681530" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">harbiylashtirilgan
			qoĘ»riqlash boĘ»linmasi boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosari,
			yongĘ»inning oldini olish boĘ»yicha otryad (komanda, oĘ»t
			oĘ»chirish poyezdi) boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosari, katta
			yoĘ»riqchi va yoĘ»riqchi, komandaning, oĘ»t oĘ»chirish poyezdi
			komandasining, harbiylashtirilgan qoĘ»riqlash komandasining
			(qorovul) boshligĘ»i;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201033" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">bosh
			sanitariya vrachi (tibbiy-sanitariya xizmati boshligĘ»ining
			oĘ»rinbosari), Markaziy sanitariya-epidemiologiya stansiyasining
			bosh sanitariya vrachi, sanitariya-epidemiologiya stansiyasining
			bosh sanitariya vrachi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6681534" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»lovchilar
			poyezdining boshligĘ»i (yoĘ»lovchilar poyezdining
			mexanik-brigadiri), yoĘ»l ustasi, boĘ»linma (qorovul),
			komandaning, oĘ»t oĘ»chirish poyezdining, harbiylashtirilgan
			qoĘ»riqlash boĘ»linmasining (qorovul) boshligĘ»i, bosh sanitariya
			vrachi (tibbiy-sanitariya xizmati boshligĘ»ining oĘ»rinbosari),
			Markaziy sanitariya-epidemiologiya stansiyasining bosh sanitariya
			vrachi, sanitariya-epidemiologiya stansiyasining bosh sanitariya
			vrachi soladigan jarimaning miqdori bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			ikkidan bir qismi miqdoridan oshmasligi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3697075" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">251-modda.
			Havo transporti organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044500" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Fuqaro aviatsiyasi
			agentligi ushbu Kodeksning 116, 116<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>,
			117-moddalarida, 142-moddasining birinchi qismida nazarda tutilgan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqli
			boĘ»lgan havo transporti organidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044501" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Fuqaro aviatsiyasi
			agentligi direktori va uning oĘ»rinbosari, OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Fuqaro aviatsiyasi
			agentligi boshqarmalarining va boĘ»limlarining boshliqlari havo
			transporti organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va maĘĽmuriy jazo
			choralarini qoĘ»llashga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201044" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">252-modda.
			Suv transporti organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7633927" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Suv
			transporti organlariga ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5451189"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">53-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			56<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2857226"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(suv transportida maxsus
			ajratilmagan joylarda tamaki mahsulotini isteĘĽmol qilganlik
			uchun),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199884"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">121</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199899"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">124</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200055"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">145-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			146-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200063"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200066"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;qismlarida
			(suv transportidagi huquqbuzarlik uchun),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199863"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">118</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199880"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">120-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			142-moddasining<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200024"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6681679" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Port
			boshliqlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari, pristan va vokzallarning
			boshliqlari, port, pristan va vokzallarning navbatchi maĘĽmurlari,
			port hududlari boshliqlari va shlyuz boshliqlari, kemalarning
			kapitanlari, ularning yordamchilari va shturmanlari, kema qatnovi
			inspeksiyalarining katta inspektorlari va inspektorlari, kema
			taftishchilari, port, pristan joylashgan yerdagi idoraviy
			harbiylashtirilgan qoĘ»riqlash boĘ»linmasining yuqori mansabdor
			shaxsi (birlashgan otryad boshligĘ»i, otryad boshligĘ»i, komandir,
			yongĘ»indan saqlash yoĘ»riqchisi) suv transporti organlari nomidan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish
			va maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanishga haqlidirlar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201053" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">254-modda.
			Shahar va shaharlararo yoĘ»lovchi tashiydigan avtomobil transporti
			va elektr transporti organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7633969" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shahar
			va shaharlararo yoĘ»lovchilar tashiydigan avtomobil transporti va
			elektr transporti organlariga ushbu Kodeksning
			56<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7632862"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(shahar, shaharlararo
			avtomobil transportida va elektr transportida maxsus ajratilmagan
			joylarda tamaki mahsulotini isteĘĽmol qilganlik
			uchun),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199884"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">121</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3984751"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">123</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199899"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">124-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			142-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200030"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200033"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">143</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200037"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">144</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200055"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">145-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			146-moddasining<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200063"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200066"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;qismlarida
			(shahar, shaharlararo avtomobil transportida va elektr
			transportida sodir etilgan huquqbuzarliklar qismi) nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201057" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shahar
			va shaharlararo yoĘ»lovchilar tashiydigan avtomobil transporti va
			elektr transporti nazoratchi-taftishchilari, chipta
			tekshiruvchilari va tegishli vakolati boĘ»lgan boshqa xodimlari
			ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7633969"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan organlar
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqish va maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanishga haqlidirlar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044504" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">254<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Transport
			nazorati inspeksiyasi organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044505" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Transport nazorati
			inspeksiyasi organlariga ushbu Kodeksning 99-moddasida
			(yoĘ»l-qurilish sohasidagi qonunchilikni buzishga oid qismida),
			113<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasida,
			123-moddasida (suv transporti sohasidagi qonunchilikni buzishga
			oid qismida), 125-moddasining toĘ»rtinchi va sakkizinchi
			qismlarida, 125<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining
			ikkinchi, uchinchi va toĘ»rtinchi qismlarida, 125<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>,
			125<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-moddalarida,
			144-moddasining toĘ»rtinchi va beshinchi qismlarida,
			145-moddasining ikkinchi qismida, 146<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasida,
			147-moddasining birinchi qismida (avtomobil yoĘ»llarini
			oĘ»zboshimchalik bilan qazish, avtomobil yoĘ»lida ishlarni amalga
			oshirish uchun berilgan ruxsatnoma talablarini bajarmaslik,
			yoĘ»llarda qurilish-qazish ishlarini olib borgan shaxslar
			tomonidan belgilangan muddatlarda yoĘ»l infratuzilmasini oldingi
			holatiga keltirmaslikka oid qismida), 176<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>,
			176<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-moddalarida
			nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044506" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Transport nazorati
			inspeksiyasi organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va jarima tariqasidagi
			maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044508" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Transport nazorati
			inspeksiyasining boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044509" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Transport nazorati
			inspeksiyasining hududiy boĘ»linmalari boshliqlari, ularning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari va inspektorlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044511" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning 119, 132 va 133<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddalarida
			(kemalarga oid qismida), 198<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">9</font>-moddasida
			nazarda tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Transport nazorati inspeksiyasining
			mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan tuziladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044513" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma ushbu Kodeksning
			282-moddasida belgilangan tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4497354" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">255-modda.
			Davlat mehnat inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7844407" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			mehnat inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198018"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">49</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1715001"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">49</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1736841"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">49</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2258072"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">50</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198026"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200886"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">229-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni
			koĘ»rib chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4497357" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va
			maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqlidir:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5452986" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">mehnat
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni va aholini ish bilan taĘĽminlash
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzganlik uchun â€” mehnat boĘ»yicha
			davlat inspektorlari, mehnat boĘ»yicha davlat huquqiy
			inspektorlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5452990" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">mehnatni
			muhofaza qilish, ish beruvchining fuqarolik javobgarligini
			majburiy sugĘ»urta qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzganlik
			uchun â€” mehnat boĘ»yicha davlat inspektorlari, mehnat boĘ»yicha
			davlat texnik inspektorlari, mehnat sharoitlari boĘ»yicha davlat
			ekspertlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7844411" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">255<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Migratsiya
			agentligi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7844412" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Migratsiya agentligiga
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5451178"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">50</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7844425" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Migratsiya agentligi
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga va jarima solish tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini
			qoĘ»llashga OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi
			huzuridagi Migratsiya agentligi direktori va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari
			haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>

			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Mudofaa vazirligi organlari nomidan

			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200925"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">235</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200935"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">236-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda

			xizmat boĘ»limlari boshliqlari;</span></p>

		<div id="-201088" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarining haydovchilari â€” harbiy xizmatchilar va
			yigĘ»inlarga chaqirilgan harbiy xizmatga majburlar sodir etgan
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomalar OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Mudofaa vazirligi OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Ichki
			ishlar vazirligi bilan birgalikda belgilab qoĘ»yadigan tartibda
			harbiy avtomobil inspeksiyasiga yuboriladi.</span></p>

		<div id="-201090" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">257-modda.
			Davlat sanitariya nazorati organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3494174" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			sanitariya nazorati organlariga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198038"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">53</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198046"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">54</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198046"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">55-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199221"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">85-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(atmosfera
			havosiga yoĘ»l qoĘ»yiladigan eng yuqori normativdan ortiq darajada
			zararli fizikaviy taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatganlik va atmosfera havosiga
			biologik organizmlar chiqarib tashlaganlik, shuningdek maxsus
			vakolat berilgan davlat organlarining ruxsatisiz atmosfera
			havosiga zararli fizikaviy taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatganlik va atmosfera
			havosiga biologik organizmlar chiqarib tashlaganlik uchun, agar bu
			huquqbuzarliklar sanitariya-gigiyena qoidalarini buzish
			boĘ»lsa),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199228"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">86</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199283"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">88</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199303"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">89</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199397"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">95-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(agar
			atmosfera havosiga fizikaviy taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatilgan boĘ»lsa va bu
			huquqbuzarliklar sanitariya-gigiyena qoidalarini buzish
			boĘ»lsa),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199258"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">87-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(avtomobillar,
			samolyotlar, kemalar va boshqa harakatlanuvchi vositalar hamda
			qurilmalarni ishlatish paytida shovqin darajasi belgilangan
			normativdan ortib ketganligi
			uchun),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199404"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">96-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(sanitariya-ekologik
			ekspertizasi qismida) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-342437" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			sanitariya nazorati organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish va jarima solish
			tariqasida maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar
			haqlidirlar:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5403544" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh davlat sanitariya vrachi va uning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5403546" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi, viloyatlar va Toshkent shahar bosh davlat sanitariya
			vrachlari hamda ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5403547" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">tumanlar
			(shaharlar) bosh davlat sanitariya vrachlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4507560" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">258-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Mudofaa vazirligining, Ichki ishlar
			vazirligining, Davlat xavfsizlik xizmatining va Milliy
			gvardiyasining sanitariya nazoratini amalga oshiruvchi tibbiy
			xizmatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4507577" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Mudofaa vazirligining, Ichki ishlar vazirligining,
			Davlat xavfsizlik xizmatining va Milliy gvardiyasining sanitariya
			nazoratini amalga oshiruvchi tibbiy xizmatlariga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198038"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">53</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198046"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">54</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198063"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">55-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar (shu jumladan,
			sanitariya-gigiyena qoidalarini va atmosfera havosini muhofaza
			qilish normalarini buzganlik) toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4507583" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Quyidagilar
			ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4507577"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan organlar
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqish va maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llashga haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4507585" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Mudofaa vazirligining bosh sanitariya vrachi â€”
			markaziy sanitariya-epidemiologiya laboratoriyasining boshligĘ»i
			va uning oĘ»rinbosari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6266490" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Ichki ishlar vazirligi tibbiyot boshqarmasining bosh
			sanitariya vrachi va uning oĘ»rinbosari (sanitariya-epidemiologiya
			nazorati bosh markazining boshligĘ»i), QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi Ichki ishlar vazirligi tibbiyot boĘ»limining bosh
			sanitariya vrachi va uning oĘ»rinbosari (sanitariya-epidemiologiya
			nazorati markazining boshligĘ»i), Toshkent shahar va Toshkent
			viloyati ichki ishlar bosh boshqarmalari, viloyatlar ichki ishlar
			boshqarmalari tibbiyot boĘ»limlarining bosh sanitariya vrachlari
			hamda ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari (sanitariya-epidemiologiya nazorati
			markazlarining boshliqlari);</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4507590" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			xavfsizlik xizmatining harbiy-tibbiy xizmat
			sanitariya-epidemiologiya stansiyasi boshligĘ»i;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5712072" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasining bosh sanitariya vrachi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3103270" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">259-modda.
			Davlat veterinariya xizmati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3103271" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			veterinariya xizmatiga ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=27.12.2016%2000#-3090937"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">109-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3103272" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Quyidagilar
			davlat veterinariya xizmati nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va jarima solish
			tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llashga haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4653994" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh davlat veterinariya inspektori va uning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari, QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi, viloyatlar hamda
			Toshkent shahar bosh davlat veterinariya inspektorlari, ularning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari, davlat chegarasidagi va transportdagi bosh davlat
			veterinariya inspektori va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikki baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769571" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qishloq xoĘ»jaligi vazirligi huzuridagi Veterinariya
			va chorvachilikni rivojlantirish qoĘ»mitasining davlat
			veterinariya inspektorlari, tumanlar va shaharlarning bosh davlat
			veterinariya inspektorlari, chegara va transport veterinariya
			punktlarining (uchastkalarining) davlat veterinariya inspektorlari
			hamda veterinariya uchastkalarining va bozorlardagi
			veterinariya-sanitariya ekspertiza laboratoriyalarining davlat
			veterinariya inspektorlari â€” bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining bir
			baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4339887" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">260-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Sanoat xavfsizligi davlat qoĘ»mitasining
			organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4339890" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Sanoat xavfsizligi davlat qoĘ»mitasining organlariga
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198063"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">55-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198287"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">70-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(yer
			qaĘĽridan foydalanishda ishlarni olib borish xavfsizligi
			qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4339820"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">97</span></span></font></a>,<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4339848"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;97</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199448"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">98-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4653281" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Sanoat xavfsizligi davlat qoĘ»mitasi organlari
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga va jarima solish tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini
			qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4653286" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			qoĘ»mitasi raisi va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4653288" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">inspeksiyalarning
			boshliqlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” bazaviy hisoblash

		</div>

			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">kon-texnik
			inspeksiyalarining va hududiy boshqarmalarning boshliqlari hamda
