			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">davlat
			inspektorlari â€” bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining uch baravarigacha
			miqdorda.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180824" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">260</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">1</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya vazirligi
			huzuridagi TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya sohasini nazorat qilish
			inspeksiyasi</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520307" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya vazirligi huzuridagi
			TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya sohasini nazorat qilish
			inspeksiyasiga ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198287"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">70-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan
			yer qaĘĽridan foydalanishda ishlarni olib borish xavfsizligi qismi
			mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198331"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">71-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(bundan
			tabiatni muhofaza qilish qoidalari mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5615195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">72-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(yer
			osti suvlariga doir qismida),
			74-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7520235"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3836417"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180826" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya vazirligi huzuridagi
			TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya sohasini nazorat qilish
			inspeksiyasi nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va jarima solish tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy
			jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180827" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">inspeksiya
			boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosari â€” bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			yuz baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180828" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">mintaqaviy
			inspeksiyalar boshliqlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining yetmish baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180829" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">inspektorlar
			â€” bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravarigacha miqdorda.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180830" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya vazirligi huzuridagi
			TogĘ»-kon sanoati va geologiya sohasini nazorat qilish
			inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7180789"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">70</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklarni aniqlagan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzadi hamda ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8087997" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">260<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Elektr
			energiyasi, neft mahsulotlari va gazdan foydalanishni nazorat
			qilish inspeksiyasi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8088006" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Elektr energiyasi, neft
			mahsulotlari va gazdan foydalanishni nazorat qilish inspeksiyasiga
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1519023"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">101-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(elektr
			energiyasi va gazdan foydalanish qismida mansabdor shaxslarga
			nisbatan) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8088013" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Elektr energiyasi, neft
			mahsulotlari va gazdan foydalanishni nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga va jarima solish tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini
			qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8088018" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Elektr energiyasi, neft
			mahsulotlari va gazdan foydalanishni nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi
			boshligĘ»i hamda uning oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8088024" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Elektr energiyasi, neft
			mahsulotlari va gazdan foydalanishni nazorat qilish
			inspeksiyasining hududiy boshqarmalari boshliqlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8088027" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning 100, 101, 102, 103, 172, 173, 198<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">6</font>-moddalarida,
			228-moddasida (yoqilgĘ»i-energetika sohasida qoĘ»yilgan muhrlarga
			(plombalarga) taalluqli hollarda) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik aniqlangan taqdirda, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Elektr energiyasi, neft mahsulotlari
			va gazdan foydalanishni nazorat qilish inspeksiyasining hamda
			uning hududiy boshqarmalarining mansabdor shaxslari maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6412852" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634003" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">261-modda.
			Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi
			vazirligi organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634010" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim
			oĘ»zgarishi vazirligi organlariga ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4359300"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">63-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			65-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198203"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(bundan qishloq xoĘ»jaligi
			yerlarini va boshqa yerlarni yaroqsiz holga keltirganlik
			mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7520074"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">68-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(tabiatni
			muhofaza qilish, sogĘ»lomlashtirish, rekreatsiya maqsadlariga
			moĘ»ljallangan yerlarga, suv fondi yerlariga oid
			qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198287"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">70-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan
			yer qaĘĽridan foydalanishda ishlarni olib borish xavfsizligi
			mustasno), 70<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3696879"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198331"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">71-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(tabiatni
			muhofaza qilishga oid qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5615195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">72-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan

			74-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5615253"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-198468"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi

			irrigatsiya tarmoqlaridan olinadigan suvlarni hisobga olish

			77-moddasining<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=10.01.2018%2004#-3500290"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=10.01.2018%2004#-3500302"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi

			79-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5155741"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,

			atmosfera havosiga zararli fizikaviy taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish, biologik
			organizmlarni atmosfera havosiga chiqarib tashlash
			mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7415303"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">85</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199228"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">86</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5615326"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">86</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199258"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;87</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199283"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">88</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199303"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">89-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(bundan
			atmosfera havosiga zararli fizikaviy taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish
			mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=28.10.1997%2000#-334675"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">89</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,

			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3984486"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">91-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			91<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5155766"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3984632"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5155786"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3984659"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">91</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3984679"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">91</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199366"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">92</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199375"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">93</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199397"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">95-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199404"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">96-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(davlat
			ekologik ekspertizasiga oid qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-200076"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">148-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(bundan
			ajratilgan mintaqalarda va yogĘ»och koĘ»priklardan 100 metrgacha
			boĘ»lgan masofada olov yoqqanlik, yogĘ»och koĘ»priklar va taxta
			toĘ»shamali koĘ»priklarda chekkanlik uchun maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-3837919"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">214-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(tabiatni
			muhofaza qilishga oid qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-200882"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">228-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(tabiatni
			muhofaza qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik buzilganda muhrlar
			(plombalar) qoĘ»yilgan hollar) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634049" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Quyidagilar
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish
			va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi vazirligi nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish va jarima solish
			tariqasida maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llashga haqlidir:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634050" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim
			oĘ»zgarishi vazirligining bosh davlat inspektorlari hamda ularning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari, QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi Ekologiya,
			atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi vazirligining,
			viloyatlar hamda Toshkent shahar ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza
			qilish va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi boshqarmalarining bosh davlat
			inspektorlari hamda ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yuz baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” yuz ellik baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634051" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim
			oĘ»zgarishi vazirligining, QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi
			Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi
			vazirligining, viloyatlar hamda Toshkent shahar ekologiya,
			atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi
			boshqarmalarining katta davlat inspektorlari â€” fuqarolarga
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetmish baravarigacha, mansabdor
			shaxslarga esa â€” yuz baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8119412" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim
			oĘ»zgarishi vazirligining, QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi
			Ekologiya, atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi
			vazirligining, viloyatlar hamda Toshkent shahar ekologiya,
			atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish va iqlim oĘ»zgarishi
			boshqarmalarining ekologiya va atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish
			sohasidagi nazorat boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) inspeksiyalarining
			davlat inspektorlari, davlat qoĘ»riqxonalarining, majmua
			(landshaft) buyurtma qoĘ»riqxonalarining, tabiat bogĘ»larining,
			davlat biosfera rezervatlarining qoĘ»riqlash xodimlari â€”
			fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining ellik baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yetmish baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5024669" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">261<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Davlat oĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5024670" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi OĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi davlat qoĘ»mitasi organlariga
			ushbu Kodeks 77-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3500290"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198994"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199002"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">78-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199010"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">79-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(oĘ»rmon
			fondi yerlariga oid
			qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199029"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">80</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199168"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">83-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199179"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">84-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(oĘ»rmon
			fondi yerlariga oid qismida), 90-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4357645"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(oĘ»rmon fondi yerlariga oid
			qismida) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5024671" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi OĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi davlat qoĘ»mitasi nomidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va
			jarima solish tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga
			quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5024672" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi OĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi davlat qoĘ»mitasining bosh davlat
			inspektorlari, QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi OĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi
			qoĘ»mitasining, viloyatlar oĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi boshqarmalarining
			davlat inspektorlari â€” fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining
			oĘ»n besh baravarigacha, mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” yigirma
			baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5024673" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi OĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi davlat qoĘ»mitasining davlat
			inspektorlari, QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi OĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi
			qoĘ»mitasining, viloyatlar oĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaligi boshqarmalarining,
			davlat oĘ»rmon xoĘ»jaliklarining, davlat oĘ»rmon-ov
			xoĘ»jaliklarining, ixtisoslashtirilgan davlat oĘ»rmon
			xoĘ»jaliklarining, davlat oĘ»rmon ishlab chiqarish korxonalarining
			davlat inspektorlari va milliy tabiat bogĘ»larining xodimlari â€”
			fuqarolarga bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n baravarigacha,
			mansabdor shaxslarga esa â€” oĘ»n besh baravarigacha miqdorda
			jarima solishga.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201140" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">262-modda.
			Bojxona organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634055" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bojxona
			organlariga ushbu
			Kodeksning<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081264"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;227</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081279"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">227</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span 			227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">13</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5803410"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>, 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">16</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081821"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>, 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">22</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081896"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2736105" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bojxona
			organlarining boshliqlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari bojxona
			organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni
			koĘ»rib chiqishga va jarima tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini
			qoĘ»llashga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803661" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat bojxona qoĘ»mitasining Yagona
			avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali qayd etilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rishga hamda jarima
			tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga bojxona
			organlarining bojxona nazorati va rasmiylashtiruvini amalga
			oshiradigan bosh inspektorlari, katta inspektorlari
			(inspektorlari) haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634058" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">263-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligi
			huzuridagi Axborotlashtirish va telekommunikatsiyalar sohasida
			nazorat boĘ»yicha davlat inspeksiyasi organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634059" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligi huzuridagi
			Axborotlashtirish va telekommunikatsiyalar sohasida nazorat
			boĘ»yicha davlat inspeksiyasi organlariga ushbu Kodeks
			152-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3837790"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3837826"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">153</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-335897"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">154-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634060" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Raqamli texnologiyalar vazirligi huzuridagi
			Axborotlashtirish va telekommunikatsiyalar sohasida nazorat
			boĘ»yicha davlat inspeksiyasi boshligĘ»i, shuningdek mazkur davlat
			inspeksiyasining QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi, viloyatlar va
			Toshkent shahridagi hududiy boĘ»linmalari boshliqlari ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3187515"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan organlar
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqish va maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4167463" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">264-modda.
			Davlat soliq organlari, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh
			prokuraturasi huzuridagi Iqtisodiy jinoyatlarga qarshi kurashish
			departamenti va uning joylardagi boĘ»linmalari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7984676" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			soliq organlariga, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi
			huzuridagi Iqtisodiy jinoyatlarga qarshi kurashish departamenti
			hamda uning joylardagi boĘ»linmalariga ushbu
			Kodeks&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3998231"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">159</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200201"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">168-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			174-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1423202"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1569125"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">215</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir. Ushbu Kodeks 175-moddasining birinchi, ikkinchi,
			uchinchi, toĘ»rtinchi, oltinchi va yettinchi qismlarida nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar davlat
			soliq organlariga taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4167477" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			soliq organlarining boshliqlari, ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari hamda
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi huzuridagi Iqtisodiy
			jinoyatlarga qarshi kurashish departamenti boshligĘ»i, uning
			oĘ»rinbosari, Departament hududiy boshqarmalarining boshliqlari va
			ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari, tuman va shahar boĘ»limlarining
			boshliqlari tegishincha ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7984676"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan organlar
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqish va maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga haqlidirlar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7407921" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">264<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi huzuridagi Iqtisodiy
			jinoyatlarga qarshi kurashish departamentining Davlat moliyaviy
			nazorati inspeksiyasi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7407924" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198117"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(budjet
			tashkilotlarining, budjet mablagĘ»larini oluvchilarning, davlat
			maqsadli jamgĘ»armalarining hamda belgilangan tartibda tashkil
			etilgan boshqa jamgĘ»armalarning mol-mulkini oĘ»zlashtirish yoki
			rastrata qilish yoĘ»li bilan oz miqdorda talon-toroj qilishga oid
			qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3090992"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">175</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5227489"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">175</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">8</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda, OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi huzuridagi Iqtisodiy jinoyatlarga
			qarshi kurashish departamenti Davlat moliyaviy nazorati
			inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4771177" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5198966" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">264<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Moliya vazirligi va hududiy moliya
			organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5198967" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5198501"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">175</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda, OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Moliya vazirligining va hududiy moliya organlarining
			mansabdor shaxslari maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5198968" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543489" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">265-modda.
			Texnik jihatdan tartibga solish, standartlashtirish, metrologiya
			va sertifikatlashtirish organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543494" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Texnik
			reglamentlarning yoki standartlarning majburiy talablariga,
			metrologiya va sertifikatlashtirish qoidalariga rioya etilishi
			ustidan davlat nazoratini amalga oshiruvchi organlarga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3837893"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">212</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200778"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">213-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6540578"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">214-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan
			tabiatni muhofaza qilishga taalluqli qismi mustasno) nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543502" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Texnik
			reglamentlarning yoki standartlarning majburiy talablariga,
			metrologiya va sertifikatlashtirish qoidalariga rioya etilishi
			ustidan davlat nazoratini amalga oshiruvchi organlar nomidan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga hamda jarima solish tarzidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini
			qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543504" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">texnik
			jihatdan tartibga solish, standartlashtirish, muvofiqlikni
			baholash va metrologiya sohasidagi qonunchilik talablariga rioya
			etilishini taĘĽminlash boĘ»yicha OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh
			davlat inspektori va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” bazaviy hisoblash
			miqdorining sakson baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543506" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">texnik
			jihatdan tartibga solish, standartlashtirish, muvofiqlikni
			baholash va metrologiya sohasidagi qonunchilik talablariga rioya
			etilishini taĘĽminlash boĘ»yicha davlat inspektorlari â€” bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining uch baravarigacha miqdorda jarima solishga.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520182" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">266<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Iqtisodiyot va moliya vazirligi
			huzuridagi Kadastr agentligining organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520183" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Iqtisodiyot va moliya vazirligi huzuridagi Kadastr
			agentligining organlariga ushbu Kodeksning 60-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5612720"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi,
			uchinchi va toĘ»rtinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4228684"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">60</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198186"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">65-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(yer
			uchastkalaridan ruxsat etilgan foydalanishning asosiy turiga
			nomuvofiq foydalanishga oid qismida, bundan qishloq xoĘ»jaligiga
			moĘ»ljallangan yerlar mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7520074"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">68-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan
			tabiatni muhofaza qilish, sogĘ»lomlashtirish, rekreatsiya
			maqsadlariga moĘ»ljallangan yerlar, suv fondi yerlari
			mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5613529"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">68</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5613595"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">69-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan
			qishloq xoĘ»jaligi yerlarining chegara belgilariga oid qismi
			mustasno) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520184" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Iqtisodiyot va moliya vazirligi huzuridagi Kadastr
			agentligining organlari nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga va jarima solish
			tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar
			haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520185" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Iqtisodiyot va moliya vazirligi huzuridagi Kadastr
			agentligi direktori va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520186" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Iqtisodiyot va moliya vazirligi huzuridagi Kadastr
			agentligining QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi, viloyatlar, Toshkent
			shahar boshqarmalari boshliqlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7520187" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Iqtisodiyot va moliya vazirligi huzuridagi Kadastr
			agentligining tumanlar (shaharlar) boĘ»limlari boshliqlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8090002" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">266<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish
			va uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi
			organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8090005" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish va uy-joy
			kommunal xoĘ»jaligi sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi
			organlariga ushbu Kodeks 72-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3836393"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198406"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(ichimlik ehtiyojlari
			uchun suv quduqlarini qazishning belgilangan qoidalarini va
			texnologiyasini buzishga oid qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1569046"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">74-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(ichimlik
			suvi olishning belgilangan limitlarini buzishga doir
			qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198519"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">75-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(ichimlik
			suvi inshootlari orqali chiqarilayotgan ichimlik suvi miqdorining
			dastlabki hisobini yuritish qoidalarini buzishga oid
			qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6596080"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">76-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(ichimlik
			suvi taĘĽminoti va oqova suvlarni chiqarib yuborish obyektlaridan
			foydalanish qoidalarini buzishga doir
			qismida),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7454247"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">99-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan
			yoĘ»l qurilishi sohasidagi qonunchilikni buzish, shaharsozlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikka muvofiq binolarni, inshootlarni yoki
			boshqa obyektlarni qurish, rekonstruksiya qilish va kapital
			taĘĽmirlashga taqiqlar (cheklovlar) belgilangan zonalarda ushbu
			ishlarni bajarish yoki aholi punktlarining tasdiqlangan bosh
			rejalarini, ularni rejalashtirish va qurish loyihalariga zid
			ravishda (bosh rejalarda nazarda tutilmagan) binolar va
			inshootlarni loyihalashtirish, rekonstruksiya qilish va qurish,
			shaharsozlik hujjatlariga ularda nogironligi boĘ»lgan shaxslarga
			shart-sharoitlar yaratish boĘ»yicha loyihaning alohida boĘ»limi
			(qismi) mavjud boĘ»lmagan holda yoki shaharsozlik normalari va
			qoidalariga muvofiq boĘ»lmagan ushbu alohida boĘ»lim (qism)
			boĘ»yicha ekspert tashkilotlar tomonidan ijobiy xulosa berish,
			shaharsozlik hujjatlarida nogironligi boĘ»lgan shaxslarga
			shart-sharoitlar yaratish boĘ»yicha loyihaning alohida boĘ»limiga
			(qismiga) amal qilinmagan holda qurilishi tugallangan binolar va
			inshootlardan foydalanish uchun OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Vazirlar
			Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi
			sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi organlari tomonidan
			ruxsatnoma berish mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1519024"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">101-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(koĘ»p
			kvartirali uylarning issiqlik taĘĽminotiga oid qismida),
			159-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052454"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(koĘ»p kvartirali uylardagi
			turar joylarni saqlash va ulardan foydalanish qoidalarini, koĘ»p
			kvartirali uy-joy fondidan texnik foydalanish qoidalari va
			normalarini buzishga oid qismida), ikkinchi va uchinchi
			qismlarida,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-946779"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">163</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7091653"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">163</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7091663"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">163</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8090009" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish va uy-joy
			kommunal xoĘ»jaligi sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi organlari
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqish va jarima solish tariqasida maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini
			qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8090012" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi vazirligi huzuridagi Qurilish va
			uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi sohasida nazorat qilish
			inspeksiyasining boshligĘ»i va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8090015" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish va uy-joy
			kommunal xoĘ»jaligi sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasi hududiy
			inspeksiyalarining boshliqlari va ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8090022" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Vazirlar Mahkamasi huzuridagi Qurilish va uy-joy
			kommunal xoĘ»jaligi sohasida nazorat qilish inspeksiyasining va
			uning hududiy inspeksiyalarining mansabdor shaxslari ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6523670"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">178-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(isteĘĽmolchilarning
			huquqlarini himoya qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzishga
			doir qismida) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			aniqlanganda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma
			tuzadi va ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-347103" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">267-modda.
			Davlat statistika organlari</span></p>

			Respublikasi Davlat statistika qoĘ»mitasi organlariga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200792"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">215-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-347105" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">

			Respublikasi Davlat statistika qoĘ»mitasining raisi va uning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari, QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi, viloyatlar,
			Toshkent shahar statistika boshqarmalari boshliqlari va ularning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari, tumanlar, shaharlar statistika boĘ»limlarining
			boshliqlari ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-347104"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi

			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqish va maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llashga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201168" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">

			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">268<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.

			Respublikasi Davlat aktivlarini boshqarish agentligi organlariga
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-339180"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">215</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5227595"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">215</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar haqidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671684" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat aktivlarini boshqarish agentligi organlari
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib

			qoĘ»llashga quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
