			Respublikasi Davlat aktivlarini boshqarish agentligi direktori
			hamda uning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€” bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining oĘ»n
			baravarigacha miqdorda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671702" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat aktivlarini boshqarish agentligi hududiy
			boshqarmalari rahbarlari hamda ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari â€”
			bazaviy hisoblash miqdorining yetti baravarigacha miqdorda jarima
			solishga.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7454346" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">268<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi
			vazirligi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7454347" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi vazirligiga
			ushbu Kodeks 99-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7454282"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">sakkizinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7454348" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi vazirligi
			nomidan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga hamda jarima solish tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo
			choralarini qoĘ»llashga OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi qurilish va
			uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi vazirining oĘ»rinbosari va bosh reja
			amalga oshirilishining davlat arxitektura nazorati boĘ»linmasi
			boshligĘ»i haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7454350" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qurilish va uy-joy kommunal xoĘ»jaligi vazirligining
			mansabdor shaxslari ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6523670"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">178-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(isteĘĽmolchilarning
			huquqlarini himoya qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzishga
			doir qismida) nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			aniqlanganda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma
			tuzadi va ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5866417" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">268<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Turizm va sport vazirligi huzuridagi
			Madaniy meros agentligi va uning hududiy boshqarmalari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5866450" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3696779"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">64&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5866375"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">198</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda,
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Turizm va sport vazirligi huzuridagi
			Madaniy meros agentligining va uning hududiy boshqarmalarining
			mansabdor shaxslari maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4497523" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6041084" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">268<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">5</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi oĘ»simliklar karantini va himoyasi
			organlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769581" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qishloq xoĘ»jaligi vazirligi huzuridagi OĘ»simliklar
			karantini va himoyasi agentligiga ushbu Kodeks
			107-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5937752"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;hamda
			108-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199791"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar taalluqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769589" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qishloq xoĘ»jaligi vazirligi huzuridagi OĘ»simliklar
			karantini va himoyasi agentligining nomidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishga hamda
			jarima tariqasidagi maĘĽmuriy jazo choralarini qoĘ»llashga
			quyidagilar haqli:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769592" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qishloq xoĘ»jaligi vazirligi huzuridagi OĘ»simliklar
			karantini va himoyasi agentligining bosh direktori hamda uning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6041122" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi OĘ»simliklar karantini va himoyasi agentligining,
			viloyatlar hamda Toshkent shahar oĘ»simliklar karantini va
			himoyasi boshqarmalarining boshliqlari hamda ularning
			oĘ»rinbosarlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6041123" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">tuman
			(shahar) oĘ»simliklar karantini va himoyasi boĘ»limlarining
			boshliqlari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6769596" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qishloq xoĘ»jaligi vazirligi huzuridagi OĘ»simliklar
			karantini va himoyasi agentligi hamda uning hududiy boĘ»linmalari
			tomonidan ushbu Kodeks 107-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5937760"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;hamda
			108-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4324465"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar aniqlangan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuziladi va ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda sudga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201179" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">TOĘ»RTINCHI
			BOĘ»LIM<br/>
MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI ISHLARNI
			YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201182" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XIX
			bob. UMUMIY QOIDALAR</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201185" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">269-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish
			vazifalari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453048" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish vazifalari: har
			bir ishning holatini oĘ»z vaqtida, har tomonlama, toĘ»la va
			obyektiv ravishda aniqlab chiqishdan, bu ishni qonunchilikka
			muvofiq holda hal etishdan, chiqarilgan qarorning ijrosini
			taĘĽminlashdan, shuningdek maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etish
			sabablari va bunga olib kelgan shart-sharoitlarni aniqlashdan,
			huquqbuzarliklarning oldini olishdan, fuqarolarni OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-6445145"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Konstitutsiyasi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va
			qonunlariga rioya etish ruhida tarbiyalashdan, qonuniylikni
			mustahkamlashdan iboratdir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671737" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">269<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671739" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar ishda ishtirok etuvchi
			shaxslar tomonidan taqdim etilgan hujjatlar, ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			jarayonida organ (mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan talab qilib olingan
			hujjatlar, shuningdek qogĘ»ozda rasmiylashtirilgan hujjatlar
			asosida shakllantiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671742" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar elektron shaklda
			shakllantirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671746" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar elektron shaklda
			shakllantirilganda ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxslar organga
			(mansabdor shaxsga) oĘ»zining elektron raqamli imzosi bilan
			tasdiqlangan hujjatlarni elektron shaklda taqdim etishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671750" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishlar
			elektron shaklda shakllantirilganda ishda ishtirok etuvchi
			shaxslar tomonidan sudga taqdim etilgan yozma hujjatlar ishga
			elektron shaklda qoĘ»shib qoĘ»yiladi, shundan soĘ»ng yozma
			hujjatlar ularni taqdim etgan shaxslarga qaytariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671754" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar elektron shaklda
			shakllantirilgan taqdirda, organ (mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan
			rasmiylashtirilgan hujjatlar tegishincha organning majlisida
			raislik qiluvchining va kotibning yoki ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi
			mansabdor shaxsning elektron raqamli imzosi bilan tasdiqlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671756" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni elektron shaklda boshqa
			organga topshirish axborot tizimi orqali amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671759" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi elektron shaklda shakllantirilgan
			ishlarning qogĘ»ozdagi koĘ»chirma nusxalari boĘ»lishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671766" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">269<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritishda ishtirok
			etuvchi shaxslarning murojaatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671770" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritishda ishtirok etuvchi
			shaxslar ushbu Kodeksda belgilangan tartibda va muddatlarda
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar yuzasidan murojaat
			qilishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671772" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Murojaat
			va unga ilova qilinadigan hujjatlar sudga elektron hujjat shaklida
			yuborilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671774" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ish
			holatlari hujjatlarning faqat asl nusxalari bilan tasdiqlanishi
			lozim boĘ»lganda, shuningdek boshqa zarur hollarda maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organning
			(mansabdor shaxsning) talabi bilan hujjatlarning asl nusxalari
			taqdim etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634064" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">269<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			Jabrlanuvchining arizasiga asosan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida ish yuritish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634065" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197982"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">40</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197986"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">41</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197998"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">44</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198002"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">45</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198006"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">46</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034018"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">46</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198031"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">52-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3493547"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(bundan
			korxonalar, muassasalar, tashkilotlar
			mustasno),&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2974656"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">193</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;hamda
			202<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2974656"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar jabrlanuvchining huquqbuzarni javobgarlikka
			tortish haqidagi arizasiga koĘ»ra javobgarlikka sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634066" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jabrlanuvchi
			nochor ahvolda boĘ»lganligi, voyaga yetmaganligi, huquqbuzarga
			qaram boĘ»lganligi tufayli yoki boshqa sabablarga koĘ»ra oĘ»z
			huquqlarini va qonuniy manfaatlarini oĘ»zi himoya qila olmaydigan
			alohida hollarda vakolatli organning mansabdor shaxsi
			jabrlanuvchining arizasisiz ham maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritishni boshlashi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634069" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeks 61-moddasining birinchi va ikkinchi qismlarida nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarlik ustav fondida davlat ulushi mavjud
			boĘ»lmagan korxonaga, muassasaga, tashkilotga nisbatan uning
			xodimi tomonidan sodir etilganda mazkur korxona, muassasa,
			tashkilot rahbarining, mulkdorining yoki vakolatli boshqaruv
			organining arizasiga koĘ»ra javobgarlikka sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634071" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3493547"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarlik ustav fondida davlat ulushi mavjud
			boĘ»lmagan korxonaga, muassasaga, tashkilotga nisbatan sodir
			etilganda mazkur korxona, muassasa, tashkilot rahbarining,
			mulkdorining yoki vakolatli boshqaruv organining arizasiga koĘ»ra
			javobgarlikka sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201189" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">270-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453107" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish tartibi ushbu
			Kodeks va boshqa qonunchilik hujjatlari bilan belgilanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201195" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">271-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritishni
			istisno etuvchi holatlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201196" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Quyidagi
			holatlar mavjud boĘ»lgan taqdirda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritishni boshlash mumkin emas,
			boshlangan ish esa tugatilishi lozim:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201198" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik hodisasi yoki alomati yoĘ»q boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201199" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish paytida shaxs oĘ»n olti
			yoshga toĘ»lmagan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201201" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			gĘ»ayrihuquqiy harakat yoki harakatsizlikni sodir etgan shaxs aqli
			noraso boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201203" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			shaxs harakatni zaruriy mudofaa holatida yoki oxirgi zarurat
			holatida qilgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3500410" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>)
			shaxs harakatni jismoniy yoki ruhiy majburlash yoxud qoĘ»rqitish
			natijasida qilgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201204" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			amnistiya akti chiqishi, agar u maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini
			qoĘ»llanishni bekor qilsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201206" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikni belgilovchi hujjat bekor qilingan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201207" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			paytiga kelib ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197968"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">36-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan muddatlar oĘ»tib ketgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201209" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">8)
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxs xususida shu fakt
			yuzasidan maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risida vakolatli organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) qaror chiqargan boĘ»lsa yoki maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida
			chiqarilgan qaror bekor qilinmagan boĘ»lsa, shuningdek mazkur fakt
			yuzasidan jinoyat toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish qoĘ»zgĘ»atilgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634083" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">8<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>)
			ish yuritish jabrlanuvchining arizasiga koĘ»ra yuritiladigan
			hollarda uning arizasi mavjud boĘ»lmasa, bundan ushbu Kodeks
			269<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7634066"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan hollar
			mustasno;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201211" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">9)
			shaxs ishi yuritila boshlangan paytda vafot etgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2736118" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">10)
			huquqbuzarlikning oqibatlari bartaraf etilgan taqdirda shaxsni
			javobgarlikdan ozod etish ushbu Kodeksning tegishli moddasida
			nazarda tutilgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670264" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">10<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>)
			huquqbuzar ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5670116"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">21</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			boĘ»yicha jabrlanuvchi bilan yarashgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8156238" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">11)
			agar ushbu Kodeks 164-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200166"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-336033"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2735493"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi

			qismida</span></span></font></a>,
			166-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6055681"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6055703"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi

			167-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200189"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200192"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi

			171-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-336240"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-336246"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi

			qismida</span></span></font></a>,
			227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">8</font>-moddasining<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081600"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2259279"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4580827"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,
			227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">14</font>-moddasining<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081798"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2259296"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>, 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">15</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081810"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,
			227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">16</font>-moddasining<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081821"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2259379"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,
			227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">18</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081848"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4581790"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>, 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">19</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081858"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081874"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">227</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">21</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">22</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081891"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>, 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">23</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081901"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081912"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">227</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">24</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081918"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">227</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">25</span></font></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081926"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">227</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">26</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">27</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081932"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlikni birinchi marta sodir etgan tadbirkorlik
			subyektining mansabdor shaxslari yoki xodimlari yoxud tadbirkorlik
			faoliyati bilan shugĘ»ullanuvchi fuqarolar yoĘ»l qoĘ»yilgan
			buzilishlarni huquqbuzarlik aniqlangan paytdan eĘĽtiboran oĘ»ttiz
			kunlik muddatda ixtiyoriy ravishda bartaraf etgan va (yoki)
			yetkazilgan moddiy zararning oĘ»rnini qoplagan boĘ»lsa, bundan
			fuqarolarning hayoti va (yoki) sogĘ»ligĘ»iga zarar yetkazilgan
			hollar mustasno.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180956" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">12)
			yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilganligi maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan
			foto- va video qayd etish texnika vositalari orqali qayd etilgan
			hollarda, transport vositasining mulkdori toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumot
			mavjud boĘ»lmasa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180960" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">13)
			agar maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto- va video qayd etish texnika
			vositalari orqali qayd etilgan yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilishi
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumot jarima solish haqida qaror chiqarishga
			vakolatli boĘ»lgan shaxsga qirq sakkiz soat ichida yuborilmagan
			boĘ»lsa.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7984688" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">14)
			agar soliq toĘ»lovchi (soliq agenti) tomonidan oxirgi uch oy
			ichida soliq hisobotlari oĘ»z vaqtida taqdim etilgan va keyingi
			hisobot davri uchun soliq hisobotini taqdim etish muddatining
			kechiktirilishi besh ish kunidan oshmagan boĘ»lsa.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201213" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">272-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni fuqarolarning
			tengligi asosida koĘ»rib chiqish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7113680" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish barcha fuqarolarning jinsi,
			irqi, millati, tili, dini, eĘĽtiqodi, ijtimoiy kelib chiqishi,
			ijtimoiy mavqeyidan qatĘĽi nazar, qonun oldida va shu ishni koĘ»rib
			chiquvchi organ (mansabdor shaxs) oldida tengligi asosida koĘ»rib
			chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201217" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">273-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuritiladigan til</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201220" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish oĘ»zbek tilida, qoraqalpoq
			tilida yoki muayyan joydagi koĘ»pchilik aholi soĘ»zlashadigan
			tilda yuritiladi. Ish yuritilayotgan tilni bilmaydigan ish
			ishtirokchilariga tarjimon orqali ish materiallari bilan toĘ»liq
			tanishish va ishni mohiyati boĘ»yicha koĘ»rib chiqish chogĘ»ida
			qatnashish huquqi, shuningdek oĘ»z ona tilida soĘ»zlash huquqi
			taĘĽminlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201222" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">274-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishning ochiq koĘ»rilishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201224" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish ochiq koĘ»riladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201225" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqishning
			tarbiyaviy va ogohlantiruvchi rolini oshirish maqsadida bunday
			ishlar huquqbuzarning ish, oĘ»qish joyidagi jamoalarida yoki
			yashash joyida koĘ»rib chiqilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201226" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">275-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish chogĘ»ida
			qonunlarning ijrosi ustidan prokuror nazorati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201228" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Prokuror
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish chogĘ»ida
			qonunlarning ijrosi ustidan nazoratni amalga oshirar ekan:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201230" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida ish qoĘ»zgĘ»atishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201232" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ish
			materiallari bilan tanishib chiqishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201233" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ish
			yuritish vaqtida organlar (mansabdor shaxslar)ning harakatlari
			qonuniyligini tekshirishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201236" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ishni
			koĘ»rib chiqishda qatnashishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201237" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ishni
			koĘ»rib chiqish vaqtida vujudga kelgan masalalar xususida
			iltimosini bayon etishga, xulosalar berishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201238" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar uchun tegishli organlar (mansabdor shaxslar)
			taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish choralarini toĘ»gĘ»ri qoĘ»llanganligini
			tekshirishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4265837" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan qabul qilingan qarorga
			yoki shikoyat yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorga protest keltirishga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201243" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">qonunda
			nazarda tutilgan boshqa harakatlar qilishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201245" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">276-modda.
			Dalillar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201246" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishga oid dalillar har qanday faktik
			maĘĽlumotlardan iborat boĘ»lib, organlar (mansabdor shaxslar) shu
			maĘĽlumotlarga asoslanib maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik holati yuz bergan
			yoki bermaganligini, muayyan shaxsning uni sodir etishda
			aybdorligini va ishni toĘ»gĘ»ri koĘ»rib chiqish uchun ahamiyatli
			boĘ»lgan boshqa holatlarni qonunda belgilangan tartibda aniqlaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7402077" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-201246"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽlumotlar
			quyidagi vositalar: maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			bayonnoma, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning
			tushuntirishlari hamda jabrlanuvchining, guvohlarning
			koĘ»rsatuvlari, ekspert xulosasi, mutaxassis maslahati
			(tushuntirishlari), ashyoviy, yozma va raqamli dalillar, ashyolar
			va hujjatlarni olib qoĘ»yish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma,
			haydovchilarning shaharlararo va xalqaro yuk hamda yoĘ»lovchi
			tashishni amalga oshiradigan transport vositalaridagi nazorat
			asboblari (taxograflar), audio-, videoyozuvlardan va
			fotosuratlardan iborat materiallar, shuningdek boshqa materiallar
			bilan belgilanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201250" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">277-modda.
			Dalillarga baho berish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201252" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) dalillarga ishning hamma holatlarini har
			tomonlama, toĘ»la va obyektiv jamlab tekshirishga asoslangan
			oĘ»zining ichki ishonchi bilan qonunga amal qilgan holda baho
			beradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201254" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">278-modda.
			Materiallarni prokurorga topshirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201256" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqish paytida organ (mansabdor shaxs)
			huquqbuzarlik holatida jinoyat alomatlari bor degan xulosaga
			kelsa, materiallarni prokurorga topshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201258" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XX
			bob. MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI BAYONNOMA</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201259" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">279-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomani tuzish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201261" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma
			vakolatli mansabdor shaxs tomonidan tuziladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201262" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201280"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">283-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan hollarda bayonnoma tuzilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201264" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">280-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzishga vakolati
			boĘ»lgan shaxslar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453051" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Buzilishi
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikni keltirib chiqaradigan qoidalarga rioya
			etilishini tekshirish va (yoki) nazorat qilish qonunchilik bilan
			zimmasiga yuklatilgan tegishli organning vakolatli mansabdor
			shaxsi maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomani tuzadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201267" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">281-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomaning mazmuni</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201269" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomada: shu bayonnoma tuzilgan
			sana va joy, bayonnomani tuzgan shaxsning lavozimi, familiyasi,
			ismi, otasining ismi; huquqbuzarning shaxsiga oid maĘĽlumotlar;
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joy, vaqt va bu
			huquqbuzarlikning mohiyati, ana shunday huquqbuzarlik uchun
			javobgarlikni nazarda tutuvchi normativ hujjat; agar guvohlar va
			jabrlanuvchilar boĘ»lsa, ularning familiyalari va yashash
			manzillari; huquqbuzarning tushuntirishi; ishni hal qilish uchun
			zarur boĘ»lgan boshqa maĘĽlumotlar koĘ»rsatiladi. Basharti
			huquqbuzarlik tufayli moddiy zarar yetkazilgan boĘ»lsa, bu ham
			bayonnomada koĘ»rsatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201270" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bayonnoma
			uni tuzgan shaxs va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxs
			tomonidan imzolanadi; guvohlar va jabrlanuvchilar boĘ»lgan
			taqdirda esa â€” bayonnoma mazkur shaxslar tomonidan ham
			imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201272" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzarlik
			sodir etgan shaxs bayonnomani imzolashdan bosh tortgan taqdirda,
			bayonnomaga bu haqda yozib qoĘ»yiladi. Huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan
			shaxs bayonnomaning mazmuni yuzasidan bayonnomaga ilova
			qilinadigan tushuntirish va mulohazalarini berishga, shuningdek
			mazkur bayonnomaga imzo chekishdan bosh tortish sabablarini bayon
			etishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201274" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bayonnomani
			tuzish vaqtida huquqbuzarga ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201347"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">294-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan uning huquq va burchlari tushuntiriladi va bu xususda
			bayonnomaga yozib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201276" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">282-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomani joĘ»natish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7402080" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bayonnoma
			boshqa hujjatlar va ish boĘ»yicha dalillar bilan birga
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan yoki aniqlangan paytdan boshlab uch
			sutkadan kechiktirmay maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish vakolatiga ega boĘ»lgan organ (mansabdor
			shaxs)ga yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7402090" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ish
			boĘ»yicha ekspertiza tayinlangan, yetkazilgan zararni baholash
			choralari koĘ»rilgan, haydovchilik guvohnomasini olganlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida soĘ»rovlar joĘ»natilgan hollarda bayonnoma ushbu
			hujjatlar kelib tushgan paytdan eĘĽtiboran uch kun ichida maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rib chiqish
			vakolatiga ega boĘ»lgan organga (mansabdor shaxsga) yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540633" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomaga quyidagilar ilova
			qilinadi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540641" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning shaxsini
			tasdiqlovchi hujjatning koĘ»chirma nusxasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7594209" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>)
			mavjud boĘ»lgan taqdirda â€” jabrlanuvchi jismoniy shaxsning
			shaxsiy identifikatsiya raqami yoki yuridik shaxsning soliq
			toĘ»lovchi identifikatsiya raqami;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540644" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ichki ishlar organlarining maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan
			shaxsning ilgari maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilganligi fakti
			mavjudligi yoki mavjud emasligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotnomasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540646" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning tushuntirishi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540649" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			jabrlanuvchining, guvohlarning koĘ»rsatuvlari, ekspertning
			xulosasi, agar ular mavjud boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540651" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilganligi faktini tasdiqlovchi
			boshqa materiallar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7634087" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			ushbu Kodeks 269<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7634065"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7634069"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7634071"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar boĘ»yicha jabrlanuvchining arizasi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540673" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199971"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">133</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-199976"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">134-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomaga
			ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-201278"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan hujjatlardan
			tashqari quyidagilar ilova qilinadi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540675" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			haydovchilik guvohnomasi, transport vositasi roĘ»yxatdan
			oĘ»tkazilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi guvohnomaning va ishonchnomaning
			koĘ»chirma nusxasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540677" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			sugĘ»urta polisining koĘ»chirma nusxasi (mavjud boĘ»lgan
			taqdirda);</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540678" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			alkogolli ichimlikdan, giyohvandlik moddasi taĘĽsiridan yoki
			oĘ»zgacha tarzda mast holda boshqarilganligi belgilangan tartibda
			tekshiruvdan oĘ»tkazilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi tibbiy xulosa,
			alkogolli ichimlikdan, giyohvandlik moddasi taĘĽsiridan yoki
			oĘ»zgacha tarzdagi mastlik holatini aniqlash uchun tekshiruvdan
			oĘ»tishdan boĘ»yin tovlagan taqdirda ikki xolis ishtirokida
			tuzilgan dalolatnoma;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540682" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			koĘ»zdan kechirish dalolatnomasi va hodisa joyining chizmasi,
			transport vositasining shikastlanishlari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			maĘĽlumotnoma va texnika vositalari shikastlanishlarining
			fotosuratlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540686" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			avtomototransport vositasiga yetkazilgan zararni baholash
			dalolatnomasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540687" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			sudga qadar avtotexnika ekspertizasi tayinlanganligi haqidagi
			qaror va ekspertlarning xulosasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540690" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
			surishtiruv yakunlariga koĘ»ra, manfaatdor shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish materiallari bilan tanishganligi
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540696" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-198031"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">52-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomaga ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.2018%2000#-3540633"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan hujjatlardan
			tashqari quyidagilar ilova qilinadi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540699" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			jabrlanuvchining arizasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540702" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			sudga qadar tibbiy ekspertiza tayinlanganligi haqidagi qaror va
			ekspertlarning xulosasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540703" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			jinoyat ishi qoĘ»zgĘ»atishni rad etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201280" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">283-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzilmaydigan
			hollar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7180967" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			fuqaro oĘ»zi sodir etgan huquqbuzarlik faktiga eĘĽtiroz bildirmasa
			hamda unga joyning oĘ»zida solinadigan jarima miqdori bazaviy
			hisoblash miqdorining ikkidan bir qismidan oshmasa, shuningdek
			qonunchilikda nazarda tutilgan boshqa hollarda maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzilmaydi. YoĘ»l harakati
			qoidalarini buzganlik uchun maĘĽmuriy bayonnoma, jarima miqdoridan
			qatĘĽi nazar, tuziladi, bundan ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6056315"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan hollar
			mustasno.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201284" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			toĘ»laganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida aybdorga belgilangan shakldagi
			kvitansiya beriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201285" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			fuqaro oĘ»ziga solinadigan jarimaga eĘĽtiroz bildirsa, u holda
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201259"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">279-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
			bayonnoma tuziladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6056315" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositasidan foydalangan holda yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari
			buzilganligi maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto- va video qayd etish
			texnika vositalari orqali qayd etilgan, shuningdek soliq yoki
			bojxona toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik buzilganligi OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat soliq qoĘ»mitasining yoki Davlat bojxona
			qoĘ»mitasining Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimlari orqali
			qayd etilgan taqdirda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4512885" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3493683"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">193-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan deputatlik va senatorlik faoliyatining kafolatlari
			buzilgan taqdirda, tegishincha OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy
			Majlisi palatalari devonlari hamda xalq deputatlari mahalliy
			Kengashlari kotibiyatlari maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzmasdan oĘ»zining arizasida huquqbuzarning shaxsi,
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joy, vaqt va bu
			huquqbuzarlikning mohiyati haqidagi maĘĽlumotlarni, shuningdek
			ishni hal etish uchun zarur boĘ»lgan boshqa maĘĽlumotlarni
			koĘ»rsatgan holda sudga murojaat qilish huquqiga ega.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3998406" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3998265"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">197</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan advokatning professional faoliyatiga toĘ»sqinlik qilingan
			taqdirda, advokat maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma
			tuzmasdan oĘ»z arizasida huquqbuzarning shaxsi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			maĘĽlumotlarni, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joyni,
			vaqtni va bu huquqbuzarlikning mohiyatini, shuningdek ishni hal
			etish uchun zarur boĘ»lgan boshqa maĘĽlumotlarni koĘ»rsatgan holda
			sudga murojaat qilish huquqiga ega.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6420333" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6420274"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">197</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan taqdirda (taĘĽlim tashkiloti
			pedagog xodimining kasbiy faoliyatiga qonunga xilof ravishda
			aralashish yoki oĘ»z xizmat vazifalarini bajarishiga toĘ»sqinlik
			qilish), taĘĽlim tashkilotining pedagog xodimi maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzmasdan oĘ»z arizasida
			huquqbuzarning shaxsi, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joy,
			vaqt va uning mohiyati toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlarni, shuningdek
			ishni hal etish uchun zarur boĘ»lgan boshqa maĘĽlumotlarni
			koĘ»rsatgan holda sudga murojaat qilish huquqiga ega.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201287" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">284-modda.
			Huquqbuzarni ushlab keltirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4359217" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzish maqsadida, agar
			bayonnoma tuzish shart boĘ»lib, uni joyning oĘ»zida tuzishning
			imkoni boĘ»lmasa, ichki ishlar organi xodimi yoki maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzishga vakolatli boshqa
			shaxs huquqbuzarni ichki ishlar organiga yoxud fuqarolarning
			oĘ»zini oĘ»zi boshqarish organi binosiga keltirishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4359222" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalaridan foydalanish, harakat tartibi va xavfsizligini
			saqlash, transportda yuklarni but saqlashni taĘĽminlash borasidagi
			qoidalar, transportda yongĘ»indan saqlash qoidalari,
			sanitariya-gigiyena va epidemiyaga qarshi kurash-sanitariya
			qoidalari buzilgan taqdirda huquqbuzar, agar unda shaxsini
			tasdiqlovchi hujjatlar va u haqda zarur maĘĽlumotlar berishi
			mumkin boĘ»lgan guvohlar boĘ»lmasa, vakolatli shaxs tomonidan
			ichki ishlar organlariga ushlab keltirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543646" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»simlik
			va hayvonot dunyosini muhofaza qilish va undan foydalanish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik buzilganda bayonnoma tuzish maqsadida,
			basharti huquqbuzarning shaxsini huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan
			joyning oĘ»zida aniqlash mumkin boĘ»lmasa, oĘ»simlik va hayvonot
			dunyosini asrash va undan foydalanish ustidan nazorat olib
			boruvchi organlarning xodimlari, muhofaza etiladigan tabiiy
			hududlarning mansabdor shaxslari, shuningdek ichki ishlar
			organlari xodimlari va OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Milliy
			gvardiyasining harbiy xizmatchilari (xodimlari) shunday
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxslarni ichki ishlar organlariga yoki
			fuqarolarning oĘ»zini oĘ»zi boshqarish organi binosiga ushlab
			keltirishlari mumkin. Huquqbuzar ekologiya va atrof-muhitni
			muhofaza qilish jamoatchi inspektorlari, ovchilik jamoatchi
			inspektorlari, baliqlarni muhofaza qilish jamoatchi inspektorlari
			va oĘ»rmonlarning jamoatchi inspektorlari tomonidan ham ushlab
			keltirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8233715" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yuridik
			shaxslarning qoĘ»riqlanadigan obyektlariga, boshqa mol-mulkiga
			tajovuz qilish bilan bogĘ»liq huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan
			taqdirda, huquqbuzar OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Milliy
			gvardiyasining harbiy xizmatchilari (xodimlari), ichki ishlar
			organlari xodimlari yoki harbiylashtirilgan qoĘ»riqlash boĘ»linmasi
			ishchilari va xizmatchilari tomonidan huquqbuzarlikka barham
			berish, huquqbuzarning shaxsini aniqlash va huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzish uchun OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Milliy gvardiyasi boĘ»linmalariga, ichki ishlar organlariga yoki
			harbiylashtirilgan qoĘ»riqlash boĘ»linmasining xizmat binosiga
			ushlab keltirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201293" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzarni
			olib kelish iloji boricha qisqa muddatda amalga oshirilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201294" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqarolarning
			oĘ»zini oĘ»zi boshqarish organi binosiga olib kelingan shaxs bu
			yerda bir soatdan ortiq ushlab turilishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201295" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXI
			bob. MAĘĽMURIY YOĘ»L BILAN USHLAB TURISH, ASHYOLAR VA TRANSPORT
			VOSITALARINI KOĘ»ZDAN KECHIRISH, ASHYOLAR VA HUJJATLARNI OLIB
			QOĘ»YISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201296" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">285-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritishni
			taĘĽminlash choralari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201297" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Boshqa
			taĘĽsir koĘ»rsatish choralari qoĘ»llanib boĘ»linganidan keyin
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni toĘ»xtatish, huquqbuzarning shaxsini
			aniqlash, basharti bayonnoma tuzish zarur boĘ»lib, uni
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joyning oĘ»zida tuzish imkoni
			boĘ»lmagan taqdirda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzish, ishlarning oĘ»z vaqtida va toĘ»gĘ»ri koĘ»rib
			chiqilishini taĘĽminlash va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlar yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorlarni ijro etish maqsadida
			mazkur shaxsni maĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turishga, shaxsan
			koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazishga, uning ashyolari, transport vositalarini
			koĘ»zdan kechirishga va ashyo hamda hujjatlarni olib qoĘ»yishga
			yoĘ»l qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453110" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddada nazarda tutilgan maqsadlarda shaxsni maĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l bilan
			ushlab turish, shaxsan koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish, uning ashyolari,
			transport vositalarini koĘ»zdan kechirish va ashyo hamda
			hujjatlarini olib qoĘ»yish tartibi ushbu Kodeks va OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasining boshqa qonunchiligi bilan belgilanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201299" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">286-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201300" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzilib, unda:
			bayonnoma tuzilgan sana va joy, bayonnoma tuzgan shaxsning
			lavozimi, familiyasi, ismi, otasining ismi; ushlab turilgan shaxs
			haqidagi maĘĽlumotlar; uni ushlab turish vaqti, joyi va uning
			asoslari koĘ»rsatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201301" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bayonnoma
			uni tuzgan mansabdor shaxs va ushlab turilgan shaxs tomonidan
			imzolanadi. Ushlab turilgan shaxs bayonnomani imzolashdan bosh
			tortgan taqdirda, bayonnomaga shu haqda yozib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201302" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushlab
			turilgan shaxsning iltimosiga koĘ»ra, u ushlab turilgan joy haqida
			uning qarindosh-urugĘ»lari, advokat, ish yoki oĘ»qish joyidagi
			maĘĽmuriyat xabardor qilib qoĘ»yiladi. Voyaga yetmagan shaxs
			ushlab turilgani haqida uning ota-onasi yoki ular oĘ»rnini
			bosuvchi shaxslar albatta xabardor qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201303" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">287-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turishga vakolatli organlar
			(mansabdor shaxslar)</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453114" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish bu ishga OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			qonunchiligi bilan vakolat berib qoĘ»yilgan organlar (mansabdor
			shaxslar) tomonidangina amalga oshirilishi mumkin, chunonchi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8233721" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3500250"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">47</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">4</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3500261"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">47</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462486"><font style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462581"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">8</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462587"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">9</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4775812"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">54</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4024706"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">56-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2857226"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">56</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;(jamoat

			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan taqdirda davlat soliq
			organlarining, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi
			huzuridagi Iqtisodiy jinoyatlarga qarshi kurashish departamenti va
			uning joylardagi boĘ»linmalarining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6543655" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">9)
			ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4775812"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">54</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a
