			210<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3034101"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan taqdirda â€” OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Milliy gvardiyasi organlarining mansabdor shaxslari
			tomonidan.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201313" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">288-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish muddatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201314" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish uch soatdan ortiq davom etishi mumkin
			emas. Ayrim hollarda alohida zarurat munosabati bilan OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi qonun hujjatlarida maĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l bilan ushlab
			turishning boshqacha muddatlari belgilanishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201315" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Chegara
			tartibini yoki OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi davlat chegarasi orqali
			oĘ»tish punktlaridagi tartibni buzgan shaxslar bayonnoma tuzish
			uchun uch soatgacha muddatga ushlab turilishi mumkin,
			huquqbuzarning shaxsini va huquqbuzarlik holatlarini aniqlash
			uchun zarur boĘ»lgan hollarda esa â€” ushlash paytidan boshlab
			yigirma toĘ»rt soat ichida prokurorga yozma tarzda maĘĽlum qilib,
			uch sutkagacha yoki huquqbuzarda oĘ»zining shaxsini tasdiqlovchi
			hujjat boĘ»lmasa, prokurorning sanksiyasi bilan oĘ»n sutkagacha
			muddatga ushlab turilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5712078" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4775812"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">54</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198068"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">56</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1630185"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">57</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198080"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">58</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198117"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font></a>,<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-334813"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;90-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			164-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-336027"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200287"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">170</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200538"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">183</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1066964"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1066990"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">184</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1249796"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">191</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200624"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4575495"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">194</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200637"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">195</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4575534"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">195</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200683"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">201</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200711"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">204</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200719"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">205</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200735"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">206</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200757"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">210-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			225-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4585658"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			â€”</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4585706"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan yoxud oĘ»zining shaxsi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			maĘĽlumotlarni yashirgan shaxslar huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishi jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sud yoki ichki ishlar organi
			boshligĘ»i (boshliq oĘ»rinbosari) tomonidan koĘ»rib chiqilgunga
			qadar, lekin 24 soatdan koĘ»p boĘ»lmagan muddatga ushlab turilishi
			mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201317" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish muddati huquqbuzarni bayonnoma tuzish
			uchun olib kelish paytidan boshlanadi, mast holdagi shaxslar uchun
			esa â€” ular hushyor tortgan vaqtdan boshlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201318" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">289-modda.
			Shaxsni koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish va ashyolarni koĘ»zdan kechirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7153757" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shaxsni
			koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish ichki ishlar organlarining,
			harbiylashtirilgan qoĘ»riqlash boĘ»linmalarining, havo
			transportining, bojxona organlari, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Milliy gvardiyasi organlari va OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat
			xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara qoĘ»shinlarining vakolatli shaxslari,
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi qonun hujjatlarida bevosita nazarda
			tutilgan hollarda esa, shunga vakolati boĘ»lgan boshqa organlar
			tomonidan amalga oshirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201320" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shaxsni
			koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazilayotgan shaxs bilan bir
			jinsda boĘ»lgan shaxslar tomonidan va shu jinsdagi ikkita xolis
			guvoh ishtirok etgan holda amalga oshirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7684809" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ashyolarni
			koĘ»zdan kechirib chiqish ichki ishlar organlarining,
			harbiylashtirilgan qoĘ»riqlash boĘ»linmalarining, havo
			transportining, bojxona organlarining, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Milliy gvardiyasi organlarining, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat
			xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara qoĘ»shinlarining, soliq organlarining,
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi huzuridagi Iqtisodiy
			jinoyatlarga qarshi kurashish departamenti va uning joylardagi
			boĘ»linmalarining, adliya organlarining (intellektual mulk
			obyektlariga boĘ»lgan huquqlarni himoya qilishda), OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Ekologiya va atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish davlat
			qoĘ»mitasi organlarining, OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi OĘ»rmon
			xoĘ»jaligi davlat qoĘ»mitasi organlarining, OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi qonun hujjatlarida bevosita nazarda tutilgan hollarda
			esa, shuningdek tegishli vakolati boĘ»lgan organlarning boshqa
			vakolatli shaxslari tomonidan amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201322" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ashyolarni,
			ov qilish va baliq tutish qurollarini, qoĘ»lga kiritilgan
			mahsulotlar va boshqa buyumlarni koĘ»zdan kechirish, odatda, shu
			ashyo va buyumlar kimning mulki yoki egaligida boĘ»lsa, oĘ»sha
			shaxs ishtirokida amalga oshiriladi. Kechiktirib boĘ»lmaydigan
			hollarda, mazkur ashyolar, buyumlarni mulkdorsiz (egasisiz) ikkita
			xolis guvoh ishtirokida ham koĘ»zdan kechirib chiqilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201323" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shaxsiy
			koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish va ashyolarni koĘ»zdan kechirish toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuziladi yoki maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			bayonnomaga yoxud maĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomaga tegishincha yozib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453060" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bojxona
			muassasalarida shaxsiy koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish va ashyolarni koĘ»zdan
			kechirish bojxonaga doir qonunchilik bilan belgilangan tartibda
			amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7684823" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">290-modda.
			Ashyolar va hujjatlarni olib qoĘ»yish hamda xatlash</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7684835" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzarlarni
			ushlash, shaxsiy koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish yoki ashyolarini koĘ»zdan
			kechirish vaqtida aniqlangan huquqbuzarlik sodir etish quroli yoki
			bevosita huquqbuzarlik ashyosi boĘ»lgan ashyo va hujjatlar ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201303"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">287</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201318"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">289-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan organlarning mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan olib
			qoĘ»yiladi. Olib qoĘ»yilgan ashyo va hujjatlar maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar koĘ»rib chiqilgunga qadar
			shunday ashyo va hujjatlarni olib qoĘ»yish huquqi berilgan
			organlar (mansabdor shaxslar) tomonidan belgilab beriladigan
			joylarda saqlanadi, ish koĘ»rib boĘ»linganidan keyin esa, uni
			koĘ»rib chiqish natijalariga qarab, bu ashyo va hujjatlar
			belgilangan tartibda musodara qilinadi yoki egasiga qaytarib
			beriladi yoxud yoĘ»q qilib yuboriladi, ashyolar haq toĘ»lab olib
			qoĘ»yilgan taqdirda esa â€” sotib yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7684847" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Adliya
			organlari tomonidan ashyolarni koĘ»zdan kechirish vaqtida
			(intellektual mulk obyektlariga boĘ»lgan huquqlarni himoya
			qilishda) aniqlangan huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli yoki
			bevosita huquqbuzarlik ashyosi boĘ»lgan ashyo va hujjatlar
			xatlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201327" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Olib
			qoĘ»yilgan orden, medal, faxriy unvonning koĘ»krakka taqiladigan
			nishoni qonuniy egasiga qaytarib beriladi, basharti, egasi
			nomaĘĽlum boĘ»lsa, unda tegishli organga joĘ»natiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453063" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bojxona
			qoidalari yoki soliq va valyuta toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik
			buzilgan taqdirda, basharti huquqbuzar OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasida
			doimiy istiqomat joyiga ega boĘ»lmasa, jarima undirilishini
			taĘĽminlash maqsadida uning ashyolari (qimmatli buyumlari) olib
			qoĘ»yilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201329" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ashyo
			va hujjatlar olib qoĘ»yilgan taqdirda bu xususda bayonnoma
			tuziladi yoki maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomaga
			yoxud buyumlarni koĘ»zdan kechirib chiqish yoki maĘĽmuriy yoĘ»l
			bilan ushlab turish haqidagi bayonnomalarga tegishli yozuv yozib
			qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201330" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sodir
			etilgan huquqbuzarlik uchun ushbu Kodeksga muvofiq transport
			vositasini, kichik hajmli kemani boshqarish huquqidan, ov qilish
			huquqidan mahrum etish tarzida maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanilishi
			mumkin boĘ»lsa, huquqbuzardan uning ishi yuzasidan qaror
			chiqarilgunga qadar transport vositasi, kichik hajmli kemani
			boshqarish huquqini beruvchi guvohnoma, ovchilik bileti olib
			qoĘ»yiladi va bu haqda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			bayonnomaga, shuningdek haydovchilik guvohnomasining taloniga,
			kema boshqaruvchisi guvohnomasining taloniga tegishlicha yozib
			qoĘ»yilib, talonlar transport vositasi haydovchisiga, kema
			boshqaruvchisiga qaytarib beriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671812" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositasini boshqarish huquqini beruvchi guvohnomani olib qoĘ»yish
			â€” OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Ichki ishlar vazirligi, kichik
			hajmli kemalarni boshqarish huquqini beruvchi guvohnomani olib
			qoĘ»yish â€” OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar
			vazirligi, ov qilish huquqini beruvchi guvohnomani olib qoĘ»yish
			esa â€” OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Ekologiya va atrof-muhitni
			muhofaza qilish davlat qoĘ»mitasi tomonidan belgilangan tartibda
			amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6052327" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6051882"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">185</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052020"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">220</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052144"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">220</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052269"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">221-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan taqdirda, ichki ishlar
			organlari xodimlari ish koĘ»rib chiqilguniga qadar qurolni va
			uning oĘ»q-dorilarini olib qoĘ»yishga haqli boĘ»lib, bu haqda olib
			qoĘ»yilayotgan qurolning markasi yoki modeli, kalibri, turkumi va
			raqami, oĘ»q-dorilarning miqdori va turi koĘ»rsatilgan holda
			bayonnomaga yozib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201333" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»z
			xizmat burchini bajarish vaqtida huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxsga
			nisbatan uning ashyolarini olib qoĘ»yish, shaxsiy koĘ»rikdan
			oĘ»tkazish va ashyolarni koĘ»zdan kechirib chiqish juda zarur
			boĘ»lgan hollardagina qoĘ»llaniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201334" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">291-modda.
			Transport vositalarini ushlab turish va koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish
			asoslari va tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453067" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini ushlab turish va koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish qonunchilik
			bilan vakolat berilgan organlar (mansabdor shaxslar) tomonidan
			ushlab turish sababi bartaraf etilgunga va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish koĘ»rilgunga qadar amalga oshirilishi mumkin,
			chunonchi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044532" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">a)

			136-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400754"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-7400781"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi

		</div>
		<div id="-7153806" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">

		<div id="-7153834" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">e)
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1256705"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">196</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6448336"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">196</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200857"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">224-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>,
			224<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1256720"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1256723"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1256726"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">224</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			225-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6448592"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5220120"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052517"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>, 227<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">21</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4581849"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1081901"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">227</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">23</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganda â€”
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara
			qoĘ»shinlarining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6681740" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">j)
			ushbu Kodeks 210<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/97664#3034104"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganda â€” harbiylashtirilgan qoĘ»riqlash
			boĘ»linmalarining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671803" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">z)
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4671509"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">119</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199967"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">132-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganda â€”
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligi Kichik
			hajmli kemalar inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5071928" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Karantinli
			va inson uchun xavfli boĘ»lgan boshqa yuqumli kasalliklar paydo
			boĘ»lishi hamda tarqalishi munosabati bilan tegishli hududlarda
			yoki obyektlarda cheklovchi tadbirlar (karantin) joriy etilgan
			sharoitlarda transport vositalari haydovchilari tomonidan ushbu
			Kodeks 54-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4775816"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>(transport vositalarining
			harakatlanishiga cheklovlar buzilishi qismida) nazarda tutilgan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganda, transport vositalarini
			ushlab turish ichki ishlar organlari tomonidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish koĘ»rilguniga qadar amalga
			oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7402118" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l
			harakati qoidalarini buzganlik uchun jarima solish haqida qaror
			chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran oltmish kun ichida jarima
			toĘ»lanmagan taqdirda, jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqargan
			vakolatli organ tomonidan elektron tizimlarda avtomatik tarzda
			joylashtirilgan maĘĽlumotga koĘ»ra transport vositasi jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning ijrosi yuzasidan ish yuritish
			tugaguniga qadar ushlab turiladi, bundan jarima uchun toĘ»lov
			elektron toĘ»lov tizimlari, mobil ilovalar yoki bank kassalari
			orqali amalga oshiriladigan hollar mustasno.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7153855" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonunchilik
			buzilganligi uchun ushlangan transport vositalarini (OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Qurolli Kuchlarining va OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Davlat xavfsizlik xizmati Chegara qoĘ»shinlarining transport
			vositalaridan tashqari) saqlab turish joylariga olib borish,
			joylashtirish va saqlash tartibi OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Vazirlar Mahkamasi tomonidan belgilanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201341" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">292-modda.
			Transport vositasini boshqarishdan chetlatish, mastlik holatini
			aniqlash uchun tekshiruvdan oĘ»tkazish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201342" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini boshqarayotgan mastlik holatida deb hisoblashga
			yetarli asoslar boĘ»lgan shaxs transport vositasini boshqarishdan
			chetlashtirilishi va mastlik holatini aniqlash uchun belgilangan
			tartibda tekshiruvdan oĘ»tkazilishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201343" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mazkur
			shaxsni tekshirishga yuborish va bu tekshiruvni oĘ»tkazish
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Ichki ishlar vazirligi, SogĘ»liqni
			saqlash vazirligi va Adliya vazirligi tomonidan belgilangan
			tartibda amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201344" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">293-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritishni
			taĘĽminlash choralari ustidan shikoyat berish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201345" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish, shaxsni koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkazish,
			ashyolarni koĘ»zdan kechirish, transport vositalarini ushlab
			turish va koĘ»zdan kechirish, ashyo va hujjatlarni olib qoĘ»yish,
			transport vositasini boshqarishdan chetlashtirish ustidan
			manfaatdor shaxs yuqori organga (mansabdor shaxsga), prokurorga
			yoki sudga shikoyat berishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201346" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXII
			bob. MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI ISHNI YURITISHDA
			QATNASHUVCHI SHAXSLAR</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201347" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">294-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning huquq va burchlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201348" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxs ish materiallari bilan tanishib
			chiqishga, izohlar berishga, dalillar keltirishga, oĘ»z iltimosini
			bayon etishga, ishni koĘ»rib chiqish vaqtida advokatning yuridik
			yordamidan foydalanishga, oĘ»z ona tilida soĘ»zlashga va
			tarjimonning xizmatlaridan foydalanishga, ish yuzasidan
			chiqarilgan qaror ustidan shikoyat berishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803667" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
			tortilayotgan shaxs ishtirokida koĘ»rib chiqiladi. Mazkur shaxsga
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqish joyi va vaqti haqida xabar qilinganligi
			toĘ»gĘ»risida maĘĽlumotlar boĘ»lgan va undan ishni koĘ»rib
			chiqishni kechiktirish xususida hech qanday iltimos tushmagan
			hollarda, shuningdek ushbu Kodeks 309<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2727707"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va 309<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2727697"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
			hollardagina ish uning ishtirokisiz koĘ»rib chiqilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453079" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			sodir etgan huquqbuzarligi uchun ushbu Kodeksda maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa
			olish, ashyolarini musodara qilish yoki haqini toĘ»lash sharti
			bilan olib qoĘ»yish choralarini qoĘ»llash nazarda tutilgan boĘ»lsa,
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			vaqtida maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning ishtirok
			etishi shart. Mazkur shaxs bunday maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqishda ishtirok etishdan boĘ»yin
			tovlagan taqdirda, u jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudning ajrimiga
			binoan ichki ishlar organi tomonidan majburan olib kelinishi
			mumkin. Bojxona toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikni buzgan holda
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining bojxona chegarasi orqali tovarlarni
			yoki boshqa qimmatliklarni olib oĘ»tish bilan bogĘ»liq boĘ»lib,
			musodara qoĘ»llanilishi mumkin boĘ»lgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish alohida hollarda, agar maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
			tortilayotgan shaxs OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududidan tashqarida
			boĘ»lsa yoki uning turgan joyini aniqlash imkoni boĘ»lmasa, bunday
			shaxsning ishtirokisiz koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201351" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">295-modda.
			Jabrlanuvchi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201352" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik yoĘ»li bilan maĘĽnaviy, jismoniy yoki mulkiy zarar
			yetkazilgan shaxs jabrlanuvchi deb topiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201353" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jabrlanuvchi
			ishga oid hamma materiallar bilan tanishib chiqishga, koĘ»rsatuvlar
			berishga, dalillar keltirishga, iltimoslar qilishga, ishni koĘ»rib
			chiqish paytida advokatning yuridik yordamidan foydalanishga, oĘ»z
			ona tilida soĘ»zlashga va tarjimon xizmatidan foydalanishga, ish
			yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror ustidan shikoyat berishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201354" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">296-modda.
			Qonuniy vakillar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4512919" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Voyaga
			yetmagan yoki oĘ»zining jismoniy nuqsonlari yoxud ruhiy holatining
			buzilganligi sababli maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlar yuzasidan oĘ»z huquqini oĘ»zi amalga oshirolmaydigan â€”
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning yoki
			jabrlanuvchining manfaatlarini ular uchun mazkur shaxslarning
			qonuniy vakillari (ota-onalari, er yoki xotinlari, voyaga yetgan
			bolalari, farzandlikka oluvchilar, vasiylar, homiylar) ifodalashga
			haqlidirlar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201356" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			vakillar ish materiallari bilan tanishishga va manfaatlarini
			oĘ»zlari ifoda etayotgan shaxs nomidan iltimoslar qilishga, ish
			yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror ustidan shikoyat berishga haqlidirlar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201357" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">297-modda.
			Advokat</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201358" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqishda shu
			huquqbuzarlikni sodir etgan shaxsni ushlab turish paytidan boshlab
			advokat qatnashishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201359" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Advokat
			ishga oid materiallar bilan tanishib chiqishga, uni taklif qilgan
			shaxsning topshirigĘ»iga binoan va uning nomidan iltimoslar
			qilishga va ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror ustidan shikoyat
			berishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6823975" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqayotgan vakolatli
			mansabdor shaxs yoki sud maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan
			shaxsning iltimosiga koĘ»ra, â€śDavlat hisobidan yuridik yordam
			koĘ»rsatish toĘ»gĘ»risidaâ€ťgi OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-6502543"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Qonuniga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
			davlat hisobidan yuridik yordam koĘ»rsatadigan advokatning ishda
			ishtirok etishini taĘĽminlash choralarini koĘ»rishi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6823976" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Davlat
			hisobidan yuridik yordam koĘ»rsatadigan advokatni jalb qilishda
			advokatning ishda ishtirok etishi tasdiqlangan paytdan eĘĽtiboran
			unga ishga kirishish uchun kamida toĘ»rt soat vaqt berilishi
			kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201360" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">298-modda.
			Guvoh</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201361" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha aniqlanishi kerak
			boĘ»lgan biron-bir holatdan voqif boĘ»lishi mumkin boĘ»lgan har
			qanday shaxs shu ish yuzasidan guvoh sifatida chaqirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201362" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			yuritayotgan organning (mansabdor shaxsning) chaqiruviga binoan
			guvoh koĘ»rsatilgan vaqtda kelishi, haqqoniy koĘ»rsatuvlar
			berishi, shu ish xususida oĘ»ziga maĘĽlum boĘ»lgan hamma
			narsalarni aytib berishi va qoĘ»yilgan savollarga javob berishi
			shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635117" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">299-modda.
			Ekspert</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635119" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xulosa
			berish uchun zarur fan, texnika, sanĘĽat yoki hunar sohasida
			maxsus bilimlarga ega boĘ»lgan jismoniy shaxs ekspert sifatida
			tayinlanishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635121" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ekspert
			sifatida davlat sud-ekspertiza muassasasi eksperti, boshqa
			korxona, muassasa, tashkilot xodimi yoki boshqa jismoniy shaxs
			ishtirok etishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635122" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ekspert
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan maxsus bilimlarga zarurat tugĘ»ilgan
			hollarda tayinlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635123" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Belgilangan
			tartibda muomalaga layoqatsiz yoki muomala layoqati cheklangan deb
			topilgan shaxslar, shuningdek qasddan sodir etgan jinoyatlari
			uchun sudlanganlik holati tugallanmagan yoki sudlanganligi olib
			tashlanmagan shaxslar ekspert sifatida jalb etilishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7236124" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ekspert:
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishning ekspertiza
			predmetiga oid materiallari bilan tanishish, ulardan zarur
			maĘĽlumotlarni yozib olish yoki koĘ»chirma nusxalar olish;
			ekspertizani oĘ»tkazish uchun zarur boĘ»lgan qoĘ»shimcha
			materiallar va tekshirish obyektlari taqdim etilishi haqida
			iltimosnomalar berish; maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishni yuritayotgan organ (mansabdor shaxs) ruxsati bilan ishni
			koĘ»rib chiqishda hozir boĘ»lish, javobgarlikka tortilayotgan
			shaxsga, jabrlanuvchiga, guvohlarga ekspertiza predmetiga oid
			savollar berish; ashyoviy, yozma, raqamli dalillarni va
			hujjatlarni koĘ»zdan kechirish; oĘ»z xulosasida nafaqat oĘ»zining
			oldiga qoĘ»yilgan savollar boĘ»yicha, balki ekspertiza predmetiga
			oid va ish uchun ahamiyatga molik boshqa masalalar boĘ»yicha ham
			fikrlarini bayon etish; uning xulosasi yoki koĘ»rsatuvlari
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuritishda ishtirok
			etuvchi shaxslar tomonidan notoĘ»gĘ»ri talqin qilinganligi
			xususida maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib
			chiqish bayonnomasiga kiritilishi lozim boĘ»lgan bayonotlar
			berish; agar u maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			yuritilayotgan tilni bilmasa yoki yetarlicha bilmasa, oĘ»z ona
			tilida xulosa taqdim etish va koĘ»rsatuvlar berish hamda bunday
			holda tarjimon xizmatidan foydalanish; agar maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organning
			(mansabdor shaxsning) qarorlari, harakatlari (harakatsizligi)
			ekspertning huquq va erkinliklarini buzayotgan boĘ»lsa, bu
			qarorlar, harakatlar (harakatsizlik) ustidan shikoyat qilish
			huquqiga egadir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635125" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ekspert:
			oĘ»ziga taqdim etilgan tekshirish obyektlarini har tomonlama va
			toĘ»liq tekshirishdan oĘ»tkazishi, oĘ»z oldiga qoĘ»yilgan savollar
			yuzasidan asosli va xolisona yozma xulosa berishi; maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organning
			(mansabdor shaxsning) chaqiruviga binoan hozir boĘ»lishi; oĘ»zi
			oĘ»tkazgan ekspertiza xususida koĘ»rsatuvlar berishi va oĘ»zi
			bergan xulosani tushuntirish uchun qoĘ»shimcha savollarga javob
			berishi; ekspertizani oĘ»tkazishi munosabati bilan oĘ»ziga maĘĽlum
			boĘ»lib qolgan maĘĽlumotlarni oshkor qilmasligi; taqdim etilgan
			tekshirish obyektlari va ish materiallarining saqlanishini
			taĘĽminlashi; maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish koĘ»rib
			chiqilayotganda tartibga rioya qilishi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635131" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">299<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Ekspertning yoki ekspertlar komissiyasining xulosasi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635132" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ekspert
			yoki ekspertlar komissiyasi ekspert tekshiruvlarini oĘ»tkazib
			boĘ»lganidan keyin tegishincha ekspert yoxud ekspertlar
			komissiyasi tarkibiga kiruvchi har bir ekspert imzosi bilan
			tasdiqlanadigan xulosa tuzadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635133" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xulosada:
			ekspertiza oĘ»tkazilgan sana va joy; ekspertizani oĘ»tkazish
			asosi; ekspertizani tayinlagan organ (mansabdor shaxs) toĘ»gĘ»risida
			maĘĽlumotlar; ekspert (familiyasi, ismi, otasining ismi,
			maĘĽlumoti, ixtisosligi, ish staji, ilmiy darajasi, ilmiy unvoni,
			egallab turgan lavozimi) va ekspertizani oĘ»tkazish topshirilgan
			tashkilot haqida maĘĽlumotlar; ekspertning bila turib notoĘ»gĘ»ri
			xulosa berganligi, xulosa berishni rad etganligi yoki bu ishdan
			boĘ»yin tovlaganligi uchun jinoiy javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			ogohlantirilganligi; ekspertning oldiga qoĘ»yilgan savollar;
			ekspertga taqdim etilgan tekshirish obyektlari va ish
			materiallari; ekspertiza oĘ»tkazilayotganda hozir boĘ»lgan
			shaxslar haqida maĘĽlumotlar; qoĘ»llanilgan usullar koĘ»rsatilgan
			holda ekspert tekshiruvlarining mazmuni va natijalari, shuningdek
			bu ekspert tekshiruvlari, agar ekspertlar komissiyasi ishlagan
			boĘ»lsa, kim tomonidan oĘ»tkazilganligi; ekspert tekshiruvi
			natijalarining baholanishi, qoĘ»yilgan savollarga berilgan asosli
			javoblar; ish uchun ahamiyatga molik boĘ»lgan va ekspertning
			tashabbusiga koĘ»ra aniqlangan holatlar koĘ»rsatilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635135" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xulosada
			huquqbuzarlik sabablari va uning sodir etilishiga imkon bergan
			shart-sharoitlar, shuningdek ularni bartaraf etishga doir
			tashkiliy-texnikaviy tavsiyalar koĘ»rsatilgan boĘ»lishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453082" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xulosani
			va uning natijalarini tasvirlovchi materiallar ushbu xulosaga
			ilova qilinadi hamda uning tarkibiy qismi boĘ»lib xizmat qiladi.
			Ekspert tekshiruvining olib borilishi, shart-sharoitlari va
			natijalarini hujjatlashtiradigan materiallar davlat sud-ekspertiza
			muassasasida yoki boshqa korxona, muassasa, tashkilotda
			qonunchilikda belgilangan muddatlarda saqlanadi. Ular ekspertizani
			tayinlagan organning (mansabdor shaxsning) talabiga binoan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishga qoĘ»shib qoĘ»yish
			uchun taqdim etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635137" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			taqdim etilgan tekshirish obyektlarining, materiallarning yoki
			ekspertning maxsus bilimlari yetarli emasligi ekspert tekshiruvi
			davomida maĘĽlum boĘ»lib qolsa, xulosa ayrim qoĘ»yilgan savollarga
			javob berishni rad etish asosini oĘ»z ichiga olgan boĘ»lishi
			lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635138" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ekspert
			tekshiruvi tugaganidan soĘ»ng xulosa, tekshirish obyektlari va ish
			materiallari ekspertizani tayinlagan organga (mansabdor shaxsga)
			yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635140" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xulosa
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) uchun majburiy emas, biroq uning xulosaga
			qoĘ»shilmasligi asoslantirilgan boĘ»lishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1635142" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			ekspert qoĘ»yilgan savollarni uning maxsus bilimlari asosida hal
			qilish mumkin boĘ»lmasligiga yoki unga taqdim etilgan tekshirish
			obyektlarining yoxud materiallarning yaroqsizligiga yoki xulosa
			berish uchun yetarli emasligiga va ularni toĘ»ldirib boĘ»lmasligiga
			yoxud fan va sud-ekspertlik amaliyotining holati qoĘ»yilgan
			savollarga javob topish imkoniyatini bermasligiga ishonch hosil
			qilsa, u xulosa berishning iloji yoĘ»qligi toĘ»gĘ»risida
			asoslantirilgan hujjat tuzadi hamda uni ekspertizani tayinlagan
			organga (mansabdor shaxsga) yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540734" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">299<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Mutaxassis</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540737" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Dalillarni
			toĘ»plash, tekshirish va baholashda maslahatlar (tushuntirishlar)
			berish yoĘ»li bilan koĘ»maklashish hamda ilmiy-texnika
			vositalarini qoĘ»llashda yordam berish maqsadida fan, texnika,
			sanĘĽat yoki hunar sohasida maxsus bilim va koĘ»nikmaga ega
			boĘ»lgan, ishning yakunidan manfaatdor boĘ»lmagan voyaga yetgan
			shaxs mutaxassis sifatida jalb etilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540739" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Belgilangan
			tartibda muomalaga layoqatsiz yoki muomala layoqati cheklangan deb
			topilgan shaxslar mutaxassis sifatida jalb qilinishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7236127" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mutaxassis:
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishning tekshirish
			mavzusiga doir materiallari bilan tanishish, ulardan zarur
			maĘĽlumotlarni yozib olish yoki koĘ»chirma nusxalar olish;
			maslahatlar (tushuntirishlar) berish uchun zarur boĘ»lgan
			qoĘ»shimcha materiallar va oĘ»rganish obyektlarini taqdim etish
			toĘ»gĘ»risida iltimosnomalar berish; maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish oĘ»z ish yurituvida boĘ»lgan organning
			(mansabdor shaxsning) ruxsati bilan ishni koĘ»rib chiqish chogĘ»ida
			hozir boĘ»lish, javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsga,
			jabrlanuvchiga, guvohlarga tekshirish mavzusiga taalluqli savollar
			berish; ashyoviy, yozma, raqamli dalillarni va hujjatlarni koĘ»zdan
			kechirish; oĘ»z maslahatlari (tushuntirishlari) maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritishda ishtirok etuvchi
			shaxslar tomonidan notoĘ»gĘ»ri talqin qilinganligi xususida
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rish
			bayonnomasiga kiritilishi lozim boĘ»lgan fikr-mulohazalar
			bildirish; agar u maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			yuritilayotgan tilni bilmasa yoki yetarlicha bilmasa, ona tilida
			maslahat berish va tushuntirishlarini bayon qilish hamda bu holda
			tarjimon xizmatidan foydalanish; agar maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish oĘ»z ish yurituvida boĘ»lgan organning
			(mansabdor shaxsning) qarorlari, harakatlari (harakatsizligi)
			ushbu mutaxassisning huquqlari va erkinliklarini buzsa, mazkur
			organning qarorlari, harakatlari (harakatsizligi) ustidan shikoyat
			qilish huquqiga ega.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540745" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mutaxassis:
			oĘ»ziga taqdim etilgan tekshirish obyektlarini har tomonlama va
			toĘ»liq tekshirishdan oĘ»tkazishi, oĘ»z oldiga qoĘ»yilgan
			masalalar yuzasidan asosli va xolisona maslahatlar
			(tushuntirishlar) berishi; maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ish oĘ»z ish yurituvida boĘ»lgan organning (mansabdor shaxsning)
			chaqiruviga binoan kelishi; oĘ»tkazilgan tekshirish xususida
			koĘ»rsatuvlar berishi va oĘ»zi bergan maslahatlarni
			(tushuntirishlarni) tushuntirib berish uchun qoĘ»shimcha
			savollarga javob berishi; tekshirish oĘ»tkazilishi munosabati
			bilan oĘ»ziga maĘĽlum boĘ»lib qolgan maĘĽlumotlarni oshkor
			qilmasligi; taqdim etilgan tekshirish obyektlarining va ish
			materiallarining but saqlanishini taĘĽminlashi; maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish koĘ»rib chiqilayotganda tartibga
			rioya etishi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540749" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mutaxassisning
			barcha yuzaga kelgan masalalar boĘ»yicha maslahatlari sudga yozma
			shaklda taqdim etilishi kerak, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish koĘ»rib chiqilayotganda mutaxassis tomonidan
			berilgan tushuntirishlar esa maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqish bayonnomasiga kiritiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div id="-201367" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in"><a name="-201367"></a>
		<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">300-modda.
		Tarjimon</span></p>
		<div id="-201368" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tarjimon
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan tayinlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201369" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tarjimon
			mazkur organning (mansabdor shaxsning) chaqirigĘ»iga binoan
			kelishi, oĘ»ziga topshirilgan tarjimani toĘ»la-toĘ»kis hamda aniq
			bajarishi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540766" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">301-modda.
			Jabrlanuvchilar, guvohlar, ekspertlar, mutaxassislar va
			tarjimonlarning qoplanishi lozim boĘ»lgan xarajatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540772" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jabrlanuvchilar,
			guvohlar, ekspertlar, mutaxassislar va tarjimonlar maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organ (mansabdor
			shaxs) huzuriga kelishlari munosabati bilan ularning qilgan
			xarajatlari belgilangan tartibda qoplanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540776" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jabrlanuvchilar,
			guvohlar, ekspertlar, mutaxassislar va tarjimonlar sifatida
			chaqirilgan shaxslarning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishni yuritayotgan organ (mansabdor shaxs) huzuriga kelishlari
			munosabati bilan ular ishda boĘ»lmagan vaqtda oĘ»z ish joyidagi
			maoshi belgilangan tartibda saqlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540781" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ekspert,
			mutaxassis va tarjimon xizmat topshirigĘ»i tartibida bajarilgan
			hollardan tashqari, oĘ»zining vazifalarini bajarganligi uchun
			mukofotlanish huquqiga egadir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201374" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">302-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka qonunga xilof ravishda tortilganligi
			sababli fuqaroga yetkazilgan zararni qoplash</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201375" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka qonunga xilof ravishda tortilganlik natijasida
			fuqaroga yetkazilgan zarar maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqqan organning (mansabdor shaxsning) aybidan
			qatĘĽi nazar davlat tomonidan toĘ»liq hajmda toĘ»lanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201376" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Zararni
			qoplash huquqi maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			tugatilgan taqdirdagina vujudga keladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201377" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritayotgan organ (mansabdor
			shaxs) fuqaroga buzilgan huquqlarini tiklash tartibini tushuntirib
			berishi va maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka qonunga xilof ravishda
			tortilganligi natijasida fuqaroga yetkazilgan zararni qoplash
			uchun qonunda nazarda tutilgan choralarni koĘ»rishi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201378" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXIII
			bob. MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI ISHLARNI KOĘ»RIB
			CHIQISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201514" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">303-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqishga
			tayyorlanish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201515" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqishga tayyorlash
			vaqtida tegishli organ (mansabdor shaxs):</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201517" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			mazkur ishni koĘ»rib chiqish oĘ»zining vakolat doirasiga kirish
			kirmasligi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201519" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma va ishga oid
			boshqa materiallar toĘ»gĘ»ri tuzilgan-tuzilmaganligi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201521" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqishda qatnashuvchi shaxslar uni koĘ»rib chiqish
			vaqti va joyi haqida xabardor qilingan-qilinmaganligi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201523" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			zarur qoĘ»shimcha materiallar soĘ»rab olingan-olinmaganligi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201524" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi, qonuniy
			vakillar, advokat qilgan iltimoslar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masalalarni
			hal etadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540800" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">303<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish materiallarini
			qaytarish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540813" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			ish mazkur organga (mansabdor shaxsga) taalluqli boĘ»lmagan
			(sudloviga tegishli boĘ»lmagan) yoki maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish materiallari ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-201267"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">281</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-201276"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">282-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan talablar buzilgan holda yuborilgan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish materiallari maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomani tuzgan organga
			(mansabdor shaxsga) qaytariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201527" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">304-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish joyi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201528" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish shu huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan
			joyda koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781533" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning 113-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199826"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi

			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			transport vositalari roĘ»yxatga olingan joyda koĘ»rib chiqilishi
			ham mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201531" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2857289"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">187-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar shunday
			huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilgan joyda yoki huquqbuzarning istiqomat
			joyida koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437486" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bolalar
			masalalari boĘ»yicha komissiyalar maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni huquqbuzarning istiqomat joyida koĘ»rib
			chiqadilar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453117" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasining qonunchiligida maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boshqa joyda koĘ»rib chiqilishi ham nazarda
			tutilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201539" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">305-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			muddatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201540" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish mazkur ishni koĘ»rib
			chiqishga vakolatli organ (mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnoma va ishga oid boshqa
			materiallar olingan kundan boshlab oĘ»n besh kunlik muddat ichida
			koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>

			224<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1256720"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1256723"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>, 225-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/97664#4585700"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			â€”</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/97664#4585706"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/97664#2973620"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">239</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/97664#339572"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">240</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/97664#339594"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">241-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar, ular
			chet el fuqarolari va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslar tomonidan
			sodir etilganda, bir sutka mobaynida koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3095229" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeks 271-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-3095223"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">11-bandida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan holatlar mavjud boĘ»lgan taqdirda, maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik haqidagi ish maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			bayonnoma va ishning boshqa materiallari ishni koĘ»rib chiqishga
			vakolatli organ (mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan olingan kundan
			eĘĽtiboran oĘ»ttiz kunlik muddatda koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201543" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">306-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201544" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			koĘ»rib chiqish shu ishni koĘ»ruvchi organning tarkibini eĘĽlon
			qilish yoki mansabdor shaxsni tanishtirishdan boshlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671818" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni sudda koĘ»rib chiqish chogĘ»ida
			sudning tashabbusiga yoki ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxslarning
			iltimosnomasiga koĘ»ra sud majlisining audio- yoki videoyozuvi
			amalga oshirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201545" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			koĘ»rib chiquvchi organning majlisida raislik qiluvchi yoki ishni
			koĘ»rib chiquvchi mansabdor shaxs qanday ish koĘ»rib chiqilishi
			lozimligini, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka kim tortilayotganligini eĘĽlon
			qiladi, ishni koĘ»rib chiqishda qatnashuvchi shaxslarga ularning
			huquqlari va vazifalarini tushuntiradi, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi bayonnomani oĘ»qib eshittiradi. Majlisda ishni
			koĘ»rib chiqishda qatnashuvchi shaxslarning soĘ»zlari eshitiladi,
			keltirilgan dalillar oĘ»rganiladi va tushgan iltimoslar hal
			etiladi. Ishni koĘ»rib chiqishda prokuror qatnashgan taqdirda
			uning xulosasi oĘ»qib eshittiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201546" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">307-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			vaqtida aniqlanishi lozim boĘ»lgan holatlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201547" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish vaqtida
			tegishli organ (mansabdor shaxs): maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir
			etilgan-etilmaganligini, huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan vaqt va
			joyni, mazkur shaxs uni sodir etishda aybdor-aybdor emasligini,
			uning maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilish-tortilmasligini,
			javobgarlikni yengillashtiruvchi yoki ogĘ»irlashtiruvchi holatlar
			bor-yoĘ»qligini, mulkiy zarar yetkazilgan-yetkazilmaganligini,
			shuningdek ishni toĘ»gĘ»ri hal etishda ahamiyatga molik boshqa
			holatlarni aniqlashi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201553" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">308-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			bayonnomasi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201555" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish paytida
			tegishli organ bayonnoma yuritadi. Unda:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5652749" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			sud ishining raqami, majlisning sanasi va joyi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201558" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi organning nomi va tarkibi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201559" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			koĘ»rilayotgan ishning mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201561" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			ishda qatnashuvchi shaxslarning hozir boĘ»lgan-boĘ»lmaganligi
			haqidagi maĘĽlumotlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201562" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			ishni koĘ»rishda qatnashuvchi shaxslarning tushuntirishlari,
			ularning iltimoslari va bu iltimoslarni koĘ»rib chiqish
			natijalari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7236130" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqish chogĘ»ida oĘ»rganilgan ashyoviy, yozma,
			raqamli dalillar va hujjatlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201564" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
			qabul qilingan qarorni oĘ»qib eshittirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			maĘĽlumotlar va qaror ustidan shikoyat berish tartibi va
			muddatlari tushuntirilganligi koĘ»rsatilgan boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671833" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			majlisining audio- yoki videoyozuvi amalga oshirilgan taqdirda,
			sud majlisining bayonnomasiga faqat ushbu modda birinchi
			qismining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201557"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">1
			â€” 4</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201563"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">6-bandlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan masalalar yuzasidan yozuv kiritiladi, ishda ishtirok
			etuvchi shaxslar tushuntirishlarining, guvohlar koĘ»rsatuvlarining,
			ekspertlar oĘ»z xulosalari yuzasidan bergan ogĘ»zaki
			tushuntirishlarining, muzokaralarning hamda prokuror fikrlarining
			boshlangan va tugagan vaqti koĘ»rsatiladi, shuningdek sud
			majlisini yozib olishning texnik vositalaridan foydalanilganligi
			toĘ»gĘ»risida belgi qoĘ»yiladi. Elektron yoxud boshqa audio- yoki
			videoyozuvlar jamlangan vositalar sud majlisi bayonnomasiga
			qoĘ»shib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671836" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			majlisi videokonferensaloqa rejimida oĘ»tkazilgan taqdirda, sud
			majlisining bayonnomasida ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201555"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			maĘĽlumotlardan tashqari:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671839" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">sud
			majlisi videokonferensaloqa rejimida oĘ»tkazilganligi
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671840" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">sud
			majlisini videokonferensaloqa rejimida oĘ»tkazishga
			koĘ»maklashayotgan sudning nomi haqidagi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671843" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ishda
			ishtirok etuvchi shaxslar va sud majlisini videokonferensaloqa
			rejimida oĘ»tkazishga koĘ»maklashayotgan sudga kelgan sud
			protsessining boshqa ishtirokchilari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671846" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">sud
			majlisini videokonferensaloqa rejimida oĘ»tkazishga
			koĘ»maklashayotgan sudning va ishni koĘ»rib chiqayotgan sudning
			axborot-kommunikatsiya texnologiyalari boĘ»yicha xodimlari
			haqidagi maĘĽlumotlar ham koĘ»rsatilishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201565" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning, jabrlanuvchining va oĘ»zga
			manfaatdor shaxslarning iltimosiga binoan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishning mansabdor shaxs tomonidan koĘ»rib
			chiqilishi qanday borayotganligi ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201555"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;talablariga muvofiq ravishda
			yuritiluvchi bayonnomada aks ettiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201566" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish bayonnomasi
			tegishincha organ majlisidagi raislik qiluvchi va kotib tomonidan
			yoki ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi mansabdor shaxs tomonidan imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5220401" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»ziga
			nisbatan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha
			qaror chiqarilgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan organ oĘ»z hisobidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiqish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			bayonnomaning koĘ»chirma nusxasini, shuningdek sud majlisining
			audio- yoki videoyozuvini olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781537" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">308<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Huquqbuzarlikning kam ahamiyatliligi sababli huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikdan ozod qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi yoki yengilroq maĘĽmuriy
			jazo chorasini qoĘ»llash haqidagi masalani hal etish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781538" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			organ (mansabdor shaxs) maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqayotganda sodir etilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlikning kam ahamiyatliligi toĘ»gĘ»risida yoki ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Maxsus
			qismidagi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;moddalarning sanksiyasida
			nazarda tutilgan eng kam jazodan ham kamroq jazo chorasini
			qoĘ»llash uchun asoslar borligi haqida xulosaga kelsa, maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish huquqbuzarlikning kam
			ahamiyatliligi sababli huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan ozod
			qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi yoki yengilroq maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini
			qoĘ»llash haqidagi taqdimnoma bilan sudga yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781539" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzarlikning
			kam ahamiyatliligi sababli huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan
			ozod qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi yoki yengilroq maĘĽmuriy jazo
			chorasini qoĘ»llash haqidagi taqdimnomada shaxsning maĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikdan ozod qilinishi yoki unga nisbatan yengilroq
			maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llash kerakligining sabablari va
			asoslari bayon etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781540" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			huquqbuzarlikning kam ahamiyatliligi sababli huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikdan ozod qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi yoki yengilroq maĘĽmuriy
			jazo chorasini qoĘ»llash haqidagi taqdimnomani koĘ»rib chiqib,
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201576"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">310-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan qarorlardan birini chiqaradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781541" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzarlikning
			kam ahamiyatliligi sababli huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan
			ozod qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi yoki yengilroq maĘĽmuriy jazo
			chorasini qoĘ»llash haqidagi taqdimnoma maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish sudga kelib tushgan kundan eĘĽtiboran uch
			sutka ichida ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201514"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">303</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201527"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">304</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201543"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">306â€”309</span></span></font></a>-moddalarida
			nazarda tutilgan umumiy qoidalarga rioya etilgan holda koĘ»rib
