			chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201567" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">309-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201568" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni
			koĘ»rib chiqib, shu ish yuzasidan qaror chiqaradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7594242" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorda
			quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilgan boĘ»lishi kerak: qaror chiqargan
			organning (mansabdor shaxsning) nomi; sud ishining raqami; ish
			koĘ»rib chiqilgan sana; ishi koĘ»rib chiqilayotgan shaxs
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlar, shu jumladan huquqbuzar jismoniy
			shaxsning shaxsiy identifikatsiya raqami; ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			chogĘ»ida aniqlangan holatlarning bayoni; mazkur maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik uchun javobgarlikni nazarda tutuvchi normativ
			hujjat; ish yuzasidan qabul qilingan qaror; mavjud boĘ»lgan
			taqdirda â€” jabrlanuvchi jismoniy shaxsning shaxsiy
			identifikatsiya raqami yoki yuridik shaxsning soliq toĘ»lovchi
			identifikatsiya raqami, shuningdek qaror ustidan shikoyat berish
			muddati va tartibi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781545" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781536"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">308</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan hollarda qarorda huquqbuzarlikning kam ahamiyatliligi
			sababli huquqbuzarni maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikdan ozod qilish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi yoki yengilroq maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini qoĘ»llash
			haqidagi taqdimnomani qanoatlantirish yoki qanoatlantirishni rad
			etish haqidagi toĘ»xtam ham koĘ»rsatilishi kerak</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2329296" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun ushbu Kodeks
			242-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200966"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200968"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">3-bandlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatib
			oĘ»tilgan organlar (mansabdor shaxslar) tomonidan maĘĽmuriy jazoni
			qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masalani hal qilish paytida aybdordan
			yetkazilgan mulkiy zararni undirib olish masalasi ham hal
			etiladigan boĘ»lsa, ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorda undirib
			olinishi lozim boĘ»lgan shu zararning miqdori, uni undirib olish
			muddati va tartibi koĘ»rsatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201571" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ish
			yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorda olib qoĘ»yilgan ashyolar va
			hujjatlar, shuningdek ushlab turilgan transport vositalari
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masala ham hal etilgan boĘ»lishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201572" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qaror
			majlisda ishtirok etayotgan kollegial organ aĘĽzolarining oddiy
			koĘ»pchilik ovozi bilan qabul qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201574" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			mansabdor shaxs tomonidan, organning qarori â€” majlisda raislik
			qiluvchi va kotib tomonidan imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671864" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha qaror axborot
			tizimi orqali elektron hujjat tarzida chiqarilishi va ijro etish
			uchun yuborilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453086" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonunchilikda
			nazarda tutilgan hollarda jazo qoĘ»llanilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik haqidagi bayonnomaga tegishli yozuv yozib
			qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2727701" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">309<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video qayd etish texnika
			vositalari orqali yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilganligi qayd
			etilgan hollarda jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2727707" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Maxsus
			avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video qayd etish texnika vositalari
			orqali qayd etilgan yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilganligi boĘ»yicha
			jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir
			etgan shaxsning ishtirokisiz chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2727714" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto va
			video qayd etish texnika vositalari qoĘ»llanilgan holda olingan
			materiallar ilova qilinib, yuridik kuchga ega boĘ»lgan elektron
			hujjat shaklida rasmiylashtiriladi hamda ushbu hujjatni tuzgan
			vakolatli shaxsning elektron raqamli imzosi bilan tasdiqlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2727716" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning koĘ»chirma nusxasi maxsus
			avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video qayd etish texnika vositalari
			qoĘ»llanilgan holda olingan materiallar ilova qilinib, elektron
			hujjatni qogĘ»ozdagi hujjatga aylantirish yoĘ»li bilan
			tayyorlanadi hamda mazkur qaror chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran uch
			kun ichida buyurtma pochta joĘ»natmasi tarzida huquqbuzarga
			yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2727721" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorda quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilgan boĘ»lishi
			kerak: qaror chiqarilgan sana va joy; uni chiqargan organning
			nomi, shaxsning lavozimi va familiyasi; maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
			tortilayotgan shaxs toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlar; maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan vaqt, joy va holatlar ushbu
			Kodeks&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Maxsus
			qismining&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>mazkur huquqbuzarlik uchun
			javobgarlikni nazarda tutuvchi moddasi, moddasining qismi
			koĘ»rsatilgan holda; maxsus avtomatlashtirilgan foto va video qayd
			etish texnika vositalari orqali qayd etilgan transport
			vositasining huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan paytdagi davlat raqam
			belgisi bilan tushirilgan tasviri; qabul qilingan qaror,
			tayinlangan jarimani toĘ»lash tartibi va muddatlari, maĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning huquq va majburiyatlari,
			shuningdek jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror xususida shikoyat
			berishning protsessual tartibi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803672" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">309<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Bojxona toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikning buzilganligi OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat bojxona qoĘ»mitasining Yagona
			avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali qayd etilgan hollarda
			jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803673" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Davlat bojxona qoĘ»mitasining Yagona
			avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali qayd etilgan bojxona
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikning buzilishlari boĘ»yicha jarima
			solish haqidagi qaror maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan
			shaxsning ishtirokisiz chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803674" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror yuridik kuchga ega boĘ»lgan elektron
			hujjat shaklida rasmiylashtiriladi hamda ushbu hujjatni tuzgan
			vakolatli shaxsning elektron raqamli imzosi bilan tasdiqlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803675" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran uch kun
			ichida huquqbuzarga elektron shaklda yuboriladi yoki qogĘ»oz
			shaklida topshiriladi yoxud pochta orqali topshirilganligi maĘĽlum
			qilinadigan buyurtma xat bilan yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803676" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorda quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:
			qaror chiqarilgan sana va joy; uni chiqargan organning nomi,
			shaxsning lavozimi va familiyasi; maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
			tortilayotgan shaxs toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlar; maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan (aniqlangan) vaqt, joy va holatlar,
			ushbu Kodeks Maxsus qismining mazkur huquqbuzarlik uchun
			javobgarlikni nazarda tutuvchi moddasi ushbu moddaning qismi
			koĘ»rsatilgan holda; qabul qilingan qaror, tayinlangan jarimani
			toĘ»lash tartibi va muddatlari, maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka
			tortilayotgan shaxsning huquq va majburiyatlari, shuningdek jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ustidan shikoyat berishning
			protsessual tartibi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6057458" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">309<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			Soliq organlarining Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi
			orqali qayd etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar uchun jarima solish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6057459" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Soliq
			organlarining Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali
			qayd etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar uchun jarima solish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni sodir etgan
			shaxsning ishtirokisiz chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6057460" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Soliq
			organlarining Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali
			qayd etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar uchun jarima solish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror elektron hujjat shaklida rasmiylashtiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6057461" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror soliq organlarining Yagona
			avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimini qoĘ»llash orqali olingan
			materiallar ilova qilingan holda mazkur qaror chiqarilgan kundan
			eĘĽtiboran uch kun ichida soliq toĘ»lovchining (huquqbuzarning)
			shaxsiy kabinetiga yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6057462" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Soliq
			organlarining Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali
			qayd etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar uchun jarima solish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorda quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:
			qarorning raqami; qaror chiqarilgan sana va joy; qarorni chiqargan
			organning nomi, mansabdor shaxsning lavozimi hamda familiyasi,
			ismi, otasining ismi; soliq toĘ»lovchining nomi va identifikatsiya
			raqami; maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxs toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			maĘĽlumotlar; maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan vaqt, joy va
			huquqbuzarlikning tavsifi; ushbu Kodeks Maxsus qismining sodir
			etilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik uchun javobgarlikni nazarda
			tutuvchi moddasi; tayinlangan jarima va uni toĘ»lash tartibi;
			jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ustidan shikoyat qilish
			muddati va tartibi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201576" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">310-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qarorning turlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201577" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni
			koĘ»rib chiqib, quyidagi qarorlardan birini qabul qiladi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201578" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201579" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ishni yuritishni tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781548" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			yuritishni tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201195"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">271-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan holatlar mavjud boĘ»lgan taqdirda chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1781552" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			tomonidan ishni yuritishni tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror
			ogohlantirish eĘĽlon qilinganda ham chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201581" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">311-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qarorni eĘĽlon qilish va uning nusxasini berish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3540835" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqish tugashi bilanoq darhol eĘĽlon qilinadi va u
			chiqarilgan paytdan eĘĽtiboran qonuniy kuchga kiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201583" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			nusxasi uch kun ichida ustidan shu qaror chiqarilgan shaxsga,
			shuningdek oĘ»zining iltimosiga koĘ»ra jabrlanuvchiga topshiriladi
			yoki joĘ»natiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201584" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			nusxasi tilxat bilan beriladi, basharti qarorning nusxasi
			joĘ»natilsa, bu haqda ishga tegishli yozuv yozib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6052350" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Xizmat
			qurolidan va uning oĘ»q-dorilaridan foydalanish huquqiga ega
			boĘ»lgan davlat organlarining mansabdor shaxslariga hamda maxsus
			xizmat vazifalariga ega boĘ»lgan yuridik shaxslarning xodimlariga
			nisbatan ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6051882"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">185-moddasida</span></span></font></a>,
			220-moddasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052057"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052073"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052105"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">oltinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6052270"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">221-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar
			yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorning koĘ»chirma nusxasi tegishli davlat
			organiga yoki yuridik shaxsga maĘĽlumot uchun, ichki ishlar
			organiga esa ushbu shaxsning quroldan foydalanishini taqiqlash
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masalani koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201586" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">312-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni korxona,
			muassasa, tashkilot va mansabdor shaxslar eĘĽtiboriga yetkazish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201587" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-198117"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">61</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199957"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">131</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200015"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">140</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200538"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">183</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2857289"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">187</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200908"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">233</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200939"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">237-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni
			koĘ»rib chiquvchi organ (mansabdor shaxs) huquqbuzarga nisbatan
			maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish haqida chiqarilgan qarorni shu
			huquqbuzar ishlab yoki oĘ»qib turgan joydagi maĘĽmuriyat
			eĘĽtiboriga yetkazadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201588" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rib chiquvchi organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) qabul qilingan qaror toĘ»gĘ»risida maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan mansabdor shaxsning
			eĘĽtiboriga yetkazadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201589" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar sodir etish sabablari va ularga olib
			kelgan shart-sharoitni bartaraf etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi taqdimnoma</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201590" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			koĘ»rib chiquvchi organ (mansabdor shaxs) maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar sodir etish sabablari va ularga olib kelgan
			shart-sharoitlarni aniqlaganda bu sabablar va shart-sharoitlarni
			bartaraf qilish yuzasidan choralar koĘ»rish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			taqdimnomani tegishli korxona, muassasa, tashkilot rahbariga
			kiritadi. Rahbar taqdim kelib tushgan kundan boshlab bir oy ichida
			uni kiritgan organga (mansabdor shaxsga) koĘ»rilgan choralar
			haqida maĘĽlum qilishi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670375" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXIII<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>&nbsp;bob.
			YARASHUV TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI ISHLAR BOĘ»YICHA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670376" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Yarashilganligi munosabati bilan koĘ»rib chiqiladigan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670377" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yarashilganligi
			munosabati bilan ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5670116"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">21</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar koĘ»rib
			chiqilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670378" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Yarashuv toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ariza</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670382" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jabrlanuvchi
			yoxud uning qonuniy vakili yarashuv toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani ish
			vakolatli organlar (mansabdor shaxslar) tomonidan koĘ»rib
			chiqilishi vaqtida, shuningdek sud muhokamasining istalgan
			bosqichida, ammo sud qaror chiqarguniga qadar berishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670383" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Arizada
			yetkazilgan zarar bartaraf etilgani, shuningdek yarashilganligi
			munosabati bilan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik haqidagi ish
			yuritilishini tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimos koĘ»rsatilgan
			boĘ»lishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670384" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			yarashuv haqidagi ariza ish birinchi instansiya sudida sud
			muhokamasidan oĘ»tkazilayotganda berilgan boĘ»lsa, sud uni darhol
			koĘ»rib chiqishga kirishadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670385" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			ish boĘ»yicha bir necha jabrlanuvchi boĘ»lsa, faqat barcha
			jabrlanuvchilar bilan yarashuvga erishilgan taqdirda, yarashuv
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritish mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670386" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Arizani
			qabul qilish chogĘ»ida vakolatli organ (mansabdor shaxs) va sud
			jabrlanuvchiga yoki uning qonuniy vakiliga sud yarashuvni
			tasdiqlasa, u mazkur ish boĘ»yicha ish yuritishni qayta tiklash
			haqida iltimosnoma berish huquqini yoĘ»qotishini tushuntirishi
			shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670388" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni sudga yuborish
			tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670389" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Vakolatli
			organ (mansabdor shaxs) jabrlanuvchining yoki uning qonuniy
			vakilining yarashuv toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizasini olgach, uch kundan
			ortiq boĘ»lmagan muddatda huquqbuzarning roziligiga koĘ»ra ishni
			taraflarning yarashuvi munosabati bilan sudga yuborish haqida
			qaror chiqaradi hamda ishni tegishliligi boĘ»yicha sudga yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670391" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			tavsif qismida:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670393" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni yuritish uchun asos;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670394" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etgan shaxslar va ular tomonidan sodir etilgan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar haqidagi maĘĽlumotlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670395" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">yarashuv
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizaning mazmuni hamda huquqbuzarning arizaga
			nisbatan munosabati koĘ»rsatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670396" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			qaror qismida:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670397" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ishni
			sudga yuborish haqidagi qaror;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7236133" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ashyoviy,
			yozma va raqamli dalillar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlar
			koĘ»rsatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670427" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			ish boĘ»yicha huquqbuzar sifatida ishtirok etish uchun bir necha
			shaxs jalb qilingan boĘ»lib, ularning barchasi bilan yarashuvga
			erishilmagan boĘ»lsa, yarashuvga erishilmagan huquqbuzarlarga
			taalluqli materiallar ajratiladi va ular boĘ»yicha ish yuritish
			umumiy qoidalarga rioya etilgan holda amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670429" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5670427"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan holatlar
			vakolatli organning (mansabdor shaxsning) ishni taraflarning
			yarashuvi munosabati bilan sudga yuborish haqidagi qarorida
			koĘ»rsatilishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670448" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.
			Sud muhokamasi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670449" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yarashuv
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar boĘ»yicha sud muhokamasi ish sudga kelgan
			paytdan eĘĽtiboran uch kundan kechiktirmay oĘ»tkazilishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670450" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			majlisida: huquqbuzar, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy vakillari
			va, agar ishda qatnashayotgan boĘ»lsa, advokat ishtirok etadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670452" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yarashuv
			haqidagi ishlar boĘ»yicha sud muhokamasi jabrlanuvchining yarashuv
			haqidagi arizasini oĘ»qib eshittirish bilan boshlanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670453" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			huquqbuzarning va jabrlanuvchining sodir etilgan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik holatlari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi soĘ»zlarini eshitadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670456" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670457" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">yarashuvning
			ixtiyoriyligi va uning sabablarini;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670458" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">huquqbuzar
			oĘ»z aybiga ixtiyoriy ravishda iqror boĘ»lganligini;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670460" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">huquqbuzar
			oĘ»zi sodir etgan qilmishning oqibatlarini anglaganligini va
			yetkazilgan zararni bartaraf etish choralarini
			koĘ»rgan-koĘ»rmaganligini;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670461" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">jabrlanuvchiga
			yoki huquqbuzarga biron-bir tazyiq boĘ»lgan-boĘ»lmaganligini;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670462" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">yetkazilgan
			zararning oĘ»rnini qoplash bilan bogĘ»liq masalalarni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670463" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">huquqbuzarning,
			jabrlanuvchining va ularning qonuniy vakillarining yarashuvga
			roziliklarini aniqlaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670465" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shundan
			keyin, agar sud majlisida ishtirok etayotgan boĘ»lsa, advokatning
			fikrini eshitadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670466" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			sud majlisi davomida yarashuv, aybga iqror boĘ»lish ixtiyoriy
			emasligi, zararning oĘ»rnini qoplashni rad etish hollari
			aniqlangudek boĘ»lsa, sud taraflarning yarashuvi munosabati bilan
			ishni sudga yuborish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni bekor qiladi va ishni
			umumiy asoslarda koĘ»rib chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670467" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Biroq,
			sodir etilgan qilmishda boshqa turdagi maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			yoki jinoyat tarkibi belgilari mavjud boĘ»lsa, sud taraflarning
			yarashuvi munosabati bilan ishni sudga yuborish haqidagi qarorni
			bekor qiladi va ishni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			bayonnomani rasmiylashtirgan yoki maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik haqidagi
			ishni qoĘ»zgĘ»atgan organga umumiy asoslarda koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			yoki tergovga qadar tekshiruv, surishtiruv va dastlabki tergovni
			amalga oshirish uchun yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670468" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			muhokamasining natijalari boĘ»yicha sud qonunda belgilangan
			tartibda qaror chiqaradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670469" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			majlisi vaqtida ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201553"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">308-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan qoidalarga binoan bayonnoma yuritiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670491" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">5</font>-modda.
			Sud qarori</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670492" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			qarorining kirish qismida:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670493" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">qaror
			chiqarilgan vaqt va joy;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670495" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">qaror
			chiqargan sudning nomi, sudyaning, sud majlisi kotibining,
			taraflarning, agar ishda ishtirok etayotgan boĘ»lsa, tarjimonning
			ismi, otasining ismi va familiyasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670496" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">huquqbuzarning
			ismi, otasining ismi va familiyasi, tugĘ»ilgan yili, oyi, kuni va
			joyi, yashash joyi, ish joyi, mashgĘ»ulotining turi, maĘĽlumoti va
			ish uchun ahamiyatga molik boshqa maĘĽlumotlar koĘ»rsatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670497" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			qarorining tavsif-asoslash qismida yarashuv uchun asos boĘ»lgan
			holatlar bayon etiladi, ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5670448"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">313</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">4</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;sanab
			oĘ»tilgan masalalarga javoblar ifodalanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670498" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			qaror qismida sud quyidagi masalalarni hal etadi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670499" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik haqidagi ishni taraflarning yarashuvi munosabati
			bilan yoki ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201576"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">310-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;koĘ»rsatilgan
			boshqa asoslar boĘ»yicha tugatish haqidagi, maĘĽmuriy jazoning
			qoĘ»llanilishi toĘ»gĘ»risida yoxud uni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			haqidagi bayonnomani rasmiylashtirgan yoki maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni qoĘ»zgĘ»atgan organga yuborish haqidagi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7236136" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ashyoviy,
			yozma va raqamli dalillar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670503" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">zararning
			oĘ»rnini qoplash haqidagi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5670506" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			qaroriga huquqbuzar, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy vakillari,
			advokat tomonidan shikoyat berilishi hamda prokuror tomonidan
			protest keltirilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317044" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXIII<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>&nbsp;bob.
			MUAYYAN YASHASH JOYIGA EGA BOĘ»LMAGAN SHAXSNI REABILITATSIYA
			MARKAZIGA JOYLASHTIRISH TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317047" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">6</font>-modda.
			Muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya
			markaziga joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risida iltimosnoma berish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317052" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsning reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirilishini talab qiluvchi asoslar aniqlangan taqdirda,
			ichki ishlar organi bunday shaxs ichki ishlar organiga keltirilgan
			paytdan eĘĽtiboran 48 soat ichida uni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			oĘ»ttiz sutkadan koĘ»p boĘ»lmagan muddatga joylashtirish
			toĘ»gĘ»risida sudga iltimosnoma yuborish uchun materiallarni
			tayyorlashi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317054" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimosnoma va uni reabilitatsiya
			markaziga joylashtirish zarurligini tasdiqlovchi materiallar
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxs aniqlangan yerdagi
			yoki reabilitatsiya markazi joylashgan yerdagi jinoyat ishlari
			boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudiga ichki ishlar organi tomonidan
			beriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317060" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">7</font>-modda.
			Iltimosnomaning shakli va mazmuni</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317067" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimosnoma sudga yozma shaklda
			beriladi va ichki ishlar organining rahbari yoki uning oĘ»rinbosari
			tomonidan imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317069" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iltimosnomada
			quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317072" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			iltimosnoma berilayotgan sudning nomi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317075" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ichki ishlar organining nomi va joylashgan yeri (pochta manzili);</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317076" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsning familiyasi, ismi,
			otasining ismi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317079" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			iltimosnomaga asos boĘ»lgan holatlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317081" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			berilgan iltimosnomaning asoslarini tasdiqlovchi dalillar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317084" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya
			markaziga joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimos, joylashtirish
			muddatini koĘ»rsatgan holda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317086" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
			ilova qilinayotgan hujjatlarning roĘ»yxati.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317089" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iltimosnomada
			ichki ishlar organining telefon, faks raqamlari, elektron manzili
			koĘ»rsatilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317091" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risida ushbu moddada nazarda tutilgan
			talablarni buzgan holda berilgan iltimosnoma ichki ishlar organiga
			qaytariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317097" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">8</font>-modda.
			Iltimosnomaga ilova qilinadigan hujjatlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317099" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimosnomaga quyidagilar ilova
			qilinadi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317103" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni aniqlagan mansabdor
			shaxsning muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni
			reabilitatsiya markaziga joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risida sudga
			iltimosnoma kiritish toĘ»gĘ»risida tegishli tuman (shahar) ichki
			ishlar organi boshligĘ»i tomonidan tasdiqlangan qarori;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317105" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			yashash manzillari (manzillar boĘ»yicha byuro) haqida maĘĽlumotlar
			beruvchi organning maĘĽlumotnomasi, shuningdek muayyan yashash
			joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsning OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasidagi
			maĘĽlum boĘ»lgan oxirgi yashash joyini tekshirish natijalari
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumot;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317108" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsning tushuntirishi yoki
			bunday shaxs tomonidan tushuntirish berish rad etilganligi
			toĘ»gĘ»risida tegishli tarzda tuzilgan dalolatnoma;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317111" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni tibbiy koĘ»rikdan
			oĘ»tkazish natijalari toĘ»gĘ»risidagi tibbiy maĘĽlumotnoma;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317113" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsning huquqlari, shu
			jumladan advokatning yuridik yordamidan foydalanish huquqi va oĘ»z
			yaqinlariga telefon orqali qoĘ»ngĘ»iroq qilish huquqi
			tushuntirilganligi haqidagi bayonnoma.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317114" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iltimosnomaga
			bildirilgan iltimosnomani asoslovchi boshqa hujjatlar ham ilova
			qilinishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317139" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">313<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">9</font>-modda.
			Iltimosnomaning sud tomonidan koĘ»rib chiqilishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317141" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimosnoma taqdim etilgan paytdan
			eĘĽtiboran 24 soat ichida sudya tomonidan yopiq sud majlisida
			yakka tartibda koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317144" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»ziga
			nisbatan reabilitatsiya markaziga joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			iltimosnoma koĘ»rib chiqilayotgan shaxs va ichki ishlar organining
			vakili sud majlisida ishtirok etishi shart. Sud majlisida advokat
			ishtirok etishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317146" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iltimosnomani
			koĘ»rib chiqish ichki ishlar organi vakilining muayyan yashash
			joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish zarurligi va joylashtirish muddati asoslab
			beriladigan maĘĽruzasi bilan boshlanadi. SoĘ»ngra oĘ»ziga nisbatan
			iltimosnoma koĘ»rib chiqilayotgan shaxs, agar sud majlisida
			ishtirok etayotgan boĘ»lsa, advokat, sudga kelgan boshqa shaxslar
			eshitiladi, taqdim etilgan materiallar tekshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317148" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qaror
			sudya tomonidan alohida xonada chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317150" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iltimosnomani
			koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari boĘ»yicha sud quyidagi qarorlardan
			birini chiqaradi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317153" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">iltimosnomani
			qanoatlantirish va muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni
			reabilitatsiya markaziga joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317154" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">iltimosnomani
			qanoatlantirishni rad etish haqida.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317156" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iltimosnomani
			qanoatlantirish va muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni
			reabilitatsiya markaziga joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risida yoki
			qanoatlantirishni rad etish haqidagi qaror oĘ»qib eshittirilgan
			paytdan eĘĽtiboran kuchga kiradi va darhol ijro etilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317158" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qaror
			ijro etish uchun darhol ichki ishlar organi vakiliga, agar sud
			majlisida ishtirok etgan boĘ»lsa, advokatga va oĘ»ziga nisbatan
			qaror chiqarilgan shaxsga topshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317160" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimosnomani koĘ»rib chiqish
			natijalari boĘ»yicha chiqarilgan qaror ustidan ushbu qaror
			chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran uch kun ichida oĘ»ziga nisbatan
			qaror chiqarilgan shaxs, uning qonuniy vakili va advokat
			apellyatsiya tartibida shikoyat berishi, prokuror esa apellyatsiya
			protesti keltirishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317162" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining sudyasi qaror ustidan berilgan shikoyatni
			(protestni) u kelib tushgan kundan eĘĽtiboran uch kun ichida yakka
			tartibda koĘ»rib chiqib, uning natijalari boĘ»yicha quyidagi
			qarorlardan birini chiqaradi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317164" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">qarorni
			oĘ»zgarishsiz, shikoyatni (protestni) esa qanoatlantirmasdan
			qoldirish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317165" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">muayyan
			yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya markaziga
			joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi iltimosnomani qanoatlantirish
			haqidagi qarorni bekor qilish va shaxsni reabilitatsiya markazidan
			ozod qilish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6317168" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">iltimosnomani
			qanoatlantirmasdan qoldirish haqidagi qarorni bekor qilish va
			muayyan yashash joyiga ega boĘ»lmagan shaxsni reabilitatsiya
			markaziga joylashtirish toĘ»gĘ»risida.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5220408" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXIV
			BOB. MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI ISH YUZASIDAN QAROR
			(AJRIM) USTIDAN SHIKOYAT BERISH VA PROTEST BILDIRISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5220410" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">314-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror xususida shikoyat berish huquqi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5220462" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan qaror ustidan oĘ»ziga
			nisbatan qaror chiqarilgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy
			vakillari va advokat tomonidan, shuningdek maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan organ tomonidan shikoyat berilishi
			mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713455" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan jinoyat ishlari
			boĘ»yicha sudning qarori ustidan apellyatsiya, kassatsiya va
			taftish tartibida shikoyat berish ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713467"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">XXIV</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;bobida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201596" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">315-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror xususida shikoyat berish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713458" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan qaror ustidan yuqori
			turuvchi organga (mansabdor shaxsga) yoki jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha
			tuman (shahar) sudiga shikoyat berilishi mumkin. Iqtisodiy sudning
			qarori ustidan OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining Iqtisodiy
			protsessual&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-3523891"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">kodeksida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			tartibda, fuqarolik ishlari boĘ»yicha sudning qarori ustidan esa
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining Fuqarolik
			protsessual&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-3517337"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">kodeksida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			tartibda shikoyat berilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201598" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shikoyat
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan qaror qabul
			qilgan organ (mansabdor shaxs) orqali yoki bevosita shikoyat
			yoĘ»llangan sudga yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201599" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan qaror chiqargan organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) shikoyatni olgach, uni uch sutka ichida ish
			bilan birga ushbu moddaga muvofiq shikoyatni koĘ»rib chiqish
			huquqiga ega boĘ»lgan organga (mansabdor shaxsga) yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201601" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			xususida shikoyat bergan shaxs davlat boji toĘ»lashdan ozod
			etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201603" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">316-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror xususida shikoyat berish muddati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4265866" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			xususida shu qarorning nusxasi olingan kundan eĘĽtiboran oĘ»n kun
			ichida shikoyat berilishi mumkin, bundan sud qarori mustasno.
			Mazkur muddat uzrli sabablar bilan oĘ»tkazilib yuborilgan
			taqdirda, bu muddat shikoyatni koĘ»rib chiqishga vakolatli organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan qayta tiklanishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201608" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">317-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror xususida protest bildirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201611" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Prokuror
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7354479" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sud tergov sudyasining qarori ustidan â€”
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713467"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">XXIV</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;bobida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda apellyatsiya, kassatsiya va taftish instansiyalari
			sudiga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201618" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			boshqa organ (mansabdor shaxs) qarori ustidan â€” qaror chiqargan
			organga (mansabdor shaxsga) yoki yuqori turuvchi organga
			(mansabdor shaxsga) protest bildirishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4265897" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Iqtisodiy
			sudning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha
			qarori ustidan OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-3523891"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Iqtisodiy
			protsessual kodeksida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			tartibda protest keltiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1779111" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqarolik
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sudning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ish boĘ»yicha qarori ustidan OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Fuqarolik
			protsessual&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-186105"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">kodeksida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			tartibda protest keltiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201621" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">318-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror ijrosini toĘ»xtatib turish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201624" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Belgilangan
			muddatda shikoyat berish maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qarorning ijrosini shikoyat koĘ»rib chiqilgunga qadar toĘ»xtatib
			turadi, maĘĽmuriy qamoq jazosi qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror
			va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joyda undirib olinadigan
			jarima solish hollari bundan mustasnodir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201627" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Prokurorning
			protest bildirishi maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			yuzasidan qabul qilingan qaror ijrosini protest koĘ»rib
			chiqilgunga qadar toĘ»xtatib turadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201630" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">319-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror xususida berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protestni koĘ»rib
			chiqish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201632" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			xususidagi berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protestni vakolatli
			organlar (mansabdor shaxslar), shikoyat va protest tushgan kundan
			boshlab oĘ»n kun muddat ichida koĘ»rib chiqadilar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201635" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			xususida berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protestni koĘ»rib
			chiqish paytida organ (mansabdor shaxs) chiqarilgan qarorning
			qonuniyligi, asosliligi va adolatliligini tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7354486" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha qaror ustidan shikoyat
			yoki protest jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudining
			tergov sudyasi tomonidan yakka tartibda koĘ»rib chiqiladi va uning
			natijalariga koĘ»ra, ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4265921"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">321-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan qoidalarga binoan qaror qabul qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4265924" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">321-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror xususida berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protestni koĘ»rib
			chiquvchi organning (mansabdor shaxsning) qarori</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4265950" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			xususida berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protestni koĘ»rib
			chiqish paytida organ (mansabdor shaxs) quyidagi qarorlardan
			birini qabul qiladi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201651" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			chiqarilgan qarorni oĘ»zgarishsiz, shikoyat yoki protestni esa
			qanoatlantirishsiz qoldiradi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201653" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			chiqarilgan qarorni bekor qiladi va ishni qayta koĘ»rib chiqish
			uchun yuboradi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201655" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			chiqarilgan qarorni bekor qiladi va ishni yuritishni toĘ»xtatadi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201658" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			jazo chorasini kuchaytirmagan holda uni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			uchun javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi normativ hujjatda nazarda
			tutilgan doirada oĘ»zgartiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201660" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorni
			bekor qilish yoki oĘ»zgartirish uchun: organ (mansabdor shaxs)
			tomonidan ishni toĘ»liq boĘ»lmagan holda yoki bir tomonlama koĘ»rib
			chiqilishi; organ (mansabdor shaxs) hal qiluv qarorining va ushbu
			Kodeks&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664?ONDATE=01.04.1995%2000#-197980"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">Maxsus
			qismining&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>qoĘ»llanilgan normalari va
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlik nazarda tutilgan boshqa normativ hujjatlar
			ishning faktik holatlariga mos kelmasligi; maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni yuritish qoidalarining
			jiddiy buzilishi; qoĘ»llanilgan maĘĽmuriy jazoning adolatsizligi
			asos boĘ»lib hisoblanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5803679" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Maxsus
			avtomatlashtirilgan foto- va video qayd etish texnika vositalari
			orqali qayd etilgan yoĘ»l harakati qoidalari buzilishlariga doir
			ish yoki OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat bojxona qoĘ»mitasining
			Yagona avtomatlashtirilgan axborot tizimi orqali qayd etilgan
			bojxona toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik buzilishlariga doir ish
			yangitdan koĘ»rib chiqish uchun yuborilib, qaror bekor qilingan
			taqdirda, mazkur ish maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlikni sodir etgan shaxsga
			nisbatan u ilgari sodir etgan huquqbuzarliklarning takroriyligi
			inobatga olingan holda umumiy asoslarda koĘ»rib chiqilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201662" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mazkur
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqishga vakolati boĘ»lmagan organ (mansabdor
			shaxs) tomonidan chiqarilgan qaror bekor qilinadi, ish esa
			vakolatli organga (mansabdor shaxsga) koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4265985" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			yuzasidan berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protest boĘ»yicha
			qabul qilingan qarorda: u chiqarilgan vaqt va joy; shikoyat yoki
			protestni koĘ»rib chiqayotgan mansabdor shaxs; prokuror va boshqa
			ishtirok etayotgan shaxslar; shikoyat bergan shaxs yoki protest
			bildirgan prokuror; maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha chiqarilgach shikoyat berilgan yoki protest bildirilgan
			qarorning hamda shikoyat, protestning mohiyati; chiqarilayotgan
			qarorni asoslanishi; shikoyat yoki protest yuzasidan qaror
			koĘ»rsatilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4265997" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			xususida berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protestga doir
			qarorning nusxasi oĘ»zi haqida ana shu qaror chiqarilgan shaxsga
			uch kun muddat ichida yuboriladi, jabrlanuvchiga esa â€” uning
			iltimosiga binoan yuboriladi. Protestni koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari
			toĘ»gĘ»risida prokurorga maĘĽlum qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201668" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">322-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qarorni qayta koĘ»rib chiquvchi organning (mansabdor shaxsning)
			vakolatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201669" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan organ (mansabdor
			shaxs) chiqargan qaror yuqori turuvchi organ rahbari, prokurorning
			protesti boĘ»yicha esa uni chiqargan organ tomonidan ham ushbu
			Kodeksning 321-moddasi<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201660"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2727743"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;uchinchi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;qismlarida
			belgilangan asoslar boĘ»yicha bekor qilinishi yoki oĘ»zgartirilishi
			mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4266009" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">323-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror xususida berilgan shikoyat yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorga
			protest bildirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4266010" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qaror
			ustidan berilgan shikoyat yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorga prokuror
			protest bildirishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4266012" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shikoyat
			yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorga protest mazkur qarorni chiqargan
			organdan (mansabdor shaxsdan) yuqori turuvchi organga kiritiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201677" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rishni tugatish
			bilan qarorni bekor qilish oqibatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201681" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni koĘ»rishni tugatish bilan
			qarorni bekor qilish undirib olingan pul summalarini, haqi toĘ»lab
			olib qoĘ»yilgan va musodara qilingan narsalarni qaytarib berishga,
			shuningdek ilgari qabul qilingan qaror bilan bogĘ»liq boshqa
			cheklashlarni bekor qilishga sabab boĘ»ladi. Narsani qaytarib
			berish mumkin boĘ»lmagan hollarda uning qiymati, basharti bu
			narsalar tadbirkorlik uchun moĘ»ljallangan boĘ»lsa, boy berilgan
			foydasi ham qoplanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453089" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Fuqaroni
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish gĘ»ayriqonuniy ravishda qoĘ»llanilganligi
			natijasida yetkazilgan zarar qonunchilikda belgilangan tartibda
			qoplanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713467" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in"><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">XXIV</span></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="font-weight: normal">1</span></font></font></strong><strong><font face="Montserrat-Bold"><span style="font-weight: normal">&nbsp;BOB.&nbsp;JINOYAT
			ISHLARI BOĘ»YICHA SUDNING MAĘĽMURIY HUQUQBUZARLIK TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI
			ISH YUZASIDAN QARORINING QONUNIYLIGI, ASOSLILIGI VA ADOLATLILIGINI
			TEKSHIRISH</span></font></strong></span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713468" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1-Â§.
			Apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudida ish yuritish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713469" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) berish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713470" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan oĘ»ziga nisbatan
			sudning qarori chiqarilgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy
			vakillari, advokat, shuningdek maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzgan organ birinchi instansiya sudining qarori ustidan
			apellyatsiya shikoyati berishga, prokuror esa protest keltirishga
			haqli. Apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) bergan shaxslar oĘ»z
			vajlarini tasdiqlovchi qoĘ»shimcha materiallar taqdim etishga
			haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713471" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			shikoyatining (protestining) nusxasi bir sutka ichida maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan oĘ»ziga nisbatan
			sudning qarori chiqarilgan shaxsga, jabrlanuvchiga, ularning
			qonuniy vakillariga, advokatga, shuningdek maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan organga yuboriladi. KoĘ»rsatilgan
			shaxslar ish bilan, shu jumladan qoĘ»shimcha materiallar bilan
			tanishishga, shuningdek sudga oĘ»z eĘĽtirozlarini taqdim etishga
			haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713472" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha qarori
			ustidan shikoyat (protest) ish bilan birga uch sutka ichida
			apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudiga yuborilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713473" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish yoki maĘĽmuriy tartibda chiqarib yuborish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarori ustidan shikoyat (protest) apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudiga shikoyat (protest) olingan kuni yuborilishi
			lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713474" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			shikoyati (protesti) apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudining nomiga
			yoĘ»llanadi, lekin maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			yuzasidan qarorni chiqargan sudga beriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713475" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya tartibida ishlarni qayta koĘ»ruvchi sudlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713476" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">QoraqalpogĘ»iston
			Respublikasi sudi, viloyatlar, Toshkent shahar sudlari jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudlari tomonidan maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rish natijalari
			yuzasidan birinchi instansiya boĘ»yicha chiqarilgan qarorlarning
			qonuniyligi, asoslantirilganligi va adolatliligini apellyatsiya
			tartibida tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713477" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">3</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) berish muddatlari</span></p>
		</div>
