		<div id="-6713478" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha qarori ustidan apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) qaror
			oĘ»qib eshittirilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran oĘ»n sutka ichida, oĘ»ziga
			nisbatan sud qarori chiqarilgan shaxs va jabrlanuvchi tomonidan
			esa, qarorning koĘ»chirma nusxalari ularga topshirilgan yoki ular
			tomonidan ushbu koĘ»chirma nusxalar olingan kundan eĘĽtiboran
			xuddi shu muddatda berilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713479" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning birinchi qismida nazarda tutilgan muddat oĘ»tkazib
			yuborilgan taqdirda, apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) beruvchi
			shaxsning iltimosnomasiga koĘ»ra, qarorni chiqargan sud, agar
			muddatning oĘ»tkazib yuborilganligi sabablarini uzrli deb topsa,
			oĘ»tkazib yuborilgan muddatni tiklashga haqli boĘ»lib, bu haqda
			ajrim chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713480" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarori ustidan
			apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) berish muddatini tiklash
			haqidagi iltimosnomani rad qilish toĘ»gĘ»risida ajrim chiqariladi,
			uning ustidan xususiy shikoyat (xususiy protest) berilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713481" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya shikoyatining (protestining) mazmuniga qoĘ»yiladigan
			talablar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713482" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			shikoyatida (protestida) quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713483" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			shikoyat (protest) yuborilayotgan sudning nomi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713484" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			shikoyat (protest) bergan shaxs, uning protsessual mavqeyi, uning
			yashash joyi yoki joylashgan yeri toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713485" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			qaror chiqargan sudning nomi, qaror chiqarilgan sana, sud ishining
			raqami, ustidan shikoyat (protest) berilayotgan qaror qaysi
			shaxsga nisbatan chiqarilgan boĘ»lsa, oĘ»sha shaxs toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			maĘĽlumotlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713486" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			shikoyat (protest) berayotgan shaxsning fikriga koĘ»ra qarorning
			notoĘ»gĘ»riligi nimadan iborat ekanligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi vajlari,
			shuningdek uning iltimosining mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713487" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			shikoyat (protest) bergan shaxs oĘ»z talablarini asoslayotgan
			dalillar, xususan, birinchi instansiya sudi tomonidan
			tekshirilmagan dalillar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713488" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			yangidan taqdim etilayotgan dalillar va ularning birinchi
			instansiya sudiga taqdim etilmaganligining sababi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713489" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
			shikoyatga (protestga) ilova qilinayotgan materiallar roĘ»yxati;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713490" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">8)
			shikoyat (protest) berilgan sana, shikoyat (protest) bergan
			shaxsning imzosi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713491" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			apellyatsiya shikoyatining (protestining) mazmuni ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713482"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;talablariga javob bermasa va
			bu ishni keyinchalik mazmunan koĘ»rib chiqishga toĘ»sqinlik qilsa,
			birinchi instansiya sudining sudyasi apellyatsiya shikoyatini
			(protestini) uni bergan shaxsga qaytarish toĘ»gĘ»risida uch kunlik
			muddatda ajrim chiqarib, apellyatsiya shikoyatini (protestini)
			yangidan tuzish uchun muddat belgilaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713492" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudyaning
			apellyatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ajrimining talablari bajarilmagan va apellyatsiya shikoyati
			(protesti) belgilangan vaqtda kelib tushmagan hollarda, u
			berilmagan deb hisoblanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713493" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">5</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarib olish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713494" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha qarori
			ustidan apellyatsiya shikoyati bergan shaxs ushbu shikoyatni
			qaytarib olishga haqli. Apellyatsiya protestini qaytarib olish
			huquqi protestni kiritgan prokurorga, shuningdek yuqori turuvchi
			prokurorga tegishlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713495" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»ziga
			nisbatan sudning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha qarori chiqarilgan shaxs oĘ»z advokatining apellyatsiya
			shikoyatini qaytarib olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713496" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning advokati, qonuniy vakili oĘ»z
			shikoyatini faqat maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning
			roziligi bilan qaytarib olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713497" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarib olishga apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi qaror qabul qilish uchun alohida xonaga
			kirguniga qadar yoĘ»l qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713498" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarib olish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi hujjat
			ishda qoldiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713499" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">6</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish muddatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713500" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha qarori ustidan berilgan apellyatsiya shikoyati
			(protesti) u ishning barcha materiallari bilan kelib tushgan
			kundan eĘĽtiboran oĘ»n besh sutka ichida apellyatsiya instansiyasi
			sudi tomonidan koĘ»rilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713501" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462486"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">2</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462493"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">3</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462503"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">4</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462511"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">5</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462519"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">6</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462576"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">7</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462581"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">8</span></font></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-2462587"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">51</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">9</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan birinchi instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar boĘ»yicha qarorlari ustidan berilgan
			apellyatsiya shikoyatlari (protestlari) ishning barcha
			materiallari bilan kelib tushgan kundan eĘĽtiboran besh kunlik
			muddatda apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudi tomonidan koĘ»rilishi
			lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713502" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish yoki maĘĽmuriy
			tartibda chiqarib yuborish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarori ustidan berilgan
			apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) shikoyat (protest) berilgan
			paytdan eĘĽtiboran bir sutka ichida apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudi
			tomonidan koĘ»rilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713503" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">7</font>-modda.
			Sud xabarnomalari va chaqiruvlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713504" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishda
			ishtirok etuvchi shaxslar apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti)
			koĘ»riladigan vaqt va joy haqida sud chaqiruv qogĘ»ozlari,
			telefonogrammalar, telegrammalar va xabardor qilinganligi fakti
			qayd etilishini taĘĽminlaydigan boshqa aloqa vositalari orqali
			xabardor qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713505" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">8</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) koĘ»rish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713506" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha qarori ustidan berilgan apellyatsiya shikoyati
			(protesti) apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudining sudyasi tomonidan
			yakka tartibda koĘ»riladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713507" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni
			sud majlisida ushbu paragrafda belgilangan xususiyatlarni hisobga
			olgan holda, ushbu Kodeksning XXIII bobida nazarda tutilgan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rish
			qoidalariga binoan koĘ»rib chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713508" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish apellyatsiya instansiyasida
			koĘ»rilayotganda sud majlisi ish boĘ»yicha raislik qiluvchi
			tomonidan ochiladi, u qanday ish va kimning apellyatsiya shikoyati
			(protesti) boĘ»yicha koĘ»rilayotganligini eĘĽlon qiladi. Shundan
			keyin raislik qiluvchi sud tarkibini eĘĽlon qiladi, sud majlisi
			kotibining, shuningdek, agar sud majlisida ishtirok etayotgan
			boĘ»lsa, prokurorning, advokatning va tarjimonning familiyasini,
			ismini, otasining ismini maĘĽlum qiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713509" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Raislik
			qiluvchi ishda ishtirok etuvchi qaysi shaxslar, ularning vakillari
			kelganligini, hozir boĘ»lganlarning shaxsini aniqlaydi, mansabdor
			shaxslar va vakillarning vakolatlarini tekshiradi, ishda ishtirok
			etayotgan shaxslarga ularning huquq va majburiyatlarini
			tushuntiradi, berilgan iltimosnomalarni hal qiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713510" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			majlisining vaqti va joyi toĘ»gĘ»risida lozim darajada xabardor
			qilingan shaxslarning kelmaganligi ishni apellyatsiya tartibida
			koĘ»rish uchun monelik qilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713511" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni apellyatsiya instansiyasi
			sudida koĘ»rish sud majlisida raislik qiluvchi sudyaning maĘĽruzasi
			bilan boshlanadi. MaĘĽruza davomida maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish holatlari, birinchi instansiya sudi qarorining
			mazmuni, apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) vajlari bayon etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713512" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽruzadan
			keyin sud majlisida hozir boĘ»lgan, ishda ishtirok etuvchi
			shaxslarning, ularning vakillarining tushuntirishlari eshitiladi.
			Apellyatsiya shikoyati bergan shaxs yoki uning vakili yoxud agar
			prokuror apellyatsiya protesti bergan boĘ»lsa, prokuror birinchi
			boĘ»lib soĘ»zga chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713513" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxslarning soĘ»zlarini
			eshitib, tegishli iltimosnomalar mavjud boĘ»lganda yoki oĘ»z
			tashabbusiga koĘ»ra ishdagi mavjud va sudga taqdim etilgan (sud
			tomonidan talab qilib olingan) yangi dalillarni tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713514" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			apellyatsiya shikoyatining (protestining) vajlari bilan
			chegaralanmay, unga ilova qilingan qoĘ»shimcha materiallarni hamda
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish materiallarini toĘ»liq
			hajmda tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713515" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi ish holatlarini aniqlashtirishni va dalillarni
			tekshirishni tamomlagach, ishda ishtirok etayotgan shaxslarga ular
			sudda tushuntirishlar bergan ketma-ketlikda muzokaralarda chiqish
			imkoniyatini yaratadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713516" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			muzokaralari tugallangach, sudya qaror qabul qilish uchun alohida
			xonaga kiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713517" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			apellyatsiya tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari boĘ»yicha qaror
			qabul qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713518" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">9</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudining vakolatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713519" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining qarori ustidan apellyatsiya shikoyatini
			(protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish natijalariga koĘ»ra, apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi quyidagi qarorlardan birini qabul qiladi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713520" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			birinchi instansiya sudi qarorini oĘ»zgarishsiz, apellyatsiya
			shikoyatini (protestini) esa qanoatlantirmay qoldirish
			toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713521" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			birinchi instansiya sudi qarorini, shuningdek organning (mansabdor
			shaxsning) qarorini bekor qilish va ishni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan organga (mansabdor shaxsga)
			qaytarish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713522" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			birinchi instansiya sudi qarorini oĘ»zgartirish yoki bekor qilish
			va yangi qaror chiqarish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713523" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			birinchi instansiya sudi qarorini bekor qilish va ish yuritishni
			tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713524" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			jazo chorasini kuchaytirmagan holda uni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			uchun javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik hujjatida nazarda
			tutilgan doirada oĘ»zgartirish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713525" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) qaytarib olinishi munosabati
			bilan apellyatsiya ish yuritishini tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713526" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori chiqarilganidan keyin darhol oĘ»qib
			eshittiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713527" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori ustidan taftish tartibida shikoyat
			(protest) berilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713528" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">10</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudining qarori</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713529" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarorida quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713530" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			qaror chiqargan sudning nomi va tarkibi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713531" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			sud ishining raqami, qaror chiqarilgan sana va joy;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713532" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			qaror chiqarilgan ish;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713533" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			apellyatsiya shikoyati (protesti) bergan shaxs (familiyasi, ismi,
			otasining ismi);</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713534" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			shikoyat berilgan (protest keltirilgan) sud hujjatlarining
			mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713535" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			sudning apellyatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish
			natijalari yuzasidan xulosalari hamda sud amal qilgan qonunlarga
			va boshqa qonunchilik hujjatlariga havolalar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713536" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori sudya tomonidan imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713537" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran qonuniy
			kuchga kiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713538" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori uni chiqargan sudga chiqarilgan
			kundan eĘĽtiboran uch sutkadan kechiktirmay ish bilan birga ijro
			etish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713539" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">11</font>-modda.
			Apellyatsiya instansiyasi sudi qarorining nusxasini yuborish
			(topshirish)</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713540" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Apellyatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori chiqarilganidan keyin uning koĘ»chirma
			nusxasi oĘ»ziga nisbatan maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ish boĘ»yicha qaror chiqarilgan shaxsga, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			haqida bayonnoma tuzgan organga uch sutkagacha boĘ»lgan muddatda
			topshiriladi yoki yuboriladi, shuningdek jabrlanuvchiga oĘ»z
			soĘ»roviga binoan ushbu muddatda topshiriladi yoki yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713541" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			maĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish yoki maĘĽmuriy tartibda chiqarib yuborish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarori ustidan berilgan apellyatsiya shikoyatini
			(protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari yuzasidan chiqarilgan
			qaror u qabul qilingan kuni qarorni ijro etuvchi organning,
			mansabdor shaxsning, shuningdek oĘ»ziga nisbatan qaror qabul
			qilingan shaxsning va jabrlanuvchining eĘĽtiboriga yetkaziladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713542" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2-Â§.
			Kassatsiya instansiyasi sudida ish yuritish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713543" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">12</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya tartibida sud hujjatlarini koĘ»rish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713544" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			tartibida birinchi instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlar boĘ»yicha qarorlari, agar ular apellyatsiya
			tartibida koĘ»rilmagan boĘ»lsa, koĘ»rilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713545" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">13</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya shikoyati berish (protest keltirish) huquqi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713546" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha oĘ»ziga nisbatan sud
			qarori chiqarilgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy
			vakillari, advokat va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzgan organ sud hujjatlari ustidan, agar ish
			apellyatsiya tartibida koĘ»rilmagan boĘ»lsa, apellyatsiya
			tartibida shikoyat berish muddati oĘ»tgach, kassatsiya tartibida
			shikoyat berish huquqiga ega.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713547" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh prokurori, uning oĘ»rinbosarlari,
			QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi prokurori, viloyatlar, Toshkent
			shahar, tumanlar, shaharlar prokurorlari va ularga
			tenglashtirilgan prokurorlar, shuningdek ularning oĘ»rinbosarlari
			sud hujjatlari ustidan, agar ish apellyatsiya tartibida
			koĘ»rilmagan boĘ»lsa, apellyatsiya tartibida protest keltirish
			muddati oĘ»tgach, kassatsiya tartibida protest keltirishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713548" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713546"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713547"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan shaxslar
			kassatsiya shikoyatida (protestida) bayon etilgan vajlarni
			tasdiqlovchi qoĘ»shimcha materiallar taqdim etishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713549" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">14</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti) berish tartibi va muddati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713550" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			shikoyati (protesti):</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713551" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudlarining qarorlari
			ustidan â€” QoraqalpogĘ»iston Respublikasi sudiga, viloyatlar,
			Toshkent shahar sudlariga;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713552" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			hududiy harbiy sudlarning qarorlari ustidan â€” OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Harbiy sudiga berilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713553" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			shikoyatlari (protestlari) qaror chiqargan sud orqali beriladi.
			Shikoyat (protest) bevosita kassatsiya instansiyasi sudiga
			berilgan taqdirda, sud ularni qaror chiqargan sudga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713469"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">1</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;bayon
			etilgan talablarni bajarish uchun yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713554" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			shikoyati (protesti) birinchi instansiya sudining qarori
			chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran olti oy ichida berilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713555" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713554"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan muddat
			oĘ»tkazib yuborilgan taqdirda, kassatsiya instansiyasi sudi
			kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti) berayotgan shaxsning
			iltimosnomasiga asosan, agar uni oĘ»tkazib yuborish sabablarini
			uzrli deb topsa, oĘ»tkazilgan muddatni tiklashga haqli boĘ»lib, bu
			haqda ajrim chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713556" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">15</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya shikoyatining (protestining) mazmuniga qoĘ»yiladigan
			talablar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713557" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			shikoyatining (protestining) mazmuni ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713481"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">4</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasi</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;talablariga
			javob berishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713558" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			mazkur talablar bajarilmasa, sud ushbu Kodeks
			324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">4</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713491"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713492"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismlarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan
			qarorlardan birini qabul qiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713559" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">16</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish muddatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713560" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha chiqarilgan qarori ustidan kassatsiya shikoyati
			(protesti) ushbu shikoyat (protest) ishning barcha materiallari
			bilan birga kelib tushgan kundan eĘĽtiboran oĘ»n besh sutka ichida
			kassatsiya instansiyasi sudi tomonidan koĘ»rib chiqilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713561" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">17</font>-modda.
			Ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxslarni xabardor qilish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713562" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			birinchi instansiyada koĘ»rib chiqqan sud tomonidan kassatsiya
			shikoyati (protesti) kelib tushganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida ishda
			ishtirok etuvchi shaxslar, agar shikoyat (protest) ularning
			manfaatlariga daxldor boĘ»lsa, uch kunlik muddatda xabardor
			qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713563" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713562"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan shaxslarga
			kassatsiya shikoyatining (protestining) nusxasi yoki uning
			elektron nusxasi bilan qaror chiqargan sudning internet-resursi
			orqali tanishish imkoniyati toĘ»gĘ»risidagi xabarnoma yuboriladi.
			Bunda taraflarga kassatsiya shikoyatiga (protestiga) doir oĘ»z
			eĘĽtirozlarini yozma shaklda yoxud elektron hujjat tarzida taqdim
			etish huquqi eĘĽtirozlarni taqdim etish muddati koĘ»rsatilgan
			holda tushuntiriladi. Kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti) yuzasidan
			kelib tushgan eĘĽtirozlar ishga qoĘ»shib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713564" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713562"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan shaxslar ish
			kassatsiya instansiyasi sudiga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			kiritilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida birinchi instansiya sudi tomonidan
			xabardor qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713565" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">18</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarib olish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713566" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha qarori
			ustidan kassatsiya shikoyatini bergan shaxs uni qaytarib olishga
			haqli. Kassatsiya protestini qaytarib olish huquqi protestni
			kiritgan prokurorga, shuningdek yuqori turuvchi prokurorga
			tegishlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713567" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»ziga
			nisbatan sudning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha qarori chiqarilgan shaxs oĘ»z advokatining kassatsiya
			shikoyatini qaytarib olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713568" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka tortilgan shaxsning advokati, qonuniy vakili oĘ»z
			kassatsiya shikoyatini faqat maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikka tortilgan
			shaxsning roziligi bilan qaytarib olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713569" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarib olishga kassatsiya instansiyasi
			sudi qaror qabul qilish uchun alohida xonaga kirguniga qadar yoĘ»l
			qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713570" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarib olishda kassatsiya instansiyasi
			sudi qaror chiqaradi va bu qaror bilan, agar sud qarori ustidan
			boshqa shaxslar shikoyat qilmagan boĘ»lsa, kassatsiya tartibida
			ish yuritishni tugatadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713571" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			shikoyatini (protestini) qaytarib olish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi hujjat
			ishda qoldiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713572" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">19</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713573" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha qarori ustidan berilgan kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti)
			kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining sudyasi tomonidan yakka tartibda
			koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713574" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni
			sud majlisida ushbu paragrafda belgilangan xususiyatlarni hisobga
			olgan holda, ushbu Kodeksning XXIII bobida nazarda tutilgan
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarliklar toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishlarni koĘ»rish
			qoidalariga binoan koĘ»rib chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713575" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish kassatsiya instansiyasida
			koĘ»rilayotganda sud majlisi ish boĘ»yicha raislik qiluvchi
			tomonidan ochiladi, u qanday ish va kimning kassatsiya shikoyati
			(protesti) boĘ»yicha koĘ»rilayotganligini eĘĽlon qiladi. Shundan
			keyin raislik qiluvchi sud tarkibini eĘĽlon qiladi, sud majlisi
			kotibining, shuningdek, agar sud majlisida ishtirok etayotgan
			boĘ»lsa, prokurorning, advokatning va tarjimonning familiyasini,
			ismini, otasining ismini maĘĽlum qiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713576" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Raislik
			qiluvchi ishda ishtirok etuvchi qaysi shaxslar, ularning vakillari
			kelganligini aniqlashtiradi, hozir boĘ»lganlarning shaxsini
			aniqlaydi, mansabdor shaxslar va vakillarning vakolatlarini
			tekshiradi, ishda ishtirok etayotgan shaxslarga ularning huquq va
			majburiyatlarini tushuntiradi, bildirilgan iltimosnomalarni hal
			qiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713577" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			majlisining vaqti va joyi toĘ»gĘ»risida lozim darajada xabardor
			qilingan shaxslarning kelmaganligi ishni kassatsiya tartibida
			koĘ»rish uchun monelik qilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713578" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni kassatsiya instansiyasi sudida
			koĘ»rish sud majlisida raislik qiluvchi sudyaning maĘĽruzasi bilan
			boshlanadi. MaĘĽruza davomida maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish holatlari, birinchi instansiya sudi qarorining
			mazmuni, kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti) vajlari bayon etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713579" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽruzadan
			keyin sud majlisida hozir boĘ»lgan, ishda ishtirok etuvchi
			shaxslarning, ular vakillarining tushuntirishlari eshitiladi.
			Kassatsiya shikoyati bergan shaxs yoki uning vakili yoxud, agar
			prokuror kassatsiya protesti bergan boĘ»lsa, prokuror birinchi
			boĘ»lib soĘ»zga chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713580" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxslarning soĘ»zlarini
			eshitib, tegishli iltimosnomalar mavjud boĘ»lganda yoki oĘ»z
			tashabbusiga koĘ»ra ishdagi mavjud va sudga taqdim etilgan (sud
			tomonidan talab qilib olingan) yangi dalillarni tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713581" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			kassatsiya shikoyatining (protestining) vajlari bilan
			chegaralanmay, unga ilova qilingan qoĘ»shimcha materiallarni hamda
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish materiallarini toĘ»liq
			hajmda tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713582" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi ish holatlarini aniqlashtirishni va dalillarni
			tekshirishni tamomlagach, ishda ishtirok etayotgan shaxslarga ular
			sudda tushuntirishlar bergan ketma-ketlikda muzokaralarda chiqish
			imkoniyatini yaratadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713583" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			muzokaralari tugallangach, sudya qaror qabul qilish uchun alohida
			xonaga kiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713584" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			kassatsiya tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari boĘ»yicha qaror
			qabul qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713585" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			koĘ»chirma nusxalari kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti) bergan
			shaxsga va ishda ishtirok etuvchi boshqa shaxslarga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713539"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">11</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan tartibda yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713586" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">20</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining vakolatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713587" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudining qarori ustidan kassatsiya shikoyatini
			(protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish natijalariga koĘ»ra, kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudi quyidagi qarorlardan birini qabul qiladi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713588" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			birinchi instansiya sudi qarorini oĘ»zgarishsiz, shikoyatni
			(protestni) esa qanoatlantirmay qoldirish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713589" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			birinchi instansiya sudining qarorini, shuningdek organning
			(mansabdor shaxsning) qarorini bekor qilish va ishni maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan organga (mansabdor
			shaxsga) qaytarish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713590" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			birinchi instansiya sudi qarorini oĘ»zgartirish yoki bekor qilish
			va yangi qaror chiqarish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713591" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			birinchi instansiya sudi qarorini bekor qilish va ish yuritishni
			tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713592" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			jazo chorasini kuchaytirmagan holda uni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			uchun javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik hujjatida nazarda
			tutilgan doirada oĘ»zgartirish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713593" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti) qaytarib olinishi munosabati bilan
			kassatsiya ish yuritishini tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713594" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori chiqarilganidan keyin darhol oĘ»qib
			eshittiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713595" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori ustidan taftish tartibida shikoyat
			(protest) berilishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713596" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">21</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatini oĘ»zgartirish yoki bekor qilish uchun asoslar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713597" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			hujjatining noqonuniyligi, asoslantirilmaganligi va adolatsizligi
			sud hujjatini kassatsiya tartibida oĘ»zgartirish yoki bekor qilish
			uchun asos boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713598" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			mazmunan toĘ»gĘ»ri boĘ»lgan hujjati faqat birgina yuzaki asoslarga
			koĘ»ra bekor qilinishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713599" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">22</font>-modda.
			Kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining qarori</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713600" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarorida quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713601" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			qaror chiqargan sudning nomi va tarkibi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713602" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			sud ishining raqami, qaror chiqarilgan sana va joy;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713603" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			qaror chiqarilgan ish;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713604" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			kassatsiya shikoyati (protesti) bergan shaxs (familiyasi, ismi,
			otasining ismi);</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713605" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			shikoyat berilgan (protest keltirilgan) sud hujjatlarining
			mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713606" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			sudning kassatsiya shikoyatini (protestini) koĘ»rib chiqish
			natijalari yuzasidan xulosalari hamda sud amal qilgan qonunlarga
			va boshqa qonunchilik hujjatlariga havolalar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713607" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori sudya tomonidan imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713608" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran qonuniy
			kuchga kiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713609" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori uni chiqargan sudga chiqarilgan
			kundan eĘĽtiboran uch sutkadan kechiktirmay ish bilan birga ijro
			etish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713610" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3-Â§.
			Taftish instansiyasi sudida ish yuritish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713611" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">23</font>-modda.
			Taftish tartibida qayta koĘ»rilishi mumkin boĘ»lgan sud qarorlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713612" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha tuman (shahar) sudlarining, hududiy harbiy
			sudlarning apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya tartibida koĘ»rib
			chiqilgan qarorlari, shuningdek apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarorlari OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy
			sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽati tomonidan
			taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713613" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">24</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatlari ustidan taftish tartibida shikoyat berish huquqiga
			ega boĘ»lgan shaxslar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713614" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha oĘ»ziga nisbatan sud
			qarori chiqarilgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy
			vakillari, advokat va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzgan organ birinchi instansiya sudining apellyatsiya
			yoki kassatsiya tartibida koĘ»rib chiqilgan qarorlari, shuningdek
			apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining qarorlari
			ustidan taftish tartibida shikoyat berishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713615" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">25</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatlari ustidan taftish tartibida protest keltirish
			huquqiga ega boĘ»lgan shaxslar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713616" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh prokurori yoki uning oĘ»rinbosarlari birinchi
			instansiya sudining apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya tartibida koĘ»rib
			chiqilgan qarorlari, shuningdek apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudlarining qarorlari ustidan OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽatiga taftish tartibida protest keltirishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713617" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">26</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatlarini taftish tartibida qayta koĘ»rib chiqishga yoĘ»l
			qoĘ»yiladigan muddat</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713618" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shikoyat
			(protest) apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining
			qarori chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran olti oy ichida berilishi
			mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713619" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713478"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan muddat
			oĘ»tkazib yuborilgan taqdirda, taftish instansiyasi sudi shikoyat
			(protest) berayotgan shaxsning iltimosnomasiga koĘ»ra, agar uni
			oĘ»tkazib yuborish sabablarini uzrli deb topsa, oĘ»tkazib
			yuborilgan muddatni tiklashga haqli boĘ»lib, bu haqda ajrim
			chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713620" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">27</font>-modda.
			Taftish tartibida beriladigan shikoyatning (protestning) mazmuniga
			quyiladigan talablar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713621" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibidagi shikoyatda (protestda) quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi
			kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713622" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			shikoyat (protest) yuborilayotgan, ishni taftish tartibida
			koĘ»radigan sudning nomi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713623" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			shikoyat (protest) bergan shaxs, uning protsessual mavqeyi, uning
			yashash joyi yoki joylashgan yeri toĘ»gĘ»risidagi maĘĽlumotlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713624" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			sud ishining raqami, ustidan shikoyat (protest) berilayotgan qaror
			chiqarilgan sana, birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya, kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining nomi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713625" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			shikoyat (protest) berayotgan shaxsning fikriga koĘ»ra qarorning
			notoĘ»gĘ»riligi nimadan iborat ekanligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi vajlari,
			shuningdek uning iltimosining mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713626" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			shikoyat (protest) bergan shaxs oĘ»z talablarini asoslayotgan
			dalillar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713627" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			shikoyatga (protestga) ilova qilinayotgan materiallar roĘ»yxati;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713628" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
			shikoyat (protest) berilgan sana, shikoyat (protest) bergan
			shaxsning imzosi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713629" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">28</font>-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni taftish tartibida
			tekshirish uchun talab qilib olish va shikoyatni (protestni)
			taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish muddati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713630" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining raisi va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari,
			shuningdek OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining sudyasi
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni tekshirish uchun
			suddan taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) boĘ»yicha
			talab qilib olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713631" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh prokurori va uning oĘ»rinbosarlari taftish
			tartibida protest keltirish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masalani hal etish
			uchun maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni suddan talab
			qilib olishga haqli. MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			ishlarni talab qilib olish uchun ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713613"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">24</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;koĘ»rsatilgan
			shaxslarning shikoyatlari sabab boĘ»ladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713632" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) bir oygacha boĘ»lgan
			muddatda, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish talab qilib
			olingan taqdirda esa ikki oygacha boĘ»lgan muddatda koĘ»rib
			chiqilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713633" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">29</font>-modda.
			Taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatni (protestni) qaytarib olish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713634" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha qarori
			ustidan taftish tartibidagi shikoyatni bergan shaxs uni qaytarib
			olishga haqli. Taftish tartibida berilgan protestni qaytarib olish
			huquqi protest keltirgan prokurorga, shuningdek yuqori turuvchi
			prokurorga tegishlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713635" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»ziga
			nisbatan sudning maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha qarori chiqarilgan shaxs oĘ»z advokatining taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyatini qaytarib olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713636" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka tortilgan shaxsning advokati, qonuniy vakili
			oĘ»zining taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatini faqat maĘĽmuriy
			javobgarlikka tortilayotgan shaxsning roziligi bilan qaytarib
			olishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713637" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyatni (protestni) qaytarib olishga taftish
			instansiyasi sudi alohida xonaga kirguniga qadar yoĘ»l qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713638" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyatni (protestni) qaytarib olish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi hujjat ishda qoldiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713639" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">30</font>-modda.
			Taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatni (protestni) koĘ»rib
			chiqmasdan qaytarish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713640" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) quyidagi hollarda koĘ»rib
			chiqilmasdan qaytariladi, agar:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713641" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			shikoyat (protest) ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713620"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">27</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan talablarga javob bermasa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713642" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			shikoyat (protest) ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713613"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">24</span></font></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713615"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">25</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;koĘ»rsatilgan
			shaxslar tomonidan berilmagan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713643" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			shikoyat (protest) belgilangan muddat oĘ»tkazilib berilgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713644" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatni (protestni) qaytarib olish
			toĘ»gĘ»risida ariza kelib tushgan boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713645" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish taftish tartibida
			koĘ»rilishi lozim boĘ»lmasa.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713646" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			modda birinchi qismining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713641"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">1&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713642"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">2-bandlarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;koĘ»rsatilgan
			holatlar bartaraf etilganidan keyin shikoyat (protest) bergan
			shaxs takroran umumiy asoslarda murojaat qilishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713647" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">31</font>-modda.
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha
			sudlov hayĘĽatiga kelib tushgan, taftish tartibida berilgan
			shikoyatlar boĘ»yicha qabul qilinadigan qarorlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713649" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyat unga ilova qilingan materiallar bilan
			birga, zarur boĘ»lgan hollarda esa ishni talab qilib olgan holda
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining sudyasi tomonidan oĘ»rganib
			chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713648" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Shikoyatni
			oĘ»rganib chiqish natijalari boĘ»yicha OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Oliy sudining sudyasi oĘ»z ajrimi bilan quyidagi qarorlardan
			birini qabul qiladi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713650" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			sud qarorlarini taftish tartibida qayta koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			asoslar mavjud emasligi toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713651" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			shikoyatni ish bilan birga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽatiga oĘ»tkazish haqida.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713652" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida shikoyat bergan shaxsga qabul qilingan qaror toĘ»gĘ»risida
			uch sutka ichida xabar qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713653" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">32</font>-modda.
			Sud qarorlarini OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatida taftish tartibida qayta koĘ»rib
			chiqish uchun asoslar mavjud emasligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ajrim</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713654" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			qarorlarini OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatida taftish tartibida qayta koĘ»rib
			chiqish uchun asoslar mavjud emasligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ajrimda
			quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713655" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			ajrim chiqarilgan joy va sana;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713656" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ajrim chiqargan sudyaning familiyasi, ismi, otasining ismi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713657" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			taftish tartibida shikoyat bergan shaxs haqidagi maĘĽlumotlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713658" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			qaror chiqargan birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining nomi, birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya yoki
			kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining qarori chiqarilgan sana;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713659" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatning mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713660" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			taftish tartibidagi shikoyatni koĘ»rib chiqish uchun OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽatiga oĘ»tkazishni rad etish sabablari va asoslari.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713661" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			qarorlarini OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatida taftish tartibida qayta koĘ»rib
			chiqish uchun asoslar mavjud emasligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudi sudyasining ajrimi ustidan taftish
			tartibida shikoyat bergan shaxs tomonidan OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudi raisiga, uning oĘ»rinbosariga shikoyat
			qilinishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713662" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudi raisi, uning oĘ»rinbosari taftish tartibida
			shikoyat bergan shaxsning shikoyatiga koĘ»ra OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudi sudyasining sud qarorlarini taftish
			tartibida qayta koĘ»rib chiqish uchun asoslar mavjud emasligi
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ajrimini bekor qilish haqida ajrim chiqarishga va
			shikoyatni ish bilan birga taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha
			sudlov hayĘĽatiga oĘ»tkazishga haqlidir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713663" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">33</font>-modda.
			Taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatni OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatiga koĘ»rib
			chiqish uchun oĘ»tkazish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ajrim</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713664" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudi sudyasining taftish tartibida berilgan
			shikoyatni OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari
			boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatiga koĘ»rib chiqish uchun oĘ»tkazish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ajrimida quyidagilar koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713665" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			ajrim chiqarilgan joy va sana;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713666" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ajrim chiqargan sudyaning familiyasi, ismi, otasining ismi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713667" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			taftish tartibida shikoyat bergan shaxs haqidagi maĘĽlumotlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713668" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			qaror chiqargan birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining nomi, birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya yoki
			kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining qarori chiqarilgan sana;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713669" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatning mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713670" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatni koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha
			sudlov hayĘĽatiga oĘ»tkazish sabablari va asoslari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713671" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">7)
