			ishni OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari
			boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatida koĘ»rib chiqish joyi va sanasi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713672" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining sudyasi taftish tartibida berilgan
			shikoyatni oĘ»zi chiqargan ajrim bilan birga OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽatiga ish bilan birga oĘ»tkazadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713673" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">34</font>-modda.
			Shikoyat (protest) taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha
			sudlov hayĘĽatiga kiritilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida xabardor qilish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713674" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha oĘ»ziga nisbatan sud
			qarori chiqarilgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy
			vakillari, advokat va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida
			bayonnoma tuzgan organ, agar shikoyat (protest) ularning
			manfaatlariga daxldor boĘ»lsa, maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish uchun
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha
			sudlov hayĘĽatiga kiritilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida uch sutka ichida
			xabardor qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713675" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyatning (protestning) koĘ»chirma nusxasi
			yoxud qaror chiqargan sudning internet-resursi orqali uning
			elektron nusxasi bilan tanishish mumkinligi toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			xabarnoma ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713674"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatilgan shaxslarga
			yuboriladi. Bunda taraflarga ularning taftish tartibida berilgan
			shikoyatga (protestga) doir oĘ»z eĘĽtirozlarini yozma shaklda
			yoxud elektron hujjat tarzida taqdim etish huquqi eĘĽtirozlarni
			taqdim etish muddati koĘ»rsatilgan holda tushuntiriladi. Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) yuzasidan kelib tushgan
			eĘĽtirozlar ishga qoĘ»shib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713676" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">35</font>-modda.
			Ishni OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari
			boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatida taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish
			uchun tayyorlash</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713677" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ish
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudi sudyasining ajrimi, taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) bilan birga kelib
			tushganidan keyin OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽati maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha oĘ»ziga nisbatan sud qarori
			chiqarilgan shaxsni, jabrlanuvchini, ularning qonuniy vakillarini,
			advokatni va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik haqida bayonnoma tuzgan
			organni taftish tartibida shikoyat (protest) berilganligi haqida,
			agar shikoyat (protest) ularning manfaatlariga daxldor boĘ»lsa,
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqish boshlanishidan kamida uch sutka oldin
			xabardor qiladi. Taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatning
			(protestning) nusxasi yoxud qaror chiqargan sudning
			internet-resursi orqali uning elektron nusxasi bilan tanishish
			mumkinligi toĘ»gĘ»risida xabarnoma ushbu shaxslarga yuboriladi.
			Bunda taraflarga ularning taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatga
			(protestga) doir oĘ»z eĘĽtirozlarini yozma shaklda yoxud elektron
			hujjat tarzida taqdim etish huquqi eĘĽtirozlarni taqdim etish
			muddati koĘ»rsatilgan holda tushuntiriladi. Taftish tartibida
			berilgan shikoyat (protest) yuzasidan kelib tushgan eĘĽtirozlar
			ishga qoĘ»shib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713678" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713677"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">birinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan talablar
			bajarilganidan keyin maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish
			boĘ»yicha oĘ»ziga nisbatan sud qarori chiqarilgan shaxs,
			jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy vakillari, advokat va maĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan organ, agar shikoyat
			(protest) ularning manfaatlariga daxldor boĘ»lsa, ish taftish
			tartibida koĘ»riladigan vaqt haqida ishni koĘ»rib chiqish
			boshlanishidan kamida uch sutka oldin xabardor qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713679" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">36</font>-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽatining sud majlisida taftish tartibida koĘ»rishda
			taraflarning ishtirok etishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713680" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy
			sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatining sud
			majlisida taftish tartibida koĘ»rishda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish boĘ»yicha oĘ»ziga nisbatan sud qarori
			chiqarilgan shaxs, jabrlanuvchi, ularning qonuniy vakillari,
			advokat va maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risida bayonnoma tuzgan
			organ ishtirok etishga haqli. Ushbu shaxslar sud majlisida
			bevosita yoxud videokonferensaloqa tizimidan foydalangan holda
			ishtirok etishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713681" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Prokuror
			tomonidan taftish tartibida protest kiritilgan ishlar boĘ»yicha
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Bosh prokurori, uning oĘ»rinbosari yoki
			ular tomonidan vakolat berilgan prokuror ishtirok etishi shart.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713682" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">37</font>-modda.
			Ishni OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari
			boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatida taftish tartibida koĘ»rish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713683" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ish
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha
			sudlov hayĘĽatida Oliy sud sudyasi tomonidan taftish tartibida
			yakka tartibda koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713684" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy
			sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatida taftish
			tartibida koĘ»rilayotganda sud majlisi raislik qiluvchi tomonidan
			ochiladi, u qanday ish va kimning taftish tartibida berilgan
			shikoyati (protesti) boĘ»yicha koĘ»rilayotganligini eĘĽlon qiladi.
			Shundan keyin raislik qiluvchi sud tarkibini eĘĽlon qiladi, sud
			majlisi kotibining, shuningdek, agar sud majlisida ishtirok
			etayotgan boĘ»lsa, prokurorning, advokatning va tarjimonning
			familiyasini, ismini, otasining ismini maĘĽlum qiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713685" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Raislik
			qiluvchi ishda ishtirok etuvchi qaysi shaxslar, ularning vakillari
			kelganligini aniqlashtiradi, hozir boĘ»lganlarning shaxsini
			aniqlaydi, mansabdor shaxslar va vakillarning vakolatlarini
			tekshiradi, ishda ishtirok etayotgan shaxslarga ularning huquq va
			majburiyatlarini tushuntiradi, bildirilgan iltimosnomalarni hal
			qiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713686" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			majlisining vaqti va joyi toĘ»gĘ»risida lozim darajada xabardor
			qilingan shaxslarning kelmaganligi ishni taftish tartibida koĘ»rish
			uchun monelik qilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713687" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ishni taftish instansiyasi sudida
			koĘ»rish sud majlisida raislik qiluvchi sudyaning maĘĽruzasi bilan
			boshlanadi. MaĘĽruza davomida maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish holatlari, birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya
			yoki kassatsiya instansiyasi sudi qarorining mazmuni, taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyatning (protestning) vajlari bayon
			etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713688" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽruzadan
			keyin sud majlisida hozir boĘ»lgan, ishda ishtirok etuvchi
			shaxslarning, ularning vakillarining tushuntirishlari eshitiladi.
			Taftish tartibidagi shikoyatni bergan shaxs yoki uning vakili
			yoxud, agar prokuror taftish tartibida protest keltirgan boĘ»lsa,
			prokuror birinchi boĘ»lib soĘ»zga chiqadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713689" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			instansiyasi sudi ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxslarning soĘ»zlarini
			eshitib, tegishli iltimosnomalar mavjud boĘ»lganda yoki oĘ»z
			tashabbusiga koĘ»ra ishdagi mavjud va sudga taqdim etilgan (sud
			tomonidan talab qilib olingan) yangi dalillarni tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713690" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatning (protestning) vajlari
			bilan chegaralanmay, unga ilova qilingan qoĘ»shimcha materiallarni
			hamda maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish materiallarini
			toĘ»liq hajmda tekshiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713691" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			instansiyasi sudi ish holatlarini aniqlashtirishni va dalillarni
			tekshirishni tamomlagach, ishda ishtirok etayotgan shaxslarga ular
			sudda tushuntirishlar bergan ketma-ketlikda muzokaralarda chiqish
			imkoniyatini yaratadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713692" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			muzokaralari tugallangach, sudya qaror qabul qilish uchun alohida
			xonaga kiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713693" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari boĘ»yicha qaror qabul
			qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713694" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			muhokamasining borishi va mazmuni haqida ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201553"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">308-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;belgilangan
			talablarga muvofiq sud majlisining bayonnomasi tuziladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713695" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">38</font>-modda.
			Ishni taftish tartibida koĘ»rishda OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy
			sudi Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatining vakolatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713696" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽati ishni taftish tartibida koĘ»rish natijalari boĘ»yicha
			quyidagi qarorlardan birini qabul qiladi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713697" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya instansiyasi
			sudining qarorini oĘ»zgarishsiz, taftish tartibida berilgan
			shikoyatni (protestni) esa qanoatlantirmasdan qoldirish
			toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713758" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya instansiyasi sudining qarorini bekor
			qilish va birinchi instansiya sudining qarorini oĘ»zgarishsiz
			qoldirish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713760" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			ish boĘ»yicha qabul qilingan barcha sud qarorlarini bekor qilish
			va ish yuritishni tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713762" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya instansiyasi
			sudining qarorini oĘ»zgartirish yoxud bekor qilish va yangi qaror
			qabul qilish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713764" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			jazo chorasini kuchaytirmagan holda uni maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik
			uchun javobgarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilik hujjatida nazarda
			tutilgan doirada oĘ»zgartirish haqida;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713766" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) qaytarib olingan
			taqdirda, taftish tartibida ish yuritishni tugatish toĘ»gĘ»risida.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713779" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">39</font>-modda.
			Ishni taftish tartibida koĘ»ruvchi OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy
			sudi Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatining qarori</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713782" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			taftish tartibida koĘ»ruvchi OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudi
			Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatining qarorida quyidagilar
			koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713783" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			sud ishining raqami, qaror chiqarilgan sana va joy;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713786" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			sudning nomi va tarkibi, ishni koĘ»rishda ishtirok etgan prokuror
			va boshqa shaxslar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713788" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			taftish tartibida shikoyat (protest) bergan shaxs (familiyasi,
			ismi, otasining ismi);</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713789" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			taftish tartibida shikoyat (protest) berilgan qarorning qaror
			qismi mazmuni;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713791" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyatning (protestning), ishni
			taftish tartibida koĘ»rishda ishtirok etayotgan shaxslar
			eĘĽtirozlarining va tushuntirishlarining mazmuni, shuningdek
			prokurorning fikri;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713793" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			taftish tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) boĘ»yicha ishni
			koĘ»ruvchi sudning qarori.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713794" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Taftish
			tartibida berilgan shikoyat (protest) qanoatlantirilmay
			qoldirilgan taqdirda, ishni taftish tartibida koĘ»ruvchi sudning
			qarorida birinchi instansiya, apellyatsiya yoki kassatsiya
			instansiyasi sudining qarori qonuniy, asosli va adolatli deb
			topilganligining, shikoyat (protest) qanoatlantirilmasdan
			qoldirilganligining asoslari koĘ»rsatilishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713796" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qaror
			bekor qilingan yoki oĘ»zgartirilgan taqdirda, ishni taftish
			tartibida koĘ»ruvchi sudning qarorida qonunning qaysi normalari
			buzilganligi va bekor qilinayotgan yoki oĘ»zgartirilayotgan
			qarorning asossizligi va adolatsizligi nimadan iborat ekanligi
			vajlari koĘ»rsatilishi kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713797" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudi Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽatining qarori sudya tomonidan imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713799" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			taftish tartibida koĘ»ruvchi OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Oliy sudi
			Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov hayĘĽatining qarori sud majlisi
			zalida oĘ»qib eshittiriladi va chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran
			qonuniy kuchga kiradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713800" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			taftish tartibida koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari boĘ»yicha OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Oliy sudining Jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudlov
			hayĘĽati tomonidan chiqarilgan qaror uzil-kesildir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713801" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ishni
			taftish tartibida koĘ»ruvchi sudning qarori uni chiqargan sudga
			yoki boshqa sudga chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran uch sutkadan
			kechiktirmay ish bilan birga ijro etish uchun yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713802" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4-Â§.
			Qonuniy kuchga kirgan sud hujjatlarini yangi ochilgan holatlar
			boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish yuzasidan ish yuritish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713803" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">40</font>-modda.
			Sudning qonuniy kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan
			holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish huquqi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713805" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sud oĘ»zi chiqargan hamda qonuniy kuchga kirgan
			sud hujjatini ushbu paragrafda nazarda tutilgan asoslarga koĘ»ra
			va tartibda yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rishi
			mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713806" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">41</font>-modda.
			Qonuniy kuchga kirgan sud hujjatlarini yangi ochilgan holatlar
			boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»radigan sudlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713808" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Birinchi
			instansiya sudi tomonidan chiqarilgan, qonuniy kuchga kirgan qaror
			yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha ushbu qarorni chiqargan jinoyat
			ishlari boĘ»yicha sud tomonidan qayta koĘ»riladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713809" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yangi
			ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha apellyatsiya, kassatsiya yoki taftish
			instansiyasi sudining qaysi qarorlari bilan sud hujjati
			oĘ»zgartirilgan yoki yangi sud hujjati qabul qilingan boĘ»lsa,
			oĘ»sha qarorlarni qayta koĘ»rish sud hujjati oĘ»zgartirilgan yoki
			yangi qaror qabul qilingan instansiyada amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713811" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">42</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatlarini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish
			asoslari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713812" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rish asoslari quyidagilardan iborat:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713814" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			sud hujjati qabul qilingan paytda mavjud boĘ»lgan, lekin
			arizachiga maĘĽlum boĘ»lmagan va maĘĽlum boĘ»lishi mumkin
			boĘ»lmagan, ish uchun muhim holatlar;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713815" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			sudning qonuniy kuchga kirgan hukmi bilan aniqlangan va mazkur ish
			boĘ»yicha qonunga xilof yoki asoslantirilmagan sud hujjati qabul
			qilinishiga sabab boĘ»lgan ekspertning bila turib yolgĘ»on xulosa
			berganligi, guvohning bila turib yolgĘ»on koĘ»rsatuvlar
			berganligi, bila turib yolgĘ»on tarjima qilinganligi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713817" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			sudning qonuniy kuchga kirgan hukmi, ajrimi bilan aniqlangan
			holatlar, yaĘĽni ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxsning yoki uning
			vakilining yoxud sudyaning mazkur ishni koĘ»rish chogĘ»ida sodir
			etilgan jinoiy qilmishlari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713819" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudning yoki fuqarolik ishlari boĘ»yicha
			sudning yoxud iqtisodiy sudning mazkur ish boĘ»yicha sud hujjatini
			qabul qilish uchun asos boĘ»lib xizmat qilgan hujjati yoki boshqa
			organning qarori yoxud boshqa huquqiy hujjati bekor qilinganligi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713821" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">43</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani berish tartibi va muddati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713822" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ariza ushbu sud hujjatini qabul
			qilgan sudga sud hujjatini qayta koĘ»rish uchun asos boĘ»ladigan
			holatlar ochilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran bir oydan kechiktirmay ishda
			ishtirok etuvchi shaxslar yoki prokuror tomonidan beriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713824" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Arizaning
			va unga ilova qilingan hujjatlarning koĘ»chirma nusxalari ishda
			ishtirok etuvchi boshqa shaxslarga yuborilganligini tasdiqlovchi
			hujjatlar arizaga ilova qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713825" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ariza
			berishning oĘ»tkazib yuborilgan muddati ariza bilan murojaat
			qilgan shaxsning iltimosnomasi boĘ»yicha, agar iltimosnoma qayta
			koĘ»rish uchun asos boĘ»ladigan holatlar ochilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran
			bir oydan kechiktirib berilgan boĘ»lsa va sud muddatni oĘ»tkazib
			yuborish sabablarini uzrli deb tan olsa, sud tomonidan tiklanishi
			mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713827" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			hujjati chiqarilgan paytdan eĘĽtiboran bir yil oĘ»tgach berilgan
			arizalar koĘ»rib chiqilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713829" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">44</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizaning shakli va mazmuni</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713831" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rib chiqish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ariza sudga yozma shaklda
			beriladi. Ariza uni bergan shaxs yoki uning vakili tomonidan
			imzolanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713832" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rib chiqish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizada quyidagilar
			koĘ»rsatilishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713838" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			ariza berilayotgan sudning nomi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713839" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ishda ishtirok etayotgan shaxslar (familiyasi, ismi, otasining
			ismi), ularning turgan joyi (pochta manzili) yoki yashash joyi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713840" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			arizachi yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rishni talab
			qilayotgan sud hujjatini chiqargan sudning nomi; ishning raqami,
			sud hujjati chiqarilgan sana;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713841" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">4)
			arizachining fikriga koĘ»ra, qonuniy kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini
			qayta koĘ»rib chiqish uchun asos boĘ»ladigan yangi ochilgan holat,
			hujjatlarga havola qilingan holda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713842" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">5)
			ariza berayotgan shaxsning talabi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713843" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">6)
			ilova qilinayotgan hujjatlarning roĘ»yxati.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713844" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Arizaga
			quyidagilar ilova qilingan boĘ»lishi kerak:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713845" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			yangi ochilgan holatlarni tasdiqlovchi hujjatlarning koĘ»chirma
			nusxalari;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713846" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			arizachi qayta koĘ»rib chiqishni talab qilayotgan sud hujjatining
			koĘ»chirma nusxasi;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713848" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			ariza vakil tomonidan imzolangan taqdirda, uni imzolash vakolatini
			tasdiqlovchi hujjat.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713850" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">45</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani ish yuritishga qabul qilish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713853" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rib chiqish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizaning shakli va
			mazmuniga nisbatan ushbu Kodeksda qoĘ»yilayotgan talablarga rioya
			etilgan holda berilgan ariza tegishli sudning ish yurituviga qabul
			qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713854" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Arizani
			sudning ish yurituviga qabul qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi masala u sudga
			kelib tushgan kundan eĘĽtiboran besh kundan kechiktirmay sudya
			tomonidan yakka tartibda hal qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713856" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Arizani
			ish yuritishga qabul qilish toĘ»gĘ»risida sud qaror chiqaradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713857" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			koĘ»chirma nusxalari ishda ishtirok etuvchi shaxslarga ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713539"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">11</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddasida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda
			tutilgan tartibda yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713859" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">46</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani qaytarish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713862" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sud
			qonuniy kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar
			boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rib chiqish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani, agar uni
			ish yuritishga qabul qilish haqidagi masalani hal qilishda
			quyidagilarni aniqlasa, qaytaradi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713864" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			ariza ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713821"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">43</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713829"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">324</span></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt"><span style="background: transparent">44</span></font></span></font><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			qoidalar buzilgan holda berilganligini;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713865" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			ariza belgilangan muddat oĘ»tganidan keyin berilganligini va uni
			tiklash toĘ»gĘ»risida iltimosnoma mavjud emasligini;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713870" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			muddatni oĘ»tkazib yuborish sabablari uzrsiz ekanligini, shunga
			koĘ»ra ariza berish uchun oĘ»tkazib yuborilgan muddatni tiklashga
			asos mavjud emasligini.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713872" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Arizani
			qaytarish toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713874" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Sudning
			arizani qaytarish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarori ustidan shikoyat
			qilinishi (protest keltirilishi) mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713875" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ariza
			bergan shaxs ushbu modda birinchi
			qismining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713864"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">1&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6713865"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">2-bandlarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;koĘ»rsatilgan
			holatlar bartaraf etilganidan keyin ariza bilan sudga yangidan
			murojaat qilishga haqli.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713877" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">47</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani koĘ»rib chiqish tartibi va muddati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713879" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ariza u sudga kelib tushgan kundan
			eĘĽtiboran oĘ»n besh kundan oshmagan muddatda, ishda ishtirok
			etuvchi shaxslar xabardor qilingan holda koĘ»rib chiqiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713881" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Tegishli
			tarzda xabardor qilingan shaxslarning kelmaganligi arizani koĘ»rib
			chiqish uchun toĘ»sqinlik qilmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713884" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">324<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">48</font>-modda.
			Sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qayta koĘ»rish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari yuzasidan sud
			tomonidan qabul qilinadigan qaror</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713885" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari
			yuzasidan sud arizani qanoatlantirish va ilgari oĘ»zi qabul qilgan
			sud hujjatini bekor qilish haqida yoki arizani qanoatlantirishni
			rad etish toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqaradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713886" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari
			yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorning koĘ»chirma nusxalari ishda
			ishtirok etuvchi shaxslarga yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713887" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qonuniy
			kuchga kirgan sud hujjatini yangi ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha
			qayta koĘ»rish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi arizani koĘ»rib chiqish natijalari
			yuzasidan chiqarilgan sud qarori ustidan shikoyat qilinishi
			(protest keltirilishi) mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6713889" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Yangi
			ochilgan holatlar boĘ»yicha qonuniy kuchga kirgan sud hujjati
			bekor qilingan taqdirda, ilgari oĘ»zi qabul qilgan sud hujjatini
			bekor qilgan sudning oĘ»zi ishni ushbu Kodeksda belgilangan umumiy
			tartibda takroran koĘ»radi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201685" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">BESHINCHI
			BOĘ»LIM<br/>
MAĘĽMURIY JAZO QOĘ»LLANISH TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI QARORLARNI
			IJRO ETISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201688" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXV
			bob. ASOSIY QOIDALAR</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201693" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">325-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ijrosining
			majburiyligi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201695" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni korxonalar, muassasalar,
			tashkilotlar, mansabdor shaxslar va fuqarolar ijro etishi
			majburiydir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201696" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">326-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etishga
			qaratish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453120" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror, basharti ushbu Kodeksda va
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining boshqa qonunchiligida oĘ»zgacha
			qoida belgilanmagan boĘ»lsa, chiqarilgan paytdan boshlab ijro
			etilishi lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5221115" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ustidan apellyatsiya
			tartibida shikoyat berilgan yoki protest bildirilgan taqdirda bu
			qaror berilgan shikoyat yoki bildirilgan protest
			qanoatlantirishsiz qoldirilgandan keyin ijro etilishi kerak.
			MaĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joyning oĘ»zida undirib
			olinadigan jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror bundan mustasnodir.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4359244" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror uni ixtiyoriy ravishda bajarishning
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201758"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">332-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			muddati oĘ»tib ketganidan keyin majburiy ravishda ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201709" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror uni chiqargan organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) tomonidan ijro etishga qaratiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201711" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">327-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453123" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ushbu Kodeksda va
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining boshqa qonunchiligida belgilangan
			tartibda vakolatli organlar (mansabdor shaxslar) tomonidan ijro
			etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201716" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Bir
			shaxsga nisbatan maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risida bir
			necha qaror chiqarilgan hollarda ularning har biri mustaqil
			ravishda ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201717" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">328-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning ijrosini
			kechiktirish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201719" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olish yoki jarima solish (joyning oĘ»zida undirib
			olinadigan jarima solish bundan mustasno) tarzida maĘĽmuriy jazo
			qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni darhol ijro etishga imkon
			bermaydigan holatlar mavjud boĘ»lgan taqdirda, shu qarorni
			chiqargan organ (mansabdor shaxs) uning ijrosini bir oygacha
			muddatga kechiktirishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201722" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">329-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning ijrosini
			tugatish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201724" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqargan organ (mansabdor
			shaxs) quyidagi hollarda uning ijrosini tugatadi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201727" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">1)
			amnistiya akti eĘĽlon qilinib, u maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasini
			qoĘ»llanishni yoĘ»q qilsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201729" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">2)
			maĘĽmuriy javobgarlikni belgilovchi normativ hujjat bekor qilingan
			boĘ»lsa;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201733" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">3)
			ustidan qaror chiqarilgan shaxs vafot etgan boĘ»lsa.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201735" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">330-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ijrosining
			muhlati</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201739" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror chiqarilgan
			kundan boshlab uch oy davomida ijro etishga qaratilmagan boĘ»lsa,
			u holda bunday qaror ijro etilmaydi. Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201621"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">318-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
			qarorning ijrosi toĘ»xtatib turilgan taqdirda, kuchini yoĘ»qotish
			muddatining kechishi shikoyat yoki protest koĘ»rib chiqilgunga
			qadar toĘ»xtatib qoĘ»yiladi. Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201717"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">328-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
			qarorning ijrosi kechiktirilgan taqdirda, kuchini yoĘ»qotish
			muddatining kechishi muddatini kechiktirish davri oĘ»tgunga qadar
			toĘ»xtatib qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201743" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">331-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning ijrosi bilan
			bogĘ»liq boĘ»lgan masalalarni hal etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201746" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning ijrosi bilan bogĘ»liq
			boĘ»lgan masalalarni shu qarorni chiqargan organ (mansabdor shaxs)
			hal etadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201749" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning toĘ»gĘ»ri va oĘ»z
			vaqtida ijro etilishini nazorat qilish shu qarorni chiqargan organ
			(mansabdor shaxs) zimmasiga yuklatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201751" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Organlarning
			(mansabdor shaxslarning) maĘĽmuriy jazo qoĘ»llanish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qarorning ijrosiga oid harakati xususida berilgan shikoyatlar
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201596"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">315-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>aytib
			oĘ»tilgan organlar tomonidan&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201630"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">319</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201638"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">320-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			talablarga rioya etilgan holda hal etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201755" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXVI
			bob. JARIMA SOLISH TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI QARORNI IJRO ETISH BOĘ»YICHA
			ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201758" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">332-modda.
			Jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish muddatlari va
			tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4771201" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			huquqbuzar tomonidan unga jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror
			topshirilgan kundan boshlab oĘ»ttiz kundan kechiktirmay, bunday
			qaror xususida shikoyat berilgan yoki protest bildirilgan taqdirda
			â€” shikoyat yoki protest qanoatlantirilmaganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida
			xabar berilgan kundan boshlab oĘ»n besh kundan kechiktirmay
			toĘ»lanishi lozim, ushbu moddaning<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/97664#201765"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;ikkinchi
			qismi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>bundan mustasno.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4359247" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">YoĘ»l
			harakati qoidalarini buzganlik uchun solingan jarimani huquqbuzar
			jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror chiqarilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran
			oltmish kundan kechiktirmay, bunday qaror xususida shikoyat
			berilgan yoki protest bildirilgan hollarda esa, shikoyat yoki
			protest qanoatlantirilmay qoldirilganligi toĘ»gĘ»risida xabar
			berilgan kundan eĘĽtiboran oĘ»ttiz kundan kechiktirmay toĘ»lashi
			kerak.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201765" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">OĘ»n
			olti yoshdan oĘ»n sakkiz yoshgacha boĘ»lgan shaxslarning mustaqil
			ish haqi boĘ»lmagan taqdirda, jarima ularning ota-onalari yoki
			ular oĘ»rnini bosuvchi shaxslardan undirib olinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1427940" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etganlik uchun solingan jarima huquqbuzar
			tomonidan tegishli bank muassasasiga toĘ»lanadi, huquqbuzarlik
			sodir etilgan joyning oĘ»zida undirib olinadigan jarima bundan
			mustasno.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4771219" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">332<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etishning
			soddalashtirilgan tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437513" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzar
			unga jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror topshirilgan kundan
			boshlab oĘ»n besh kun ichida jarima miqdorining ellik foizini yoki
			oĘ»ttiz kun ichida jarima miqdorining yetmish foizini ixtiyoriy
			ravishda toĘ»lagan taqdirda, u jarimaning qolgan qismini
			toĘ»lashdan ozod qilinadi, bundan ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-6437520"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan hollar
			mustasno.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437520" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etishning soddalashtirilgan
			tartibi quyidagi hollarda qoĘ»llanilmaydi:</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437528" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199957"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">131</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-199967"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">132</span></span></font></a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-1781427"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">136&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200015"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">140-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan huquqbuzarliklar sodir etilganda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437532" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ustidan shikoyat qilinganda yoki
			protest bildirilganda;</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6437536" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">xuddi
			shunday huquqbuzarlik maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasi qoĘ»llanilganidan
			keyin bir yil davomida takror sodir etilganda.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201770" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">333-modda.
			Jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni majburiy ijro etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453092" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Huquqbuzar
			jarimani ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201758"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">332-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan
			muddat ichida toĘ»lamagan taqdirda, jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qaror sud hujjatlari va boshqa organlar hujjatlarini ijro etish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qonunchilikda belgilab qoĘ»yilgan qoidalarga
			muvofiq jarimani uning ish haqi yoki boshqa maoshidan, nafaqasidan
			yoki stipendiyasidan majburiy tartibda undirib olish uchun
			yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3397163" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			jarima solingan shaxs ishlamayotgan boĘ»lsa yoxud jarimani
			huquqbuzarning ish haqi yoki boshqa daromadidan, pensiyasi yoki
			stipendiyasidan boshqa sabablarga koĘ»ra undirib olishning iloji
			boĘ»lmasa, uni undirib olish davlat ijrochisi tomonidan jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risida tegishli organ (mansabdor shaxs) chiqargan
			qaror asosida huquqbuzarning mulkidan, shuningdek umumiy mulkdagi
			uning hissasidan undirib olish yoĘ»li bilan amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453126" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi qonunchiligiga muvofiq ijro hujjatlari
			boĘ»yicha undirib olinishi mumkin boĘ»lmagan mol-mulkdan undirib
			olinishi mumkin emas.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201778" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">334-modda.
			Joyning oĘ»zida undirib olinadigan jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qarorni ijro etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201780" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201280"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">283-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
			jarima maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir qilingan joyning oĘ»zida
			undirib olingan taqdirda huquqbuzarga qatĘĽiy moliyaviy hisobot
			hujjati hisoblangan belgilangan nusxadagi kvitansiya beriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201782" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			maĘĽmuriy huquqbuzarlik sodir etilgan joyning oĘ»zida toĘ»lanmasa,
			ishni koĘ»rib chiqish va qarorni ijro etish ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201758"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">332</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201770"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">333-moddalarida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda
			tutilgan tartibda amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201784" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">335-modda.
			Jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish ishlarini
			tugallash</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201786" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Jarima
			solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorga muvofiq jarima toĘ»la-toĘ»kis
			undirib olingach, uning ijro etilganligi haqida belgi qoĘ»yilib,
			shu qarorni chiqargan organga (mansabdor shaxsga) yoki sudga
			qaytariladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4771237" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Majburiy
			ijroga qaratilgan jarima solish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ijro
			etilganidan soĘ»ng davlat ijrochisi ijro ishini yuritishni
			tamomlash toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqaradi va uning bir nusxasini uni
			chiqargan organga (mansabdor shaxsga) yoki sudga yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201787" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXVII
			bob. NARSANI HAQINI TOĘ»LASH SHARTI BILAN OLIB QOĘ»YISH
			TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI QARORNI IJRO ETISH BOĘ»YICHA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201788" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">336-modda.
			Narsani haqini toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qarorni ijro etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-1428273" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haqini
			toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror asosida
			olib qoĘ»yilgan narsalar belgilangan tartibda
			shartnoma-vositachilik asosida yoxud auksion shaklidagi kimoshdi
			savdosida realizatsiya qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-6052365" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qurolni
			va uning oĘ»q-dorilarini haqini toĘ»lab olib qoĘ»yish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ichki ishlar organlari tomonidan ijro
			etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201792" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Haqini
			toĘ»lash sharti bilan olib qoĘ»yilgan narsani sotishdan tushgan
			pullar ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-197923"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">26-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
			olib qoĘ»yilgan narsalarni sotish xarajatlarini chegirib qolib,
			shu narsalarning sobiq egasiga topshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201796" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXVIII
			bob. NARSANI MUSODARA QILISH TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI QARORNI IJRO ETISH
			BOĘ»YICHA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201798" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">337-modda.
			Narsani musodara qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-3397168" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etish quroli yoki bevosita shunday ashyo
			boĘ»lgan narsani musodara qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Bosh prokuraturasi huzuridagi Majburiy ijro byurosi
			organlarining davlat ijrochilari tomonidan ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201805" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">338-modda.
			Musodara qilingan narsani sotish yoki yoĘ»q qilib tashlash tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201808" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik sodir etish quroli yoki bevosita shunday narsa
			boĘ»lgan musodara qilingan narsani sotish va yoĘ»q qilib tashlash
			belgilangan tartibda amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201809" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">339-modda.
			Narsani musodara qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish
			boĘ»yicha ish yuritishning tugallanishi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5221131" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlikni sodir etish quroli yoki bevosita shunday narsa
			boĘ»lgan ashyoni musodara qilish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ijro
			etilganidan soĘ»ng davlat ijrochisi ijro ishi yuritishni tamomlash
			toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqaradi va uning bir nusxasini uni chiqargan
			jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sudga yuboradi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201820" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXIX
			bob. MAXSUS HUQUQDAN MAHRUM ETISH TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI QARORNI IJRO
			ETISH BOĘ»YICHA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201822" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">340-modda.
			Maxsus huquqdan mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etuvchi
			organlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201823" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini boshqarish huquqidan mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi
			qaror ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-200983"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">248-moddasida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatib
			oĘ»tilgan ichki ishlar organlarining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan
			ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8088030" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kema
			haydovchilarini kichik hajmli kemalarni boshqarish huquqidan
			mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ushbu Kodeks
			249<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-4671674"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">beshinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatib oĘ»tilgan
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligi Kichik
			hajmli kemalar inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan ijro
			etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-8044538" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Kema
			haydovchilarini kemalarni boshqarish huquqidan mahrum etish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ushbu Kodeks 254<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-8044506"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>koĘ»rsatib oĘ»tilgan
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Transport vazirligi huzuridagi Transport
			nazorati inspeksiyasining mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan ijro
			etiladi, bundan ushbu moddaning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-8088030"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">ikkinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>nazarda tutilgan hollar
			mustasno.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201827" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ov
			qilish huquqidan mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ushbu
			Kodeksning 261-moddasi<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201134"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">&nbsp;ikkinchi
			qismida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;aytib oĘ»tilgan ov qilish
			qoidalariga rioya etilishi ustidan davlat nazorati olib boruvchi
			organlarning mansabdor shaxslari tomonidan ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201828" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">341-modda.
			Transport vositalarini yoki kichik hajmli kemalarni boshqarish
			huquqidan mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201830" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini yoki kichik hajmli kemalarni boshqarish huquqidan
			mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror haydovchilik guvohnomasini,
			shuningdek uning talonini olib qoĘ»yish yoĘ»li bilan ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201831" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Basharti
			haydovchi yoki kema haydovchisi transport vositalarining yoki
			kichik hajmli kemalarning ayrim turlarini boshqarish huquqidangina
			mahrum etilgan boĘ»lsa, haydovchilik guvohnomasiga va uning
			taloniga transport vositalarining yoki kichik hajmli kemalarning
			qaysi turlarini boshqarish huquqidan mahrum etilganligi yozib
			qoĘ»yiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-4671903" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini boshqarish huquqini beruvchi guvohnomalarni olib
			qoĘ»yish tartibi OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Ichki ishlar vazirligi
			tomonidan, kichik hajmli kemalarni boshqarish huquqini beruvchi
			guvohnomalarni olib qoĘ»yish tartibi esa â€” OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi Favqulodda vaziyatlar vazirligining Kichik hajmli
			kemalar inspeksiyasi tomonidan belgilanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201835" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">342-modda.
			Ov qilish huquqidan mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro
			etish tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201836" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ov
			qilish huquqidan mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror ovchilik
			biletini olib qoĘ»yish yoĘ»li bilan ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201839" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Ov
			qilish huquqidan mahrum etilgan shaxs ovchilik biletini
			topshirishdan boĘ»yin tovlagan taqdirda ov qilish qoidalariga
			rioya etilishi ustidan davlat nazoratini amalga oshiruvchi
			organlar ovchilik biletini belgilangan tartibda olib qoĘ»yadilar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201840" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">343-modda.
			Maxsus huquqdan mahrum etish muddatini qisqartirishning asoslari
			va tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5221160" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Muayyan
			muddatga transport vositasini boshqarish huquqidan yoki ov qilish
			huquqidan mahrum etilgan shaxs mehnatga halol munosabatda boĘ»lishi
			va namunali xulq-atvori bilan oĘ»zini koĘ»rsatgan taqdirda, unga
			nisbatan jazo qoĘ»llagan jinoyat ishlari boĘ»yicha sud bunday
			huquqdan mahrum qilish muddatini belgilangan muddatning kamida
			yarmi oĘ»tgach va sud tomonidan tayinlangan jarima toĘ»langach,
			korxona, muassasa, tashkilot maĘĽmuriyatining iltimosi bilan
			qisqartirishi mumkin.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201845" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">344-modda.
			Maxsus huquqdan mahrum etish muddatini hisoblash</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201847" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositalarini haydovchilar va ov qilish qoidalarini buzgan shaxslar
			maxsus huquqdan mahrum etish toĘ»gĘ»risida qaror chiqarilgan
			kundan boshlab shunday huquqdan mahrum etilgan deb hisoblanadilar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201848" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Maxsus
			huquqdan mahrum qilish muddati oĘ»tgach, shuningdek bu muddat
			ushbu Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201840"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">343-moddasiga&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>muvofiq
			qisqartirilgan taqdirda, shunday maĘĽmuriy jazo chorasiga
			tortilgan shaxsga undan olib qoĘ»yilgan hujjatlar belgilangan
			tartibda qaytarib beriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201850" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Transport
			vositasini boshqarish huquqidan mahrum etilgan haydovchi
			haydovchilik guvohnomasini topshirishdan bosh tortgan taqdirda, bu
			huquqdan mahrum etish muddati guvohnoma olib qoĘ»yilgan kundan
			boshlab, lekin qaror chiqargan organ belgilagan mahrum etish
			muddati tugashidan kechiktirmasdan hisoblanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201851" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXX
			bob. MAĘĽMURIY QAMOQQA OLISH TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI QARORNI IJRO ETISH
			BOĘ»YICHA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201852" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">345-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201853" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror chiqarilgandan keyin darhol
			ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201855" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">346-modda.
			MaĘĽmuriy qamoqni oĘ»tash tartibi</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201857" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olingan shaxslar ichki ishlar organlari belgilab qoĘ»ygan
			joylarda qamoqda saqlanadilar. MaĘĽmuriy qamoqqa olish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish chogĘ»ida qamoqqa olinganlar
			shaxsiy koĘ»rikdan oĘ»tkaziladilar.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201859" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			yoĘ»l bilan ushlab turish muddati maĘĽmuriy qamoq muddatiga
			qoĘ»shib hisoblanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453135" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			qamoqni oĘ»tash OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi qonun hujjatlarida
			belgilangan qoidalar asosida amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201863" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olingan shaxslar jismoniy ishlarda foydalaniladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201864" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olingan shaxslar mehnatidan foydalanishni tashkil etish
			tuman (shahar) hokimliklariga yuklatiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201865" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			qamoqqa olingan shaxslarga qamoqda boĘ»lgan vaqtlari uchun doimiy
			ish joylaridan ish haqi toĘ»lanmaydi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2973947" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXX<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>&nbsp;bob.
			CHET EL FUQAROLARINI VA FUQAROLIGI BOĘ»LMAGAN SHAXSLARNI
			OĘ»ZBEKISTON RESPUBLIKASI HUDUDIDAN MAĘĽMURIY TARZDA CHIQARIB
			YUBORISH TOĘ»GĘ»RISIDAGI QARORNI IJRO ETISH BOĘ»YICHA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2973948" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">346<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-modda.
			Chet el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib
			yuborish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorning ijrosini amalga oshiruvchi
			organlar</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2973949" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Chet
			el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib yuborish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qaror quyidagi organlar tomonidan ijro etiladi:</span></p>
		</div>
