		</div>
		<div id="-7153878" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">ushbu
			Kodeksning 224<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">1</font>-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5865889"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>va&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-5865904"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">toĘ»rtinchi
			qismlarida</span></span></font></a>&nbsp;nazarda tutilgan
			huquqbuzarlik chet el fuqarolari va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslar
			tomonidan sodir etilgan taqdirda â€” OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			Davlat xavfsizlik xizmatining Chegara qoĘ»shinlari tomonidan.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2973965" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">346<font size="2" style="font-size: 9pt">2</font>-modda.
			Chet el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib
			yuborish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2973967" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Chet
			el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasi hududidan maĘĽmuriy tarzda chiqarib yuborish
			toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish mazkur shaxslar qaysi chet
			davlat hududiga chiqarib yuborilayotgan boĘ»lsa, oĘ»sha chet
			davlatning hokimiyat vakiliga ularni rasmiy ravishda topshirish
			yoxud chiqarib yuborilayotgan shaxsning OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi
			hududidan nazorat ostida mustaqil ravishda chiqib ketishi yoĘ»li
			bilan amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5866033" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Agar
			chiqarib yuborilayotgan shaxsni chet davlat vakiliga topshirish
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining mazkur davlat bilan tuzilgan
			shartnomasida nazarda tutilmagan boĘ»lsa, chiqarib yuborish
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasi Davlat xavfsizlik xizmatining Chegara
			qoĘ»shinlari tomonidan belgilanadigan joyda amalga oshiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-7153901" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Chet
			el fuqarosini yoki fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxsni OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasining Davlat chegarasi orqali oĘ»tkazish punktidan
			chiqarib yuborish toĘ»gĘ»risida mazkur shaxs qaysi chet davlat
			hududiga (hududi orqali) chiqarib yuborilayotgan boĘ»lsa, oĘ»sha
			chet davlatning hokimiyat vakillari, agar OĘ»zbekiston
			Respublikasining ushbu davlat bilan tuzilgan shartnomasida nazarda
			tutilgan boĘ»lsa, xabardor qilinadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-2973974" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Chet
			el fuqarolarini va fuqaroligi boĘ»lmagan shaxslarni maĘĽmuriy
			tarzda chiqarib yuborish toĘ»gĘ»risidagi qarorni ijro etish
			dalolatnoma bilan rasmiylashtiriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201866" dir="ltr"><p style="line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">XXXI
			bob. QARORNING MULKIY ZARARNI UNDIRIB OLISH XUSUSIDAGI QISMINI
			IJRO ETISH BOĘ»YICHA ISH YURITISH</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201867" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">347-modda.
			Qarorning mulkiy zararni undirib olish xususidagi qismini ijro
			etish tartibi va muddatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453129" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorning
			mulkiy zararni undirib olish xususidagi qismi ushbu Kodeks va
			OĘ»zbekiston Respublikasining boshqa qonunchiligi bilan
			belgilangan tartibda ijro etiladi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201869" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">MaĘĽmuriy
			huquqbuzarlik toĘ»gĘ»risidagi ish yuzasidan chiqarilgan qarorning
			mulkiy zararni undirib olish xususidagi qismi ijro hujjati
			hisoblanadi.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201870" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Mulkiy
			zarar huquqbuzar tomonidan unga qaror topshirilgan kundan boshlab
			oĘ»n besh kundan kechiktirmay toĘ»lanishi lozim (ushbu
			Kodeksning&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201581"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">311-moddasi</span></span></font></a>),
			bunday qaror xususida shikoyat berilgan yoki protest bildirilgan
			taqdirda â€” shikoyat yoki protest qanoatlantirilmaganligi maĘĽlum
			qilingan kundan boshlab oĘ»n besh kundan kechiktirmay qoplanishi
			lozim.</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-201871" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">348-modda.
			Qarorning mulkiy zararni undirib olish xususidagi qismini
			bajarmaslik oqibatlari</span></p>
		</div>
		<div id="-5453095" dir="ltr"><p style="text-indent: 0.59in; line-height: 100%; margin-bottom: 0in">
			<span style="display: inline-block; border: none; padding: 0in">Qarorning
			mulkiy zararni undirib olishga oid qismi ushbu Kodeks
			347-moddasining&nbsp;<a href="https://lex.uz/docs/-97664#-201870"><font color="#008080"><span style="text-decoration: none"><span style="background: transparent">uchinchi
			qismida&nbsp;</span></span></font></a>belgilangan muddatda ijro
			etilmasa, u qonunchilikda belgilangan tartibda majburiy ijro uchun
			davlat ijrochisiga yuboriladi.</span></p>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
